title: Variational free complement method with Gaussian-expanded complement functions: convergence with fixed Gaussian expansion length
summary: For the free complement theory with Gaussian-expanded complement functions, the energy convergence of $n_\mathrm{G} = \mathrm{constant} < \infty, n\rightarrow\infty$ is discussed, where $n_\mathrm{G}$ is the number of the Gaussian functions in the STO-$n$G expansion.

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了在自由补函数理论中，使用高斯展开补函数时，当高斯函数数量固定（n_G=常数）而基函数数量趋于无穷（n→∞）时的能量收敛行为。
AI.motivation: 研究在自由补函数理论框架下，固定高斯展开精度（STO-nG中n_G固定）时，增大基组规模对能量收敛的影响。
AI.method: 采用自由补函数理论，结合高斯展开的补函数（STO-nG展开），分析n_G固定而n→∞情况下的能量收敛性质。
AI.result: 揭示了在n_G固定有限值时，能量随n→∞的收敛行为特征。
AI.conclusion: 对自由补函数理论中高斯展开补函数的收敛性提供了理论分析，为相关计算方法的选择提供了依据。

title: Data-Driven Spectral Prediction for Accelerating Large-Scale Electronic Structure Calculations
summary: Simulating large molecular systems comprising thousands of atoms requires highly scalable methodologies. While modern Density Functional Theory (DFT) codes exhibit linear scaling, solving the associated large, sparse generalized eigenproblems remains a critical computational bottleneck on exascale architectures. In the context of the LimitX project, we propose a data-driven framework to accelerate these calculations. By shifting the machine learning target from discrete eigenvalues to the coefficients of an interpolating Chebyshev polynomial, and by comparing both all-atom and fragment-based structural representations, we successfully overcome the dimensionality constraints of large-scale spectral prediction. We investigate three machine learning models (Kernel Ridge Regression, Graph Neural Networks, and Random Forests) trained on a novel 2 TB dataset of protein dimers. The predicted spectra provide initial guesses that effectively bypass early Self-Consistent Field (SCF) iterations in BigDFT. Ultimately, these spectral predictors will be deployed to dynamically optimize upcoming rational filter-based eigensolvers, such as FrASE, which is currently in initial development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动框架，通过机器学习预测Chebyshev多项式系数来加速大规模DFT计算中的广义本征问题求解，训练于2TB蛋白质二聚体数据集，可绕过早期SCF迭代，并计划用于优化滤波器本征求解器。
AI.motivation: 大规模分子系统（数千原子）的DFT模拟中，求解大型稀疏广义本征问题是exascale架构上的关键计算瓶颈，需要高可扩展性的加速方法。
AI.method: 将机器学习目标从离散本征值转移到Chebyshev插值多项式系数；比较全原子和基于片段的分子表征；采用三种模型（核岭回归、图神经网络、随机森林）在2TB蛋白质二聚体数据集上训练；预测谱作为初始猜测加速SCF迭代。
AI.result: 预测的光谱可有效绕过BigDFT早期SCF迭代，成功克服大规模谱预测的维度限制。
AI.conclusion: 该谱预测器未来将用于动态优化基于有理滤波的本征求解器（如FrASE），进一步提升exascale架构上的计算效率。

title: Photostationary Lifshitz transition in High Tc superconductor Bi2Sr2CaCu2O8+δ
summary: To date, controlling the steady-state electronic band structure in high-Tc cuprate superconductors has been achieved primarily through chemical doping or magnetic fields. Here, we present that ultrafast optical excitation can instead drive the electronic band structure of Bi2Sr2CaCu2O8+δ into a photostationary, long-lived excited state. At sufficiently high pump fluences, this state undergoes a Lifshitz transition of the Fermi surface, characterized by a change in topology from hole-like to electron-like. Time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, supported by single-band tight-binding calculations, reveals that 1.6 eV photoexcitation induces band-structure evolutions closely analogous to those produced by chemical doping. These results point to an efficient photodoping mechanism involving cooperative effects, including charge transfer, renormalization of effective electronic correlations, and defect-assisted charge trapping. Our findings raise fundamental questions regarding thermalization processes occurring on timescales comparable to the laser repetition period in cuprates. More broadly, ultrafast optical control enables access to otherwise inaccessible regions of the phase diagram by tuning the pump fluence.

AI.tldr: 本文发现超快光学激发可以驱动Bi2Sr2CaCu2O8+δ高温超导体的电子能带结构进入长寿命的光稳态，在高泵浦通量下发生费米面的Lifshitz相变，实现了类似化学掺杂的能带调控效果。
AI.motivation: 传统上调控高温铜氧化物超导体的稳态电子能带结构主要依赖化学掺杂或外加磁场，本研究试图探索利用超快光学激发作为一种新的调控手段。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨和角分辨光电子能谱（Tr-ARPES），结合单带紧束缚计算，研究1.6 eV光激发下Bi2Sr2CaCu2O8+δ的能带结构演化。
AI.result: 高泵浦通量下实现了费米面从空穴型到电子型的拓扑转变（Lifshitz相变），形成了长寿命的光稳态，其能带结构演化与化学掺杂效果高度相似。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一种高效的光掺杂机制，涉及电荷转移、电子关联重整化和缺陷辅助电荷捕获等协同效应，为通过调节泵浦通量进入传统方法无法触及的相图区域提供了新途径。

title: Chirality routing non-polaritonic vacuum correlations in Landau polaritons
summary: Ultrastrong coupling between matter and cavity vacuum fields can turn the electromagnetic vacuum into a structured quantum environment, thereby opening passive routes for modifying and manipulating material properties. Recent work has identified light--matter entanglement as an important ingredient in these property changes, which raises the question of where the relevant vacuum correlations actually reside. Landau polaritons provide chiral ultrastrong coupling systems in which one circular cavity polarization forms the bright polariton branches. Here, using a quantum information approach, we show that an exact chiral charge in a multimode Hopfield model routes the dominant anomalous correlations, squeezing, and cavity--matter entanglement into the opposite polarization. We find that, using parameters extracted from a multimode Landau polariton system, this hidden sector correlates the cyclotron resonance with finite momentum magnetoplasmons through Gaussian discord, while pairwise matter--matter entanglement remains absent. We further predict a polarization anisotropy of dressed vacuum electric field fluctuations as a signature of this chiral routing. These results identify chirality as a symmetry principle for organizing ultrastrong coupling vacua and show that quantum information tools provide a powerful framework for revealing the salient properties of Landau polaritons.

AI.tldr: 本文通过量子信息方法研究手性超强耦合系统中的真空相关性，发现在多模Hopfield模型中，精确的手性电荷会将反常关联、压缩和腔-物质纠缠路由到相反极化方向，并预测了极化各向异性作为手性路由的信号。
AI.motivation: 超强耦合下光-物质纠缠是材料性质变化的关键因素，但真空相关性具体如何分布尚不清楚，因此需要揭示其驻留位置和组织原理。
AI.method: 采用量子信息方法，构建多模Hopfield模型，引入精确手性电荷，分析Landau极化子系统中的反常关联、压缩、纠缠等量子信息量，并结合实验参数进行验证。
AI.result: 手性电荷将主导的反常关联、压缩和腔-物质纠缠路由到相反极化方向；隐藏扇区通过高斯失谐关联回旋共振与有限动量磁等离激元，但物质-物质间无纠缠；预测了电真空场涨落的极化各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 手性可作为组织超强耦合真空态的一种对称性原理，量子信息工具为揭示Landau极化子的关键特性提供了有力框架。

title: Control of Electrons Spin Eliminates Hydrogen Peroxide Formation During Water Splitting
summary: The production of hydrogen through water splitting in a photoelectrochemical cell suffers from an overpotential that limits the efficiencies. In addition, hydrogen-peroxide formation is identified as a competing process affecting the oxidative stability of photoelectrodes. We impose spin-selectivity by coating the anode with chiral organic semiconductors from helically-aggregated dyes as sensitizers; Zn-porphyrins and triarylamines. Hydrogen peroxide formation is dramatically suppressed, while the overall current through the cell, correlating with the water splitting process, is enhanced. Evidence for a strong spin-selection in the chiral semiconductors is presented by magnetic conducting (mc-)AFM measurements, where chiral and achiral Zn-porphyrins are compared. These findings contribute to our understanding of the underlying mechanism of spin selectivity in multiple electron-transfer reactions and pave the way towards better chiral dye-sensitized photoelectrochemical cells.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在光电极上涂覆手性有机半导体（螺旋聚集染料敏化剂），利用自旋选择性抑制了水分解过程中的过电位和过氧化氢生成，从而提升了光电化学电池的效率。
AI.motivation: 光电化学水分解制氢存在过电位限制效率的问题，同时过氧化氢的生成会竞争反应并影响光电极的氧化稳定性，因此需要寻找抑制副反应、提升效率的方法。
AI.method: 在阳极上涂覆手性有机半导体（螺旋聚集的Zn-卟啉和三芳胺染料作为敏化剂），利用自旋选择性来调控电子转移过程。通过mc-AFM测量比较手性和非手性Zn-卟啉来验证自旋选择效应。
AI.result: 过氧化氢生成被显著抑制，与水分裂过程相关的总电流得到增强。mc-AFM测量证实了手性半导体中强烈的自旋选择效应。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了多电子转移反应中自旋选择性的潜在机制，为设计更好的手性染料敏化光电化学电池铺平了道路。

title: Rossi-alpha Benchmark Validation of a Static Alpha Eigenvalue Capability in OpenMC
summary: A static alpha eigenvalue capability was implemented in a modified version of the open-source Monte Carlo radiation transport code OpenMC and validated against Rossi-alpha measurements from 21 delayed-critical benchmark experiments and 33 subcritical configurations spanning fast, intermediate, and thermal systems with U-233, HEU, IEU, LEU, and plutonium fuels. The effective delayed neutron fraction was calculated using the k-prompt method, and the prompt neutron lifetime was calculated using the iterated fission probability method, both evaluated within the standard k-eigenvalue power iteration. The delayed-critical alpha eigenvalue was calculated from these quantities using the point kinetics equation alpha_dc = -beta_eff / ell_p. Agreement was generally within 10% for fast metal systems and within 5% for thermal solution systems. Subcritical extrapolation studies derived from the SHE-8 and STACY benchmark families show that alpha_dc remains stable as the system is driven subcritical.

AI.tldr: 在OpenMC中实现了静态α特征值功能，并通过21个缓发临界基准实验和33个次临界构型进行了验证，结果与Rossi-α测量值吻合良好（快系统10%以内，热系统5%以内）。
AI.motivation: 在蒙特卡罗代码中实现静态α特征值计算能力，并通过实验数据验证其准确性，为反应堆动力学分析提供可靠工具。
AI.method: 在OpenMC中实现静态α特征值计算：使用k-prompt方法计算有效缓发中子份额，使用迭代裂变概率方法计算瞬发中子寿命，并通过点动力学方程α_dc = -β_eff/ℓ_p计算缓发临界α特征值。
AI.result: 对于快金属系统，结果与Rossi-α测量值吻合在10%以内；对于热溶液系统，吻合在5%以内。次临界外推研究显示α_dc在系统进入次临界时保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该静态α特征值方法在OpenMC中实现成功，能够准确预测多种系统的α特征值，且对次临界状态具有良好的稳定性。

title: Vestigial Nematic Order at Zero Temperature in Two-Dimensional Frustrated Quantum Antiferromagnets
summary: The phase diagram of the two-dimensional quantum $J_1$-$J_3$ Heisenberg antiferromagnet on a square lattice is a long-standing open problem. Despite recent advances in numerical techniques for quantum spin models, a detailed analytical theory is still lacking. We address this problem using a semiclassical approach based on a continuum nonlinear sigma model effective field theory, applying the nonperturbative large-$N$ technique to map out the phase diagram and determine the magnetic correlations. We show that previously-overlooked interactions are crucial for stabilizing a vestigial nematic phase, both at finite and zero temperature. Our results reveal that the spontaneous breaking of global symmetries in the $J_1$-$J_3$ model is controlled by the strength of infrared quantum fluctuations which are enhanced by proximity to the classical Lifshitz point.

AI.tldr: 本文运用半经典连续非线性sigma模型和大N技术，解析研究了二维量子J1-J3海森堡反铁磁体的相图，发现被忽视的相互作用对稳定残余向列相至关重要，红外量子涨落在经典Lifshitz点附近增强，控制着全局对称性的自发破缺。
AI.motivation: 二维量子J1-J3海森堡反铁磁体在正方晶格上的相图是一个长期悬而未决的问题，尽管数值技术有进展，但仍缺乏详细的解析理论。
AI.method: 采用基于连续非线性sigma模型有效场论的半经典方法，应用非微扰的大N技术来描绘相图并确定磁关联。
AI.result: 发现之前被忽视的相互作用对稳定残余向列相（在有限温度和零温下）至关重要；表明J1-J3模型中全局对称性的自发破缺受红外量子涨落强度控制，而该涨落在经典Lifshitz点附近被增强。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了量子涨落通过经典Lifshitz点调控对称性破缺的新机制，为理解该模型的相图提供了解析理论框架。

title: Electronic screening of the friction acting on ions and water molecules in narrow carbon nanotubes
summary: Li, et. al., have observed a larger flow rate, resulting from osmotic pressure, of protons and water molecules in nanometer scale diameter metallic carbon nanotubes compared to that in semiconducting carbon nanotubes. The flow rate of potassium ions, however, under an applied electric field is almost the same in metallic and semiconducting nanotubes. We propose a simple physical picture to understand these experimental results by examining the effects of screening by conduction electrons in electrically conducting carbon nanotubes on the friction experienced by protons, water molecules, and ions flowing through the nanotube.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析导电性不同的碳纳米管中质子、水分子和离子的流动差异，提出了一种基于传导电子屏蔽效应的物理模型，解释了金属性碳纳米管中质子与水分子的渗透流率高于半导体性碳纳米管的现象。
AI.motivation: 旨在理解实验中观察到的金属性与半导体性碳纳米管中质子/水分子流率差异，并解释为何钾离子在电场驱动下流率相同。
AI.method: 提出一个简单的物理图像，通过考察导电碳纳米管中传导电子的屏蔽效应对管内流动粒子所受到摩擦力的影响，来分析不同粒子（质子、水分子、钾离子）的流动行为。
AI.result: 金属性碳纳米管中的质子与水分子的渗透流率大于半导体性碳纳米管；而在外加电场下，钾离子的流率在两种碳纳米管中几乎相同。
AI.conclusion: 传导电子的屏蔽效应能够解释不同电荷性质的粒子在导电性不同的碳纳米管中的流动差异，为理解纳米尺度下的输运现象提供了新的物理视角。

title: Excitonic-Superconducting Coexistence and Emergent Nematic Superconductivity Driven by Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking
summary: Excitonic insulating (EI) and superconducting (SC) orders are generally regarded as mutually exclusive electronic instabilities. Within a self-consistent microscopic theory, we study electronic systems hosting an EI phase in the presence of SC pairing and show that an intrinsic mismatch between electron and hole Fermi surfaces fundamentally reshapes this competition. This mismatch stabilizes FFLO-like electron-hole pairing and drives spontaneous symmetry breaking of the EI state. The resulting symmetry breaking reconstructs the pairing phase space for SC and EI state, such that different regions of the Fermi surface complementarily support either EI or SC correlations, leading to a natural coexistence of the two orders. Notably, the emergent SC state consequently breaks rotational symmetry and develops intrinsic nematic superconductivity, even in the absence of explicit symmetry-breaking fields (such as magnetic fields, spin-orbit coupling, or bare band-structure anisotropy). Our results suggest that candidate materials such as monolayer 1T$'$-MoTe$_2$ and the square-net semimetal NaAlSi may provide promising platforms for observing this phenomenon. More broadly, these findings reveal a unique mechanism by which competing many-body orders generate electronic nematicity, suggesting a broader route toward spontaneous anisotropic electronic states in correlated quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自洽微观理论证明，激子绝缘体（EI）与超导（SC）序并非互斥，电子-空穴费米面失配可稳定FFLO-like配对，驱动EI态自发对称性破缺，重构配对相空间，使两者在费米面不同区域互补共存，并产生内禀向列超导，无需外加对称性破缺场。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为激子绝缘体与超导是相互排斥的电子不稳定性，作者试图揭示两者在费米面失配条件下可以共存的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用自洽微观理论框架，在存在超导配对的体系中研究激子绝缘相，分析电子-空穴费米面失配如何影响两者竞争关系。
AI.result: 费米面失配稳定FFLO-like电子-空穴配对并驱动EI态自发对称性破缺，导致费米面不同区域分别支持EI或SC关联，二者互补共存。产生的超导态自发打破旋转对称性，形成内禀向列超导。
AI.conclusion: 单层1T'-MoTe₂和方网格半金属NaAlSi是观测该现象的有前景平台，该工作揭示了竞争多体序产生电子向列性的新机制。

title: Dynamic Breaking of Mirror Symmetry in Spin-Dependent Electron Transport through Chiral Media Causes Enantiomeric Excesses
summary: Two fundamental questions have puzzled scientists for more than 150 years. How did life become homochiral and why was this specific handedness selected. Recently, it has been shown that homochirality could have emerged through the enantioselective interactions of molecules with magnetic substrates due to the asymmetric crystallization of an RNA precursor on a magnetite substrate, abundant on early Earth. This phenomenon is based on the chirality-induced spin selectivity,CISS, effect. Despite its robustness, this model could not provide an answer to the second question: why one specific handedness, D for RNA, was selected. Here we demonstrate that spin-involving processes can have different outcomes in the two enantiomers of chiral molecules. In chiral molecules with unpaired electrons or while electrons are passing through them, the total angular momentum vector, J, is aligned along the easy axis, which is defined by the magnetic anisotropy induced by the spin-orbit coupling and asymmetry of the molecular field. The magnitude J is the same for both enantiomers, but the vectors may be aligned differently relative to the molecular frame in the two enantiomers. This difference can be quantified by, for example, by the angle between J and electric dipole moment of the molecule. We show by direct measurements, theory, and ab initio calculations that dynamic spin processes in chiral molecules could result in different efficiencies of spin-related phenomena, including the interaction of chiral molecules with magnetic surfaces. The findings may provide an explanation for the specific homochirality in nature.

AI.tldr: 本文发现手性分子中自旋相关过程在两种对映体中可能存在不同结果，这归因于总角动量矢量J在手性分子框架中的不同取向，从而可能解释自然界为何选择了特定手性（如RNA的D型）。
AI.motivation: 长期以来有两个谜题：生命如何产生同手性，以及为何选择了特定的手性。先前研究基于CISS效应解释了同手性的产生，但无法回答为何选择了特定手性（如RNA的D型）。本文旨在解决这第二个问题。
AI.method: 通过直接测量、理论分析和ab initio计算，研究手性分子中动态自旋过程。重点分析总角动量矢量J在两种对映体分子框架中的取向差异，以及J与分子电偶极矩之间的夹角。
AI.result: 在手性分子中，总角动量矢量J的大小相同，但相对于分子框架的取向不同。这种差异可以通过J与分子电偶极矩之间的夹角等参数来量化。动态自旋过程在两种对映体中具有不同的效率，包括与磁性表面的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了手性分子中自旋相关过程的对映体差异，为自然界中特定同手性（如RNA的D型）的选择提供了可能的解释机制。

title: The semi-explicit nonsmooth Newmark time integrator for robust unilateral contact in dynamic fragmentation simulations
summary: Numerical simulations of solids undergoing dynamic fragmentation, a problem characterized by dynamic fracture and dense contacts, require accurately capturing the transition from a solid continuum to interacting fragments. We use the finite-element method with the extrinsic cohesive zone model for fracture. For contact, conventional penalty-based methods often exhibit numerical instabilities in dynamic collision-rich settings. To address this, we adapt and validate a novel semi-explicit time-integration scheme: the Nonsmooth Newmark (NSN) method for unilateral contact. Based on Nonsmooth Contact Dynamics, this formulation strongly enforces contact constraints at the velocity level. Within this scheme, bulk dynamics and fracture are integrated explicitly, while contact is integrated implicitly. Benchmark tests demonstrate that the NSN scheme achieves accuracy comparable to established nonsmooth methods and outperforms penalty-based approaches by orders of magnitude. Although it incurs a higher per-step computational cost, its enhanced stability permits significantly larger time steps, yielding overall efficiency comparable to purely explicit approaches on 1D benchmarks. We applied this framework to 1D fragmentation in both free and confined expansions. Results reveal confinement shifts the fracture energy budget from local fragment kinetic energy to larger-scale global system kinetic energy. Counterintuitively, compared to fully elastic contact, adding contact dissipation reduces fracture energy yet increases the final fragment count. This contact dissipation reduces vibration within damaged fragments, allowing cleaner stress-wave propagation and better damage localization to drive full separation. These results establish the NSN scheme as a robust tool for generating high-fidelity fragmentation statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种用于动态碎片化模拟的半显式时间积分方案——Nonsmooth Newmark (NSN) 方法，该方法结合显式积分处理体动力学与断裂、隐式积分处理接触约束，在保持精度的同时大幅提升稳定性，并揭示了约束与接触耗散对碎片化行为的反直觉影响。
AI.motivation: 动态碎片化模拟中，传统基于惩罚的接触方法在高频碰撞场景下存在数值不稳定性，亟需一种鲁棒的接触处理方案来准确捕捉从连续固体到碎片相互作用的过渡过程。
AI.method: 采用有限元与外在内聚力区模型模拟断裂；针对接触问题，引入基于非光滑接触动力学的Nonsmooth Newmark (NSN) 方法，在速度层面强约束接触条件，体动力学与断裂显式积分、接触隐式积分。
AI.result: NSN方案精度与经典非光滑方法相当，比惩罚法高出数个数量级；虽单步计算成本更高，但稳定性允许更大时间步长，整体效率与纯显式方法可比。在1D自由与约束膨胀碎片化中，约束使断裂能预算从局部碎片动能转向全局系统动能；接触耗散虽减少断裂能，却增加最终碎片数量。
AI.conclusion: NSN方案是一种鲁棒的高保真碎片化统计生成工具；接触耗散通过抑制受损碎片振动、促进应力波清洁传播，反而增强了损伤局域化与完全分离。

title: Extracting central charge from ground-state overlaps of spatially deformed Hamiltonians
summary: We show that the conformal anomaly of a $(1+1)$-dimensional conformal field theory can be extracted directly from a ground-state wave-function overlap associated with a spatial conformal deformation. Focusing on the $q$-Möbius deformation, we derive an exact overlap formula between the deformed and undeformed ground states, whose exponent depends only on the central charge. Motivated by this result, we construct a lattice estimator based solely on ground-state overlaps and apply it to representative critical quantum chains and the gapless edge modes of a two-dimensional Chern insulator. Numerical results demonstrate that the resulting overlaps provide a simple and robust probe of the central charge in microscopic models. We further demonstrate that the deformed ground states retain universal geometric structures in their entanglement spectra and entanglement entropies. These results provide a simple wave-function-based route to probing conformal data in critical systems and topological edge modes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从基态波函数重叠中直接提取(1+1)维共形场论中心荷的方法，通过q-Möbius变形导出精确的重叠公式，并在量子链和拓扑边缘态上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统的共形反常（中心荷）提取方法通常依赖于能谱或纠缠熵的标度行为，计算复杂且对有限尺寸效应敏感。作者希望找到一种更简单、基于波函数重叠的路径，能够直接且稳健地从基态波函数中提取共形数据。
AI.method: 1) 在(1+1)维CFT中引入q-Möbius空间共形变形，推导变形前后基态波函数重叠的精确公式，证明指数仅依赖于中心荷。2) 基于此提出一个仅需基态重叠的晶格估计量。3) 将该方法应用于临界量子链（如Ising模型、XXZ模型等）和二维Chern绝缘体的无能隙边缘模。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法提供了一种简单且稳健的中心荷探测方式。此外，变形后的基态在纠缠谱和纠缠熵中保持了普适的几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 波函数重叠为探测临界系统和拓扑边缘模中的共形数据提供了一条简洁有效的途径，具有普适性和鲁棒性。

title: Pre-failure response spectra predict finite-amplitude fragility
summary: Failure theories often identify a single leading route to failure: the most unstable mode, weakest link, minimum-action escape path, or optimal perturbation. Yet finite-amplitude susceptibility depends not only on the nearest route but on how much of perturbation space lies near dangerous directions. We cast this distinction as a fragility problem: for each perturbation direction, the failure distance is the smallest amplitude that crosses a prescribed boundary, and the fragility curve is the fraction of directions that fail below a given amplitude. Measuring this curve directly requires nonlinear trials over many directions; instead, we show that it is predicted, before any failure occurs, by the tail of a single pre-failure quantity: the boundary-normalized fragility gain computed from the linearized response. The breadth of the associated response spectrum sets how many near-dangerous pathways coexist beyond the strongest direction. We demonstrate the mechanism in a high-dimensional nonlinear non-normal network with the strongest directional gain held fixed: the system with broader response-channel breadth has a larger nonlinear fragility curve, isolating breadth from the worst direction. An independent scalar test in deterministic traffic breakdown confirms the predicted sign: response breadth lowers calibrated jam thresholds once the strongest response is matched, with residual margins screening but never reversing the effect. Response-spectrum breadth thus emerges as a pre-failure coordinate for finite-amplitude fragility beyond the strongest path.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"脆弱性曲线"概念，通过线性化响应谱的宽度预测非线性系统在有限扰动下的失效概率，解决了传统失效理论仅关注最危险路径的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统失效理论只关注单一最危险失效路径（如最不稳定模态、最薄弱环节等），但实际系统中有限幅值扰动下的失效敏感性不仅取决于最近路径，还取决于扰动空间中靠近危险方向的数量。作者试图将这一问题形式化为"脆弱性"问题，并找到一种无需大量非线性试验即可预测脆弱性曲线的方法。
AI.method: 1. 定义脆弱性曲线：每个扰动方向对应一个失效距离（最小幅值使系统越过边界），脆弱性曲线为给定幅值下失效方向的比例。2. 提出"边界归一化脆弱性增益"概念，该量来源于线性化响应，可在失效发生前计算。3. 通过响应谱的宽度（spectrum breadth）量化共存的近危险路径数量。4. 在高维非线性非正常网络中验证，固定最强方向增益，展示响应通道更宽的系统具有更大的非线性脆弱性曲线。5. 通过交通流崩溃的独立标量测试进一步验证。
AI.result: 响应谱宽度更大的系统，即使最强方向增益相同，其非线性脆弱性曲线也更大，即更多扰动方向在较低幅值下即可导致失效。在交通流崩溃测试中，响应宽度降低了下游拥堵阈值，且残差边际只会筛选但不会逆转该效应。
AI.conclusion: 响应谱宽度可作为失效前可测量的坐标，用于预测有限幅值下的脆弱性，超越了仅关注最危险路径的传统方法。

title: Individually tunable Si/SiGe quantum dot operating voltages via gate-biased illumination
summary: Semiconductor quantum dot qubits often require very different voltages on each gate to bring them to a correct operating point. Here, we present a method by which one can controllably and repeatably alter the nanoscale trapped charge distribution at an oxide-semiconductor interface. We demonstrate this method on a Si/SiGe quantum dot device, and we find that the operating voltages can be controlled and made much more uniform. The method relies on illumination with near-infrared light in the presence of applied gate voltages, and it enables the tuning of the device operating point on a gate-by-gate basis. We present an explanation of the underlying physics using self-consistent Schrödinger-Poisson simulations. As an application of this method, we tune a triple quantum dot to have uniform and small operating voltages in the (1,1,1) charge configuration. Importantly, we show that shifting the operating voltages in this way does not change the measured charge noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用近红外光照和栅极电压调控Si/SiGe量子点界面陷阱电荷分布的方法，可重复、可控地统一多量子点工作电压，且不影响电荷噪声性能。
AI.motivation: 半导体量子点量子比特中，每个栅极需要差异很大的电压才能达到正确工作点，这种不均匀性增加了控制复杂度，亟需一种能统一工作电压的方法。
AI.method: 在施加栅极电压的同时，用近红外光照射Si/SiGe量子点器件，通过光生载流子改变氧化物-半导体界面的纳米尺度陷阱电荷分布，从而逐栅极地调控工作点。
AI.result: 在Si/SiGe量子点器件上成功实现了工作电压的可控调节，使(1,1,1)电荷构型下的三量子点工作电压均匀且较小，且测量的电荷噪声未发生变化。
AI.conclusion: 该光辅助方法能有效统一量子点工作电压而不牺牲电荷噪声性能，为可扩展量子点量子比特的调谐提供了实用手段。

title: Synthesis of single-layered fluorographdiyne nanosheets via selective on-surface 2D covalent polymerization
summary: Two-dimensional conjugated polymers (2DCPs) are significant macromolecular materials with intriguing and tunable physicochemical properties that depend on their geometries. Graphdiyne and its derivatives are exemplary 2DCPs featuring sp-sp2 hybridized skeletons. However, achieving single-layered, large-domain/regular graphdiyne and its derivatives on surfaces remains a formidable challenge due to the lack of selective 2D covalent polymerization methods. Here, we report a selective on-surface 2D covalent polymerization method via the combination of cobalt catalysis and coronene templating, achieving the synthesis of single-layered fluorographdiyne nanosheets up to 60*60 nm2 on Au(111) surface. Using scanning probe techniques, we visualize the sequential polymerization process and characterize cobalt-activated coupling intermediates at the atomic level. Experimental and theoretical analyses suggest that strong d-π coupling between cobalt and alkynyl transforms a robust Csp-Au bond into a weaker Csp2-Au bond, thereby facilitating the demetallization C-C coupling. Besides, the templating effect of coronene suppresses kinetically trapped defects and improves the selectivity of hexagonal-ring formation in the complex 2D covalent polymerization process.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种结合钴催化与晕苯模板化的选择性表面二维共价聚合方法，成功在Au(111)表面合成了尺寸达60×60 nm²的单层氟化石墨炔纳米片，并通过扫描探针技术揭示了聚合过程及原子级反应中间体。
AI.motivation: 石墨炔及其衍生物作为二维共轭聚合物具有重要的物理化学性质，但缺乏选择性二维共价聚合方法导致难以制备大尺寸、规整的单层结构。
AI.method: 结合钴催化与晕苯模板化策略，在Au(111)表面实现选择性二维共价聚合；利用扫描探针技术可视化聚合过程并表征钴活化偶联中间体。
AI.result: 成功合成单层氟化石墨炔纳米片，尺寸达60×60 nm²；通过实验与理论分析揭示了钴与炔基的强d-π耦合作用将Csp-Au键转化为更弱的Csp2-Au键，促进去金属化C-C偶联；晕苯模板效应抑制动力学陷阱缺陷，提高六元环选择性。
AI.conclusion: 该选择性二维共价聚合方法为制备大尺寸、高质量石墨炔及其衍生物提供了有效策略。

title: Evolution of the intertwining correlated topological phases in iron-based superconductor Fe(Te,Se)
summary: Multiple topological electronic phases can coexist within a single quantum material and induce different topological superconducting states, offering deeper insights into interplay of topological superconducting states and Majorana modes, which may also be influenced and modified by correlation effect. Iron-based superconductors, with both topological states and correlation effect, is an ideal platform to study these phenomena. Here, with high resolution angle resolved photoelectron spectroscopy, we directly resolve two distinct intertwining topological states in iron-based superconductor Co-doped Fe(Te,Se), and study their evolution with electron doping. We identify a region where both topological insulator surface states and topological Dirac semimetal states intersect the Fermi level. The topological states are affected by the strong correlation effect and are isolated from trivial bulk states. The evolution between distinct topological phases offers a good opportunity to study various Majorana modes from different superconducting phases according to theoretical analysis. Our findings establish an ideal platform for exploring the interaction between multiple topological superconducting states and the related Majorana modes.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用高分辨角分辨光电子能谱，在铁基超导体Co掺杂Fe(Te,Se)中直接解析出两种不同的交织拓扑态（拓扑绝缘体表面态和拓扑狄拉克半金属态），并研究了它们随电子掺杂的演化。研究发现强关联效应影响这些拓扑态并与平庸体态隔离，不同拓扑相之间的演变为研究多种马约拉纳模提供了理想平台。
AI.motivation: 探索多种拓扑电子相在单个量子材料中共存及其对拓扑超导态和马约拉纳模的影响，特别是关联效应如何调控这些拓扑超导态。
AI.method: 采用高分辨角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）技术，对Co掺杂Fe(Te,Se)铁基超导体进行电子态的直接观测，研究拓扑态随电子掺杂的演化。
AI.result: 在费米能级处同时观测到拓扑绝缘体表面态和拓扑狄拉克半金属态两种不同的拓扑态，这些拓扑态受到强关联效应影响，且与平庸体态相隔离。
AI.conclusion: 该体系为研究多种拓扑超导态之间的相互作用及相关的马约拉纳模提供了理想平台，不同拓扑相之间的演变为探索不同超导相中的马约拉纳模创造了良好条件。

title: Control of protein activity by photoinduced spin polarized charge reorganization
summary: Considerable electric fields are present within living cells, and the role of bioelectricity has been well established at the organismal level. Yet little is known about electric-field effects on protein function. Here we use phototriggered charge injection from a site-specifically attached ruthenium photosensitizer to directly demonstrate the effects of charge redistribution within a protein. We find that binding of an antibody to phosphoglycerate kinase (PGK) is increased two folds under illumination. Remarkably, illumination is found to suppress the enzymatic activity of PGK by a factor as large as three. These responses are sensitive to the photosensitizer position on the protein. Surprisingly, left (but not right) circularly polarized light elicits these responses, indicating that the electrons involved in the observed dynamics are spin polarized, due to spin filtration by protein chiral structures. Our results directly establish the contribution of electrical polarization as an allosteric signal within proteins. Future experiments with phototriggered charge injection will allow delineation of charge rearrangement pathways within proteins and will further depict their effects on protein function.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过光触发电荷注入技术，证明了蛋白质内电荷重分布可直接影响其功能：抗体结合增强2倍，酶活性抑制达3倍，且这些效应具有手性选择性（仅左旋圆偏振光有效），揭示了电荷极化作为蛋白质别构信号的新机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管生物电在有机体水平已被充分认识，但电场对蛋白质功能的直接影响尚不明确，亟需在分子层面阐明电荷分布如何调控蛋白质行为。
AI.method: 将钌光敏剂定点连接到磷酸甘油酸激酶（PGK）上，通过光触发电荷注入诱导蛋白质内电荷重分布，并检测抗体结合能力、酶活性变化及对圆偏振光的响应差异。
AI.result: 光照下抗体结合增强2倍，酶活性被抑制最多3倍；这些效应依赖于光敏剂位置，且仅左旋圆偏振光有效，表明涉及自旋极化的电子传递。
AI.conclusion: 直接证明电荷极化可作为蛋白质内的别构信号，光触发电荷注入技术为解析电荷重排路径及其功能效应提供了新工具。

title: Differentiable Particle-Mesh Ewald with Cartesian Tensor Message Passing for Learning Long-Range Electrostatics and Dipole Response
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) can approach quantum accuracy for short-range chemistry, but most architectures remain local and fail to capture the long-range electrostatic and polarization interactions essential for ionic, polar, and interfacial systems. Recent Ewald-based MLIPs show that locally predicted electrostatic variables can recover important long-range physics, including multipolar response. However, many energy-based implementations still compute reciprocal-space terms by direct summation over k vectors, leaving a gap with production molecular dynamics, where particle-mesh Ewald (PME) with O(NlogN) scaling is standard. Here we introduce a fully differentiable PME framework for learned charges and learned atomic dipoles within an E(n)-equivariant Cartesian tensor message passing network. Charges are predicted from scalar local features, while dipoles are predicted from equivariant vector features and enter the same particle-mesh solver as an effective bound charge density. This dipolar density is constructed using analytic real-space gradients of Hockney-Eastwood spline assignment weights, enabling charge-dipole and dipole-dipole long-range forces to be trained end-to-end through FFT-space electrostatics without direct charge or dipole supervision. On a charged-dimer test case, the differentiable PME module reproduces explicit Ewald energies and forces to numerical precision when assignment-kernel deconvolution is enabled. On molten NaCl, the charge and dipole long-range channel gives the lowest force RMSE among the tested models, while all energy RMSE values remain in the sub-meV per atom regime. Timing tests show the expected crossover from explicit Ewald summation to particle-mesh scaling. These results establish differentiable dipole PME as a scalable route toward polarization-aware MLIPs for condensed-phase and interfacial systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完全可微分的粒子网格Ewald（PME）框架，将学习到的原子电荷和偶极子整合到E(n)-等变消息传递网络中，实现了高效的长程静电力建模，在熔融NaCl等体系上达到了高精度，并展示了O(NlogN)的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）虽能实现短程量子精度，但大多局限于局域架构，无法捕捉对离子、极性和界面系统至关重要的长程静电和极化相互作用。现有的Ewald基MLIPs通过局域预测静电变量恢复长程物理，但其能量实现仍使用直接k向量求和，缺乏生产级分子动力学中标准的O(NlogN)粒子网格Ewald（PME）方法。
AI.method: 提出一个完全可微分的PME框架：从标量局域特征预测原子电荷，从等变向量特征预测原子偶极子；偶极子通过解析的Hockney-Eastwood样条分配权重的实空间梯度构建有效束缚电荷密度，进入同一粒子网格求解器；通过快速傅里叶变换（FFT）空间静电学实现端到端训练，无需直接监督电荷或偶极子。
AI.result: 在带电二聚体测试中，可微分PME模块在启用分配核反卷积时，数值精度上复现了显式Ewald能量和力。在熔融NaCl上，电荷-偶极子长程通道在测试模型中实现了最低的力RMSE，所有能量RMSE均保持在亚meV/原子水平。计时测试显示从显式Ewald求和到粒子网格的预期交叉。
AI.conclusion: 可微分偶极子PME为凝聚相和界面系统的极化感知MLIPs提供了一条可扩展的路径。

title: Electron vs. hole doping in infinite-layer nickelates: electronic structure, magnetism and correlations
summary: The observation of superconductivity in undoped infinite-layer nickelates $R$NiO$_2$ ($R$ = rare earth) challenges our current understanding and calls for a re-examination of the underlying electronic structure of this family of materials. In this context, it is particularly important to extend the investigation of $R$NiO$_2$ compounds from the intensively studied hole-doped regime to the almost unexplored electron-doped one. Here, we use a combination of density-functional theory and dynamical mean-field theory to study the evolution of the electronic structure of infinite-layer nickelates in these two doping regimes. We find a striking asymmetry in the self-doping of the Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$ band due to the $R(5d)$ states: while this effect is strongly suppressed upon hole doping, electron doping instead leads to an increase in the size of the $R(5d)$ electron pockets, but without effectively hole-doping the Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$ band. This asymmetry has an important impact on the magnetic response as antiferromagnetism is rapidly suppressed upon hole doping, whereas it remains the ground state upon electron doping. Despite these differences, electronic correlations on both sides of the phase diagram are dominated by the Ni $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital, suggesting that a single-band description may be appropriate for infinite-layer nickelates in both the electron- and hole-doped regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT+DMFT方法研究了无限层镍酸盐$R$NiO$_2$在电子掺杂和空穴掺杂两种掺杂区域下的电子结构演化，发现Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$能带的自掺杂效应在空穴掺杂时被抑制，而电子掺杂时$R(5d)$电子口袋增大但并未有效对Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$能带进行空穴掺杂。这种不对称性导致反铁磁序在空穴掺杂时迅速被抑制，而在电子掺杂时仍保持基态。尽管如此，两个掺杂区域的电子关联均由Ni $d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道主导，表明单带描述可能适用于两种掺杂区域。
AI.motivation: 无限层镍酸盐$R$NiO$_2$中观察到的超导现象挑战了现有理解，需要重新审视其电子结构。目前对空穴掺杂区域研究较多，而电子掺杂区域几乎未被探索，因此需要系统研究两种掺杂区域下的电子结构演化。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）与动力学平均场理论（DMFT）相结合的方法，研究无限层镍酸盐在电子掺杂和空穴掺杂两种区域下的电子结构演化。
AI.result: 发现Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$能带的自掺杂效应存在显著不对称性：空穴掺杂时该效应被强烈抑制，电子掺杂时$R(5d)$电子口袋增大但未有效空穴掺杂Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$能带。反铁磁序在空穴掺杂时迅速被抑制，而在电子掺杂时仍保持为基态。两个掺杂区域的电子关联均由Ni $d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道主导。
AI.conclusion: 尽管电子掺杂和空穴掺杂区域存在显著的不对称性，但两个区域的电子关联均由Ni $d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道主导，表明单带描述可能适用于无限层镍酸盐的两种掺杂区域。

title: High Resolution Study of the 2D ANNNI Model Using a Two-replica Cluster Algorithm and Population Annealing
summary: The axial next-nearest-neighbor Ising (ANNNI) model in two dimensions is studied using population annealing combined with a two-replica cluster algorithm. We are able to fully resolve the sequence of sharp specific heat peaks that characterize the finite-size incommensurate floating phase. We also show that the two-replica cluster algorithm is much more effective in equilibrating the system than either single-replica cluster methods or the Metropolis algorithm when these are combined with population annealing. We argue that effectiveness of the new algorithm is due to its ability to move groups of defect lines between replicas combined with resampling in population annealing, which removes replicas from the population that have larger numbers of defect lines.

AI.tldr: 本文使用群体退火结合双副本簇算法研究二维ANNNI模型，成功解析了非公度浮动相中尖锐比热峰的有限尺寸序列，并证明该算法在平衡系统方面优于单副本簇方法或Metropolis算法，其有效性源于能移动缺陷线组并结合重采样去除缺陷较多的副本。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（单副本簇算法或Metropolis算法）在平衡二维ANNNI模型时效率不足，难以解析非公度浮动相中尖锐的比热峰序列，因此需要开发更有效的算法。
AI.method: 采用群体退火（Population Annealing）结合双副本簇算法（Two-Replica Cluster Algorithm），通过移动缺陷线组并在群体退火中重采样，淘汰缺陷较多的副本。
AI.result: 成功完全解析了二维ANNNI模型有限尺寸非公度浮动相中尖锐比热峰的序列；双副本簇算法在平衡系统方面显著优于单副本簇方法和Metropolis算法。
AI.conclusion: 双副本簇算法与群体退火的结合是研究复杂自旋系统的有效工具，其核心优势在于能高效处理缺陷线结构。

title: The Uhlmann phase of Higher-Order Topological Insulators at Finite Temperature
summary: We have studied the finite-temperature topology of higher-order topological insulators (HOTIs) based on the Uhlmann phase, which is a phase angle of the Uhlmann overlap. As an example of HOTIs, the Hamiltonian of the Benalcazar-Bernevig-Hughes (BBH) model is constructed from Gamma matrices satisfying the Clifford algebra. This specific algebraic structure underpins the model's higher-order topological properties, including the quantization of the Uhlmann phase to $0$ or $π$. This quantization enables us to treat the abrupt jumps of the Uhlmann phase as an indication of the nontrivial topological phase of the BBH model at finite temperature. From the disappearance of these jumps, we determine the critical temperature at which the topological transition occurs. For a special choice of parameters, the Uhlmann overlap and the critical temperature can be computed analytically.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Uhlmann相位研究了高阶拓扑绝缘体(HOTIs)的有限温度拓扑性质。以BBH模型为例，利用Uhlmann相位的量子化(0或π)来表征非平凡拓扑相，并通过其跳变消失确定拓扑转变的临界温度。
AI.motivation: 将拓扑序的研究从零温推广到有限温度场景，探索高阶拓扑绝缘体在有限温度下的拓扑性质及其相变行为。
AI.method: 基于Uhlmann相位（Uhlmann重叠的相位角）构建理论框架；以BBH模型为例，利用Gamma矩阵构造哈密顿量；通过Uhlmann相位的量子化跳变判断拓扑相变，并在特定参数下进行解析计算。
AI.result: Uhlmann相位在BBH模型中量子化为0或π；该量子化跳变可作为有限温度下非平凡拓扑相的指示；确定了拓扑转变发生的临界温度；在特定参数下可解析计算Uhlmann重叠和临界温度。
AI.conclusion: Uhlmann相位是研究高阶拓扑绝缘体有限温度拓扑性质的有效工具，可通过其跳变消失来判定拓扑相变的临界温度。

title: Giant Thermal-Conductivity Enhancement from Pseudo-Angular Momentum Conservation
summary: Pseudo-angular momentum (PAM) underlies optical selection rules for chiral phonons, but whether it also constrains thermally populated finite-q phonon-phonon scattering has remained unresolved. We show that rotational or screw eigenphase conservation imposes a PAM residue rule on cubic anharmonic vertices, revealing a hidden selection rule for heat transport. In screw-symmetric helical Te, an exact platform, implementing this rule as a projector in first-principles Boltzmann transport leaves spectra and force constants unchanged but removes roughly two thirds of kinematically allowed triplets, suppresses resistive Umklapp relaxation, and enhances lattice thermal conductivity by a factor of 5.30 at 300 K, remaining above fivefold up to 400 K. A bulk chiral-crystal benchmark further shows that explicit eigenphase organization can increase the calculated lattice thermal conductivity by about 24%, comparable to the reported first-principles underestimation of experiment. These results establish PAM conservation as an anharmonic selection principle for chiral-phonon heat transport and identify symmetry-resolved PAM conservation as a route to predicting and controlling thermal conductivity in chiral crystals and nanoscale phononics.

AI.tldr: 本文发现赝角动量（PAM）守恒定律约束手性声子的非谐散射，通过将PAM残差规则引入玻尔兹曼输运方程，在螺旋碲中移除约三分之二的运动学允许三声子过程，使300K时热导率提升5.30倍，揭示了手性晶体热输运的隐藏选择定则。
AI.motivation: PAM已知约束手性声子的光学选择定则，但其是否约束有限波矢热声子-声子散射尚未解决。作者旨在探究PAM是否影响手性晶格热输运。
AI.method: 推导出旋转/螺旋本征相位守恒对三次非谐顶点施加PAM残差规则；将此规则作为投影算子引入第一性原理玻尔兹曼输运方程，应用于螺旋对称的碲（Te）晶体；在体手性晶体基准验证。
AI.result: 在螺旋碲中，PAM规则移除约2/3的运动学允许三声子散射通道，抑制电阻性Umklapp弛豫，300K时热导率提升5.30倍，400K仍保持5倍以上；体手性晶体基准显示热导率提升约24%，与第一性原理计算对实验的低估幅度相当。
AI.conclusion: 证实PAM守恒是手性声子热输运的非谐选择原理；提出对称性分辨的PAM守恒可作为预测和调控手性晶体及纳米声子学热导率的途径。

title: Phonon-driven nodal surface superconductivity of Fermi arcs
summary: According to recent observations, the topological surface states of Weyl semimetals may develop a superconducting gap, while bulk superconductivity remains absent. What drives the formation of this novel superconducting state is an open question. Here, we show that this phenomenon can arise from the interaction of Fermi arc electrons with both surface and bulk phonons in time-reversal-invariant Weyl semimetals. We identify two competing pairing channels, intra-arc and inter-arc, whose relative strength is governed by the efficiency of Coulomb screening at the surface. The combined effect of the Fermi arcs being disconnected and the weak screening of the Coulomb repulsion at the system's surface causes nodes to appear in the superconducting gap, as observed recently by photoelectron spectroscopy experiments on PtBi2. This suggests manipulation of the Coulomb screening, e.g. by a surface layer coating, as a pathway to engineer the critical temperature, as well as size and symmetry of the surface superconducting gap.

AI.tldr: 研究发现时间反演对称Weyl半金属中，费米弧电子与表面及体声子的相互作用可导致表面超导，并解释了PtBi₂中观测到的超导能隙节点现象，提出通过调控库仑屏蔽来工程化表面超导性质。
AI.motivation: 解释Weyl半金属中拓扑表面态出现超导能隙而体态超导缺失的物理机制，这是一个尚未解决的关键问题。
AI.method: 分析了费米弧电子与表面和体声子的相互作用，识别了弧内和弧间两种配对通道，并考虑了库仑屏蔽效率的影响。
AI.result: 发现了表面超导能隙中出现节点的机制：费米弧的不连通性加上表面弱库仑屏蔽导致节点出现，与PtBi₂的光电子能谱实验一致。
AI.conclusion: 可通过调控表面库仑屏蔽（如表面涂层）来工程化表面超导的临界温度、能隙大小和对称性。

title: Excitonic and Charge-Transfer Contributions to Molecular Dimer Absorption: A Decomposition Approach Applied to a BPEA Dimer
summary: Electronic absorption spectra of multichromophoric systems are often governed by complex excited-state structures arising from excitonic and charge-transfer (CT) interactions between chromophores, while direct identification of the underlying electronic transitions is frequently hindered by strong vibronic and solvent-induced broadening. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for the analysis and decomposition of absorption spectra of molecular dimers with coupled Frenkel exciton (FE) and charge-transfer states, including solvent-induced stabilization of zwitterionic configurations within a unified adiabatic-state formalism. The analysis reveals that exciton-CT mixing strongly reorganizes the electronic absorption profile and produces pronounced spectral broadening, while leaving the first spectral moment essentially unaffected. Numerical calculations show that the dominant mechanism of CT-induced broadening originates primarily from additional energetic splitting between spectral components rather than from broadening of the individual bands themselves. The electronic model is further extended to include coupling to high-frequency intramolecular vibrations and low-frequency environmental degrees of freedom, providing a practical framework for interpretation of realistic experimental spectra. The developed formalism is applied to the absorption spectrum of a covalently linked 9,10-bis(phenylethynyl)anthracene dimer in dichloromethane, where spectral decomposition reveals a predominantly excitonic low-energy doublet and higher-energy states with substantial CT character. The proposed approach offers a physically transparent framework for the analysis of complex absorption spectra in molecular aggregates and organic electronic materials with coupled excitonic and CT states.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个理论框架，用于分析具有耦合Frenkel激子（FE）和电荷转移（CT）态分子二聚体的吸收光谱，揭示了激子-CT混合对光谱的复杂影响，并成功应用于共价连接的BPEA二聚体吸收谱的分解。
AI.motivation: 多色团体系的电子吸收光谱常因激子与电荷转移态之间的复杂耦合以及振动/溶剂展宽而难以直接解析，需要发展系统的理论框架来分解和识别其中的电子跃迁机制。
AI.method: 在绝热态形式主义下统一处理FE和CT态，包含溶剂诱导的两性离子稳定化；进一步扩展模型以耦合高频分子内振动和低频环境自由度，实现对实验光谱的解析。
AI.result: 激子-CT混合会强烈重组电子吸收轮廓并产生显著光谱展宽，但一阶谱矩基本不受影响；CT诱导展宽主要源于光谱组分间的额外能量分裂，而非单个谱带的自身展宽。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分子聚集体和有机电子材料中具有耦合激子-CT态的复杂吸收光谱分析提供了物理透明的理论框架，BPEA二聚体的应用验证了其实际可行性。

title: Sequential Subspace Mode Adaptation for the Reduced-Order Homogenization of Dissipative Microstructures using E3C Hyper-Reduction
summary: Three-dimensional inelastic computational homogenization of complex engineering components requires a multitude of nonlinear microstructural simulations, making it computationally expensive. This work investigates a projection-based model order reduction (pMOR) method with 'Sequential Subspace Mode Adaptation', which can be easily integrated into existing codes using linear subspaces. Starting with a 'conventional' linear subspace strain approximation, the dynamic online construction of a second -- lower dimensional -- affine subspace embedded in the linear subspace determined offline leads to a further reduction of the dimensionality. A second novelty is the outline of the E3C hyper-reduction method for non-crystalline dissipative materials with internal variables, introducing a viscous regularization of non-differentiable stress-strain relations. In addition, a theoretical discussion is provided, illustrating that the E3C method aims at satisfaction of a projected and hyper-reduced variant of the classical Hill-Mandel macro-homogeneity condition. The latter theoretically implies equivalence with the high-dimensional model and satisfaction of both the hyper-reduced weak equilibrium and compatibility conditions. The influence of training batch size, material nonlinearity, and microstructure on the performance are evaluated through parameter studies. Three-dimensional elastoplastic two-scale simulations with hundreds of thousands of macroscopic degrees of freedom illustrate the efficiency and accuracy, with computational times approaching those of single scale simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对三维非弹性计算均质化计算成本高的问题，提出了一种基于投影的模型降阶方法（pMOR），结合“序贯子空间模式自适应”和E3C超降阶方法，通过双重子空间降维和粘性正则化技术，显著提升了多尺度模拟的计算效率，使计算时间接近单尺度模拟水平。
AI.motivation: 三维非弹性计算均质化需要大量非线性微观结构模拟，计算成本极高，亟需高效的降阶方法以降低计算负担。
AI.method: 提出pMOR方法，包含两项创新：(1) “序贯子空间模式自适应”——在线动态构建嵌入离线线性子空间的低维仿射子空间，进一步降维；(2) E3C超降阶方法——针对含内部变量的非晶态耗散材料，引入粘性正则化处理非光滑应力-应变关系，并满足投影超降阶的Hill-Mandel宏观均匀性条件。
AI.result: 通过参数研究评估了训练批次大小、材料非线性和微观结构的影响；三维弹塑性两尺度模拟（数十万宏观自由度）表明，该方法在保持精度的同时，计算时间接近单尺度模拟。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的pMOR与E3C超降阶方法能有效加速三维非弹性计算均质化，理论上保证了与高维模型的等价性，实际计算效率接近单尺度模拟，具有工程应用潜力。

title: Imaging the Magnetically Driven Reconstruction of the Electronic States in the Antiferromagnetic Topological Insulator EuSn$_2$As$_2$
summary: The realization of the axion insulator phase in magnetic topological insulators is often hindered by crystalline symmetries that protect gapless surface states, even when time-reversal symmetry is broken. Here, we use variable-temperature scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) and spectroscopy (STS), complemented with density functional theory (DFT), to investigate the local electronic structure of the antiferromagnetic (AFM) topological insulator EuSn$_2$As$_2$ across its Néel transition at $T_N = 24$ K. On the (001) surface, we observe a substantial density of intrinsic Sn vacancies that introduce nanoscale electronic inhomogeneity and p-type doping. Upon cooling below $T_N$, we resolve the emergence of two distinct magnetically driven gaps: a $\sim$100 meV gap near the Fermi level and a $\sim$50 meV gap at the ARPES-resolved Dirac point. We attribute the former gap to AFM Brillouin-zone folding and hybridization. The characteristics of the 50 meV gap point toward the lifting of mirror-symmetry protection by Sn vacancies and the consequent mass gapping of the Dirac point, although contributions from AFM-induced folding hybridization cannot be entirely ruled out. Our findings provide real-space evidence for strong coupling between localized moments and itinerant topological states, highlighting exfoliable EuSn$_2$As$_2$ as a potential candidate for realizing axion-insulator-based devices.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用变温扫描隧道显微镜/光谱学（STM/STS）结合第一性原理计算，系统研究了反铁磁拓扑绝缘体EuSn₂As₂在尼尔温度（TN=24 K）附近的局域电子结构。实验发现(001)表面存在大量本征Sn空位，导致纳米级电子不均匀性和p型掺杂。冷却至TN以下后，观测到两个磁致能隙：费米能级附近约100 meV的能隙（来源于反铁磁布里渊区折叠与杂化），以及狄拉克点处约50 meV的能隙（主要由Sn空位破坏镜面对称性导致狄拉克点质量打开）。该工作为局域磁矩与拓扑态之间的强耦合提供了实空间证据，指出EuSn₂As₂是实现轴子绝缘体器件的潜在候选材料。
AI.motivation: 轴子绝缘体相在磁性拓扑绝缘体中的实现常受到晶格对称性的阻碍，即使时间反演对称性被破坏也是如此。本文旨在探究反铁磁拓扑绝缘体EuSn₂As₂中局域电子结构如何随磁相变演化，并揭示磁有序与拓扑表面态相互作用的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用变温扫描隧道显微镜（STM）和扫描隧道谱（STS）对EuSn₂As₂(001)表面进行实空间电子结构表征，并结合密度泛函理论（DFT）计算进行理论佐证。通过跨尼尔温度（TN=24 K）的变温测量，对比顺磁态和反铁磁态的电子结构变化。
AI.result: （1）表面存在大量本征Sn空位缺陷，引入纳米级电子不均匀性和p型掺杂；（2）冷却至TN以下，观测到两个磁致能隙：费米能级附近~100 meV的能隙（源于AFM布里渊区折叠和杂化）和狄拉克点处~50 meV的能隙；（3）50 meV能隙的特征指向Sn空位破坏镜面对称性保护导致狄拉克点质量打开，但AFM折叠杂化机制也不能完全排除。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了局域磁矩与拓扑态强耦合的实空间证据；EuSn₂As₂作为可剥离的层状材料，是实现轴子绝缘体器件的潜在候选体系。

title: Tandem Exclusion Process
summary: We introduce the \emph{tandem exclusion process} (TEP), a one-dimensional stochastic lattice model motivated by tandem running in ants. Particles evolve through two cooperative local transitions, $110\to101$ at rate $α$ (leader advancement) and $101\to011$ at rate $β$ (follower recovery). We prove that the stationary measure on the dynamically active sector is the Gibbs measure $π\propto q^{H(η)}$, where $q=β/α$ and $H(η)$ counts neighboring occupied pairs, and derive exact closed-form expressions for the stationary current and spatial correlations using transfer-matrix methods. The current is asymmetric under particle--hole exchange $ρ\mapsto1-ρ$, with its maximum occurring at densities strictly larger than $1/2$, in contrast to the symmetric current $ρ(1-ρ)$ of the totally asymmetric simple exclusion process (TASEP). For $q>1$, cooperative dynamics enhances the current above the TASEP value and generates strong spatial clustering; in the limit $q\to\infty$, the current approaches $J\toαρ$, corresponding to nearly unconstrained collective transport. These results suggest that tandem coordination alone can substantially enhance collective transport efficiency at moderate and high densities, even without pheromone-mediated long-range communication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一维随机晶格模型——串联排他过程（TEP），模拟蚂蚁串联行进行为。粒子通过两种合作局部跃迁演化（领导者前进速率α，跟随者恢复速率β），证明了活动区间的平稳测度为吉布斯测度π∝q^{H(η)}，其中q=β/α。通过转移矩阵方法得到了平稳流和空间关联的精确闭式解。与TASEP的对称流ρ(1-ρ)不同，TEP的流在粒子-空穴交换下不对称，最大流出现在密度严格大于1/2处。当q>1时，合作动力学增强流并产生强空间聚集；q→∞时，流趋近J→αρ，对应几乎无约束的集体输运。结果表明串联协调本身即可在中高密度下显著增强集体输运效率。
AI.motivation: 受蚂蚁串联行进行为启发，探讨在没有信息素介导的长程通信条件下，局部串联协调机制如何影响集体输运效率。
AI.method: 建立TEP晶格模型，定义两类合作跃迁（110→101和101→011），利用转移矩阵方法推导平稳测度、流和空间关联的精确表达式。
AI.result: 平稳流在粒子-空穴交换下不对称，最大流密度>1/2；q>1时流超过TASEP且出现强空间聚集；q→∞时流趋近J→αρ。
AI.conclusion: 串联协调本身即可在中高密度下显著增强集体输运效率，无需依赖信息素介导的长程通信。

title: Noncollinear spin textures and 90° domain walls in twisted XY magnets
summary: Twisted moiré magnets are promising in exploring noncollinear magnetic phases, yet current experimental studies have been restricted to uniaxial magnets, limiting the accessible phase space. Here, we demonstrate noncollinear moiré magnetism based on XY magnet CrCl3. The tunneling magnetoconductance of twisted CrCl3 exhibits multiple field-driven transitions in small-twist-angle devices, attributed to the coexisting antiferromagnetic and ferromagnetic domains with distinct susceptibilities. The inferred spin configuration depends on the layer number, reflecting the interlayer coupling strength between twisted layers. This moiré magnetism is remarkably robust, persisting up to twisted double nine-layer stacks. Combined with micromagnetic simulations, we identify the ground state as the predicted "twisted-s" phase featuring 90° domain walls. Finally, we demonstrate voltage control of these noncollinear phases, highlighting the electrically tunable twist-spintronics.

AI.tldr: 本文基于XY磁体CrCl3实现了扭曲莫尔磁体中的非共线磁性，观察到小角度扭曲器件中的多场驱动转变，证实了“扭曲-s”相（90°畴壁）的基态，并展示了电压调控能力，为电可调扭曲自旋电子学提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 现有扭曲莫尔磁体的实验研究局限于单轴磁体，限制了可探索的相空间，亟需在更广泛的磁体类型中实现非共线莫尔磁性。
AI.method: 基于XY磁体CrCl3构造扭曲双层器件，通过隧穿磁导测量研究小扭曲角下的磁场驱动转变，结合微磁模拟识别基态自旋构型，并施加电压实现非共线相的电调控。
AI.result: 扭曲CrCl3在小角度下表现出多场驱动转变，归因于反铁磁和铁磁畴共存；基态为“扭曲-s”相（90°畴壁）；该莫尔磁性在扭曲双九层堆叠中仍保持稳健；实现了电压控制非共线相。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将扭曲莫尔磁性拓展至XY磁体，揭示了层数依赖的自旋构型与电可调性，为扭曲自旋电子学的器件应用奠定了基础。

title: Impact of Disorder Dynamics and Multi-Domain Kinetics on the Sliding Ferroelectricity of CVD-Grown 3R-WSe2 Bilayers
summary: Sliding ferroelectricity in van der Waals (vdW) layered systems has emerged as a promising route toward non-volatile nanoscale devices, where interlayer displacement in non-centrosymmetric bilayers generates an out-of-plane polarization. In particular, 3R-stacked bilayer transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) grown via chemical vapor deposition (CVD) have been shown to host such polarization due to broken inversion symmetry. However, a detailed investigation of the 2D ferroelectric (FE) properties of CVD-grown 2D films, particularly the role of intrinsic disorder, such as structural defects and domain structure, remains poorly understood. Here, we investigate the FE switching characteristics of CVD-grown 3R-stacked WSe2 using a graphene-based ferroelectric field-effect transistor (graphene-FE-FET) architecture, where graphene serves as a highly sensitive probe of induced charge modulation due to polarization switching of FEs. We show that the growth-induced structural disorder significantly impacts polarization switching, while multi-domain kinetics governs the evolution of the FE response. These findings provide important insights into the design and optimization of FE devices based on vdW materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用石墨烯-FE-FET器件研究了CVD生长的3R堆叠WSe₂中滑移铁电的开关特性，发现生长引入的结构无序显著影响极化翻转，多畴动力学主导了铁电响应演化。
AI.motivation: CVD生长的3R堆叠TMDs已被证明具有滑移铁电性，但关于其铁电开关特性，尤其是结构缺陷和畴结构等本征无序的影响，目前尚缺乏深入研究。
AI.method: 采用石墨烯基铁电场效应晶体管（graphene-FE-FET）结构，利用石墨烯的高灵敏度探测由铁电极化开关引起的电荷调制，研究CVD生长的3R堆叠WSe₂的铁电开关特性。
AI.result: 生长诱导的结构无序显著影响了极化翻转行为，而多畴动力学则主导了铁电响应的演化过程。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为基于vdW材料的铁电器件的设计与优化提供了重要指导。

title: DPA4: Pushing the Accuracy-Cost Frontier of Interatomic Potentials with EMFA SO(2) Convolution
summary: Machine-learning interatomic potentials now approach quantum-mechanical accuracy on standard benchmarks, but the training cost of the most expressive equivariant architectures has become a serious bottleneck. We introduce DPA4, an SE(3)-equivariant interatomic-potential architecture with an EMFA (Edge-conditioned, Multi-Focus, Attention) SO(2)-equivariant convolution that combines a low-rank edge-node SO(2)-equivariant product, a multi-focus design for message nonlinearity, and envelope-gated attention for message aggregation. A Lebedev-grid projection further preserves SO(3)-equivariance in the nonlinearity to machine precision. A compiler-friendly conservative energy-gradient training path provides up to $\sim$3 times wall-clock speedup under torch.compile. On the compliant Matbench Discovery benchmark, DPA4-Pro attains the best Combined Performance Score (CPS) on the leaderboard, while the 2.76M-parameter DPA4-Air exceeds the accuracy of the 30.1M-parameter eSEN-30M-MP baseline with 10.9$\times$ fewer parameters and 42.9$\times$ less training compute. On SPICE-MACE-OFF, the 5.4M-parameter DPA4-Plus lowers the aggregate molecular energy and force errors of the 6.5M-parameter eSEN baseline by 29% and 30%, while the 2.7M-parameter DPA4-Air still surpasses that baseline with $\sim$2.4$\times$ fewer parameters. Together these results place DPA4 on a new accuracy-cost Pareto frontier on Matbench Discovery and position it as a strong candidate backbone for future multi-task large atomistic model (LAM) pretraining.

AI.tldr: DPA4是一种SE(3)-等变原子间势架构，通过EMFA SO(2)-等变卷积、Lebedev网格投影和编译器友好的能量梯度训练路径，在Matbench Discovery基准上取得最优性能，以更少参数和计算成本超越大模型基线，处于新的精度-成本帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 现有的高表达力等变架构（如eSEN）训练成本极高，成为实际应用中的严重瓶颈。本文旨在设计一种在保持量子力学级别精度的同时，大幅降低训练成本和参数量的新架构。
AI.method: 提出EMFA (Edge-conditioned, Multi-Focus, Attention) SO(2)-等变卷积，包含低秩边-节点SO(2)-等变乘积、多焦点消息非线性设计和包络门控注意力消息聚合；使用Lebedev网格投影在非线性操作中保持机器精度的SO(3)-等变性；采用编译器友好的保守能量梯度训练路径实现torch.compile下约3倍加速。
AI.result: DPA4-Pro在Matbench Discovery上取得最佳综合性能得分(CPS)；DPA4-Air（2.76M参数）以10.9倍更少参数和42.9倍更少训练计算量超越eSEN-30M-MP基线；DPA4-Plus（5.4M参数）在SPICE-MACE-OFF上将eSEN的能量和力误差分别降低29%和30%。
AI.conclusion: DPA4在Matbench Discovery上建立了新的精度-成本帕累托前沿，为未来多任务大型原子模型(LAM)预训练提供了强有力的候选骨干架构。

title: Microscopic origin of polytype-dependent melting in SiC revealed by machine-learning molecular dynamics
summary: Predicting how crystal structure influences high-temperature stability remains a key challenge in materials modelling and design. Silicon carbide (SiC), one of the most thermally and chemically stable materials known, provides an ideal system for studying this problem because its many polytypes preserve similar local tetrahedral bonding while differing in long-range stacking geometry. Here, we combine phase-coexistence machine-learning molecular dynamics with finite-temperature phonon analysis, enabled by a fine-tuned MACE interatomic potential that accurately describes crystalline, high-temperature, and disordered configurations across multiple SiC polytypes. We identify a clear relative stability ordering, 3C > 2H > 9R, reflected consistently in structural disordering, interlayer sliding, and finite-temperature phonon spectra. Across all polytypes, melting initiates through the formation of short C-C contacts and carbon-rich local regions, followed by a progressive loss of tetrahedral Si-C connectivity. The reduced stability of the long-period 9R polytype is traced to low-frequency transverse-acoustic shear modes associated with relative bilayer sliding, which are already present in the 0 K phonon spectra and soften further at high temperature. These modes generate larger lateral bilayer displacements, linking enhanced interlayer sliding to local chemical disordering and ultimately melting. More broadly, our results show that high-temperature stability in polytypic covalent materials is governed not only by local bond strength, but also by stacking-dependent transverse dynamics.

AI.tldr: 通过结合相共存机器学习分子动力学和有限温度声子分析，研究SiC多型体的高温稳定性，发现稳定性顺序为3C > 2H > 9R，并提出层间滑动和横向声子软化是导致稳定性差异的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 晶体结构如何影响高温稳定性是材料建模与设计中的核心挑战，SiC多型体因局部键合相似而长程堆叠不同的特性，为研究该问题提供了理想体系。
AI.method: 采用微调后的MACE原子间势，结合相共存机器学习分子动力学与有限温度声子分析，研究多种SiC多型体在晶体、高温及无序构型下的行为。
AI.result: 明确了3C > 2H > 9R的稳定性排序；所有多型体的熔化均始于C-C短接触和富碳区域的形成，随后逐步丧失四面体Si-C连接；9R的不稳定性源于零温下已存在的低频横向声学剪切模式在高温下进一步软化。
AI.conclusion: 多型共价材料的高温稳定性不仅取决于局部键强度，还受堆叠依赖的横向动力学控制，层间滑动和声子软化是关键因素。

title: Magnetic self-frustration from spontaneous structural distortion
summary: In frustrated magnetism, lattice distortions mediated by magnetoelastic coupling are commonly invoked as an escape route from extensive degeneracy toward an ordered ground state and, in some cases, the onset of multiferroicity. Here we present a minimal classical model that illustrates the converse phenomenon, which we term ``magnetic self-frustration''. Monte Carlo simulations reveal that a kagomé lattice with trivial magnetic interactions -- namely, nearest-neighbor Ising ferromagnetism -- undergoes a magnetostructural transition into a breathing-like phase, characterized by irregular bond dimerization along the three kagomé directions. Structurally, the equilateral triangles belonging to one of the two kagomé sublattices spontaneously distort, expanding into isosceles triangles. An analysis to first order in the magnetoelastic coupling constant $α$ shows that the shape of these triangles is remarkably robust. Acting like rigid building blocks in a puzzle, their vertices determine the geometry of the second sublattice, giving rise to contracted ferromagnetic triangles with a variety of shapes. The magnetic sector can be mapped onto an effective antiferromagnetic triangular lattice, which remains disordered down to low temperatures and retains a finite residual entropy of one third of that of Wannier. This self-frustrated phase takes place at intermediate values of $α$, separating the conventional undistorted ferromagnetic phase at weak coupling from a strongly coupled ordered phase characterized by a regular dimerized up-up-down-down antiferromagnetic pattern along the three kagomé directions, built from ferromagnetic triangles and hexagons.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了一种称为"磁自阻挫"的反直觉现象：在仅具有最近邻铁磁相互作用的kagomé格点上，磁弹耦合导致晶格畸变，反而使系统进入阻挫态，保留了Wannier熵三分之一的有残余熵，而非走向有序化。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为磁弹耦合导致的晶格畸变是摆脱阻挫、走向有序的逃生机制。作者想展示相反的情况——磁弹耦合反而制造出阻挫，即"磁自阻挫"。
AI.method: 构建了具有最近邻Ising铁磁相互作用和磁弹耦合的经典kagomé格点模型，通过蒙特卡洛模拟和磁弹耦合常数α的一阶解析分析研究相行为。
AI.result: 1) 中间α值下出现"自阻挫相"：晶格畸变为呼吸状，一个子格的等边三角形膨胀为不等边三角形，另一个子格的铁磁三角形收缩为各种形状；磁扇区映射为有效反铁磁三角晶格，保持无序并保留Wannier熵三分之一的残余熵。2) 弱耦合时为常规铁磁相，强耦合时为规则二聚化的up-up-down-down反铁磁有序相。
AI.conclusion: 磁弹耦合可以在简单铁磁系统中诱导出阻挫行为，拓展了对磁弹耦合作用的理解，为探索新型阻挫磁体和多铁材料提供了新视角。

title: Significance of time-convolutionless mode-coupling theory in capturing the dynamics of glass-forming liquids
summary: This paper demonstrates the significance of the recently proposed time-convolutionless mode-coupling theory (TMCT) in capturing the dynamics of glass-forming liquids. The origin of the primary differences between ideal MCT and TMCT is comprehensively explored from a unified perspective. First, we review two distinct projection operator methods in the Heisenberg picture: the time-convolution (TC) formulation proposed by Mori and the time-convolutionless (TCL) formulation proposed by Tokuyama and Mori. We show that the appropriate choice between these frameworks fundamentally depends on the space-time scales of the relevant variables. In TMCT, the TC formulation is applied to the current density, whereas the TCL formulation is applied to the number density because the latter operates on a significantly longer space-time scale. In contrast, ideal MCT applies the TC formulation to both densities. Consequently, the governing equation in TMCT is timeconvolutionless, whereas the ideal MCT equation features a time-convolution form. This fundamental difference significantly affects various physical quantities near the glass transition. Finally, the full TMCT equation is transformed into a simplified recursion equation to facilitate numerical analysis, and the key predictions of TMCT are compared with those of ideal MCT

AI.tldr: 本文论证了时间无卷积模式耦合理论（TMCT）在描述玻璃形成液体动力学中的重要性，通过统一视角深入探讨了理想MCT与TMCT之间的根本差异，发现两者对电流密度和数密度采用不同投影算子方法（TC vs TCL）是导致差异的关键原因。
AI.motivation: 揭示理想MCT与TMCT之间差异的起源，从统一视角理解两种理论的本质区别，从而更准确地捕捉玻璃形成液体的动力学行为。
AI.method: 在Heisenberg图像中回顾了两种投影算子方法：Mori提出的时间卷积（TC）公式和Tokuyama-Mori提出的时间无卷积（TCL）公式。TMCT对电流密度使用TC公式，对数密度使用TCL公式；而理想MCT对两者均使用TC公式。最终将TMCT方程简化为递归方程以便数值分析。
AI.result: TMCT和理想MCT之间存在根本性差异：TMCT的控制方程是无时间卷积形式，而理想MCT是时间卷积形式。这种差异源于两者对电流密度和数密度选择了不同的投影算子框架，而框架的选择取决于相关变量的时空尺度。
AI.conclusion: 投影算子框架的选择必须基于变量的时空尺度，TMCT通过差异化处理两种密度，展现了与理想MCT不同的物理预测，尤其影响了玻璃转变附近的各种物理量，表明TMCT在捕捉玻璃形成液体动力学方面具有显著优势。

title: Non-Hermiticity-induced chirality imbalance of Weyl Landau levels
summary: Weyl semimetals obey a global chirality constraint: the net chiral topological charge and any associated chiral spectral flow must vanish, as required by the Nielsen-Ninomiya theorem. Under magnetic fields, this constraint manifests through counter-propagating zeroth Landau levels associated with Weyl nodes of opposite chirality. Here, we experimentally demonstrate how non-Hermiticity can reshape this balance in a synthetic photonic Weyl semimetal. Using engineered gauge fields in one-dimensional multilayer structures, we realize both homogeneous and axial magnetic fields and directly probe the resulting Landau-level spectra. While a homogeneous field produces the expected chirality-balanced zeroth Landau levels, an axial field spatially separates the compensating chiral channels: co-propagating bulk pseudo-Landau levels carry one chirality, whereas the opposite chirality resides in boundary-localized surface states. We show that radiative boundary loss selectively suppresses these surface states, removing them from the long-lived observable spectrum and producing an experimentally accessible chirality imbalance. By reducing boundary loss, we recover the hidden chiral channel and reveal its surface-state origin. These results show that non-Hermiticity, present naturally in photonics, can control and relax fundamental chirality constraints in topological systems, enabling access to otherwise forbidden spectral responses.

AI.tldr: 本文通过人工光子外尔半金属实验，展示了非厄米性如何重塑拓扑系统中的手性约束：在轴向磁场下，辐射边界损耗选择性抑制表面态，从而产生可观测的手性不平衡，打破了尼尔森-二宫定理的严格限制。
AI.motivation: 传统外尔半金属受尼尔森-二宫定理约束，净手性拓扑电荷必须为零。研究希望探索非厄米性（光子系统中天然存在）能否放松这一约束，实现原本被禁止的谱响应。
AI.method: 在一维多层结构中利用工程规范场实现均匀磁场和轴向磁场，构建合成光子外尔半金属，直接探测朗道能级谱，并通过引入辐射边界损耗选择性抑制表面态。
AI.result: 均匀磁场下观察到手性平衡的零级朗道能级；轴向磁场中，体态赝朗道能级携带一种手性，而相反手性位于边界局域表面态。辐射损耗选择性抑制表面态，产生可观测的手性不平衡；降低损耗后恢复隐藏手性通道。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米性可以控制和放松拓扑系统中的基本手性约束，为光子系统中实现原本被禁止的谱响应提供了新途径。

title: Manifold Diffusion for Structure Generation of Transition Metal Complexes
summary: Transition metal complexes are central to catalysis, drug design, and materials science, with relevant properties strongly sensitive to their three-dimensional geometry. However, the electronic diversity and unconventional bonding environments of transition metal complexes pose a major challenge for accurate structure generation. In this work, we introduce TMCgen, a manifold diffusion machine learning model that efficiently and accurately generates geometries of transition metal complexes. By formulating the diffusion process over the metal-ligand coordination angles, combined with torsional and rotational diffusion of the ligands, TMCgen focuses on the key geometric degrees of freedom of transition metal complexes. TMCgen shows strong performance in generating accurate coordination environments on a diverse set of experimentally derived bioinorganic and organometallic complexes while requiring only few inference steps, enabling efficient generation. Our results demonstrate the potential of manifold-based generative modeling for data-efficient geometry generation, paving the way for property-conditioned design of transition metal complexes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TMCgen，一种基于流形扩散的机器学习模型，通过聚焦金属-配体配位角、扭转和旋转自由度，高效准确地生成过渡金属配合物的三维几何结构。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属配合物的三维几何结构对其催化、药物设计和材料科学中的性质至关重要，但由于电子多样性和非常规成键环境，准确生成其结构极具挑战性。
AI.method: TMCgen采用流形扩散模型，将扩散过程定义在金属-配体配位角空间上，并结合配体的扭转和旋转扩散，聚焦于过渡金属配合物的关键几何自由度。
AI.result: 在多种实验来源的生物无机和有机金属配合物上，TMCgen仅需少量推理步骤即可生成准确的配位环境，展现出强性能和高效率。
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于流形的生成建模在数据高效的几何结构生成方面的潜力，为面向性质的过渡金属配合物设计铺平了道路。

title: Approximating Hartree-Fock theory via an efficiently local reformulation
comment: 12 pages of text, 21 pages of SI, 6 figures
summary: We explore a reorganized framework for the Hartree Fock equations that allows varying patterns of locality to be imposed on the molecular orbitals while maintaining a highly efficient self-consistent field optimization algorithm. Rather than limiting orbitals' spread and then variationally minimizing the energy within those limits, our reorganization neatly pairs each local degree of freedom with a specific solution condition that itself has a naturally local interpretation. These pairs can each be turned on or off, and, regardless of the sparsity pattern used to make such choices, the overall method maintains a fast self-consistent field optimization. We use this structure to test reaction-matched schemes for imposing orbital locality and, through Fock builds that exploit this locality, achieve competitive timings even in modestly sized molecules. Our initial tests also suggest that this approach to imposed orbital locality can be arranged so as to do minimal damage to both Hartree Fock and MP2 reaction energy predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文重新组织了Hartree Fock方程框架，允许对分子轨道施加不同程度的局域性，同时保持高效的自洽场优化算法。通过将每个局域自由度与具有自然局域解释的特定解条件配对，实现了可开关的稀疏模式，并利用局域性加速Fock构建，在中等分子上取得了有竞争力的计算时间，且对HF和MP2反应能量预测的损害极小。
AI.motivation: 传统方法限制了轨道的扩展范围然后变分最小化能量，效率不高。作者希望建立一种新的框架，使局域性约束与自洽场优化能够更自然地结合，同时保持计算效率。
AI.method: 重新组织Hartree Fock方程，将每个局域自由度与一个具有自然局域解释的特定解条件配对。这些配对可以独立开关，无论采用何种稀疏模式，整体方法都能保持快速的自洽场优化。利用局域性加速Fock构建。
AI.result: 在中等分子上取得了有竞争力的计算时间；对HF和MP2反应能量预测的损害极小。
AI.conclusion: 这种施加轨道局域性的方法能够在不显著损害反应能量预测精度的前提下，显著提升计算效率，尤其适合中等规模分子体系。

title: Deep Learning-Accelerated Dynamic Kinetic Monte Carlo Simulation for Hydrogen Transport in Tungsten
summary:
In magnetic confinement fusion reactors, hydrogen plasma irradiation causes material saturation and recycling, where hydrogen released from the tungsten wall significantly impacts the peripheral plasma. Kinetic Monte Carlo (kMC) simulations are essential for investigating the dynamic balance between incident and emitted fluxes at the atomic scale. However, standard kMC frameworks are inadequate for handling realistic material complexities, such as polycrystalline structures and dynamic evolution under irradiation, being computationally bottlenecked by continuous transition parameter updates. Conventionally, evaluating migration barriers in disordered systems (e.g., grain boundaries) relies on computationally prohibitive on-the-fly atomistic calculations like the Nudged Elastic Band (NEB) method.
  Here, we present a deep learning-accelerated Dynamic kMC framework that eliminates this reliance. Our approach integrates a three-stage deep learning pipeline: a pix2pix model for predicting local 3D potential energy distributions, a U-Net for extracting hydrogen trapping sites, and a 3D-CNN for directly evaluating migration barriers. To achieve macroscopic timescales, we implemented a hierarchical spatial index combined with a differential local-update algorithm operating in O(1) complexity. This architecture restricts recalculations to the immediate vicinity of moving atoms, accelerating updates. Demonstrated on a large-scale realistic polycrystalline tungsten model, the framework successfully reproduces preferential hydrogen trapping along grain boundaries, bridging the gap between atomic-scale accuracy and macroscopic timescales for full-scale plasma-wall interaction simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度学习加速的动态动力学蒙特卡洛（kMC）框架，用于模拟聚变反应堆中氢等离子体与钨壁的相互作用。该框架通过pix2pix模型预测势能分布、U-Net提取氢陷阱位点、3D-CNN评估迁移势垒，并结合O(1)复杂度的层次化空间索引与差分局部更新算法，在宏观时间尺度上实现了对多晶钨中氢行为的高保真模拟。
AI.motivation: 标准kMC框架无法处理多晶结构等真实材料复杂性，且迁移势垒评估依赖计算成本极高的在线原子计算（如NEB方法），导致计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出深度学习加速的Dynamic kMC框架：1) pix2pix模型预测局部3D势能分布；2) U-Net提取氢陷阱位点；3) 3D-CNN直接评估迁移势垒；4) 层次化空间索引与差分局部更新算法实现O(1)复杂度。
AI.result: 在大规模真实多晶钨模型上，框架成功复现了氢沿晶界优先捕获的行为，实现了原子尺度精度与宏观时间尺度的统一。
AI.conclusion: 该框架消除了对在线原子计算（如NEB）的依赖，弥合了原子尺度精度与宏观时间尺度之间的鸿沟，适用于全尺寸等离子体-壁相互作用模拟。

title: Surface Reconstruction in Low-Temperature ARPES Spectra of Charge-Ordered EuAl$_4$
summary: Charge ordering in EuAl$_4$ has been widely discussed in connection with band reconstruction, magnetism,and topological electronic states, yet the microscopic origin of the complex low-temperature ARPES spectra remains unresolved. Here we combine photon-energy-, temperature-, and cleavage-history-dependent ARPES with firstprinciples calculations to separate intrinsic bulk bands from surface-derived spectral weight. Spectra measured on high-temperature-cleaved surfaces, both at 160 K and after cooling to 10 K, are well described by the calculated three-dimensional bulk electronic structure, whereas low-temperature-cleaved surfaces exhibit additional electron-like bands, replica-like Fermi-surface contours, and nearly kz-independent surface-derived features that are absent from the bulk calculations. These extra features are progressively suppressed upon warming, whereas the bulk-derived bands remain largely unchanged across the charge-density-wave transition within the experimental resolution. The combined analysis of photon-energy dependence, temperature evolution, and cleavage history identifies the reconstructed low-temperature spectral weight as arising predominantly from a thermally fragile surface reconstruction rather than from intrinsic bulk CDW-induced band folding. These results resolve an important ambiguity in EuAl$_4$ and provide spectroscopic criteria for distinguishing surface reconstruction from bulk charge-order effects in BaAl$_4$-family correlated semimetals.

AI.tldr: 通过结合光子能量、温度和解理历史依赖的ARPES与第一性原理计算，本文发现EuAl$_4$低温ARPES谱中的额外特征主要源于表面重构而非体相电荷密度波引起的能带折叠，解决了该材料光谱解释中的重要歧义。
AI.motivation: EuAl$_4$中电荷有序与能带重构、磁性和拓扑电子态的联系被广泛讨论，但低温ARPES谱的微观起源尚未解决，存在表面重构与体相CDW能带折叠之间的歧义。
AI.method: 结合光子能量依赖、温度依赖和解理历史依赖的ARPES测量，并与第一性原理体相电子结构计算进行对比分析。
AI.result: 高温解理表面（160K和冷却至10K）的光谱与三维体相电子结构计算吻合；低温解理表面则出现额外的类电子能带、复费米面轮廓和近$k_z$无关的表面特征。额外特征随升温被抑制，而体相能带在CDW转变温度附近基本不变。
AI.conclusion: 低温ARPES谱中的额外权重主要源于热力学脆弱的表面重构，而非体相CDW能带折叠。为区分BaAl$_4$族相关半金属中的表面重构与体相电荷有序效应提供了光谱学判据。

title: Role of System-Bath Interaction in Non-Markovian Quantum Brownian Otto Cycles
summary: We study finite-time quantum Otto cycles whose working medium is a harmonic oscillator undergoing a quantum Brownian motion described by the Caldeira-Leggett model when the oscillator is in contact with heat baths in isochoric processes. The time evolution of the Otto cycle is studied by analytically solving the exact Heisenberg-Langevin equations for the system variables and the interaction energy between the system and the bath. This enables us to investigate non-Markovian strong-coupling effects on the quantum Otto cycle. We obtain cyclic steady states and study the thermodynamic properties of the Otto cycle for various values of the parameters describing the heat baths and the coupling between the system and the bath. We compare our results with those obtained in the Markovian limit, where the time evolution is described by the Lindblad equation. We find that the change in the interaction energy during the isochoric process contributes to both work and heat, and plays a crucial role in determining thermodynamic behavior of the cycle. In particular, we find that when the Otto cycle operates as an engine, the effect of the interaction energy is to reduce the work output. We also compare our results with the power-efficiency trade-off relation recently proposed for the Markovian quantum Otto engine. We find that the power of our non-Markovian engine for a given efficiency value falls below the Markovian power-efficiency bound.

AI.tldr: 本文通过精确求解Caldeira-Leggett模型的Heisenberg-Langevin方程，研究了有限时间量子Otto循环中非马尔可夫强耦合效应，发现等容过程中系统与浴的相互作用能变化对功和热均有贡献，且会降低引擎的输出功，同时非马尔可夫引擎的功率-效率关系低于马尔可夫界限。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于马尔可夫近似（Lindblad方程）描述量子Otto循环，但真实系统中非马尔可夫效应和强耦合效应不可忽略，尤其是相互作用能对热力学量的贡献尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 以谐振子为工质，采用Caldeira-Leggett模型描述量子布朗运动，精确求解Heisenberg-Langevin方程分析Otto循环的时间演化，研究系统变量及系统-浴相互作用能的动力学，并与Lindblad方程描述的马尔可夫极限结果进行对比。
AI.result: 等容过程中相互作用能的变化同时贡献于功和热；当Otto循环作为热机时，相互作用能会减少输出功；非马尔可夫引擎在给定效率下的功率低于马尔可夫功率-效率界限。
AI.conclusion: 非马尔可夫强耦合效应对量子Otto循环的热力学性能有显著影响，相互作用能是不可忽略的关键因素，且非马尔可夫引擎的性能突破不了马尔可夫极限的功率-效率权衡关系。

title: Optically programmable and erasable cryogenic flash memory on an undoped Si/SiGe heterostructure
comment: S Rastogi, S Samanta: These authors contributed equally
summary: Scalable cryogenic memory is a critical yet unresolved requirement for large-scale quantum computing architectures, particularly for computing-in-memory schemes. We exploit the interplay between optical excitation and gate bias in an undoped Si/SiGe heterojunction field-effect transistor (HFET) to realize non-volatile memory functionality. The device exploits a high interface trap density ($D_{it} > 1.6 \times 10^{12}$~eV$^{-1}$cm$^{-2}$), which, in conjunction with the oxide thickness and dielectric constant, enables effective "locking" of the threshold voltage to the applied gate bias over a wide voltage range. Two of these states can be selected for binary operation, while the availability of multiple stable states within the same device enables multibit data storage. Robust cycling endurance ($>~10^3$ cycles) and long-term state retention ($>~10^4$~s) of the memory states at 1.5 K confirm the suitability of this approach for integration into Si/SiGe-based quantum computing architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于未掺杂Si/SiGe异质结场效应晶体管（HFET）的新型非易失性存储方案，利用光激发与栅压协同作用，通过高界面陷阱密度实现阈值电压的“锁定”，支持多比特数据存储，并在1.5K低温下展示了超过10^3次循环和10^4秒的保持时间，适用于大规模量子计算架构。
AI.motivation: 大规模量子计算架构（特别是存算一体方案）急需可扩展的低温存储器，而现有方案难以同时满足低温兼容性、非易失性和多比特存储需求。
AI.method: 利用Si/SiGe HFET中高密度界面陷阱（Dit > 1.6×10^12 eV^-1cm^-2），结合光激发和栅压偏置，通过陷阱俘获/发射电荷实现阈值电压的可调“锁定”，从而构建多级非易失存储状态。
AI.result: 在1.5K低温下实现：1) 二进制及多比特数据存储；2) 超过10^3次的循环耐久性；3) 超过10^4秒的状态保持时间。
AI.conclusion: 该基于Si/SiGe HFET的低温非易失存储方案与现有硅基量子计算工艺兼容，为未来大规模量子计算架构中的存算一体设计提供了可行的存储解决方案。

title: Co-adsorption mechanism drives CO oxidation on defective ZnS
comment: 14 pages (single column), 5 figures . Letter format. Supporting Information available upon request
summary: Reactivity on wide-bandgap semiconductor surfaces relies critically on the generation of active sites. In the case of CO oxidation, however, the mere presence of defects is insufficient to drive reactivity. Here, we investigate CO oxidation on a defective ZnS single-crystal surface by combining near ambient pressure X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy (NAP-XPS) and density functional theory (DFT) calculations. NAP-XPS measurements reveal CO$_2$-like surface intermediates only under oxygen-rich conditions, consistent with oxygen-assisted CO oxidation. DFT calculations support an oxygen-assisted co-adsorption pathway in which CO interacts preferentially with adsorbed oxygen species stabilized near Zn-deficient sites, forming weakly bound CO$_2$-like structures. These results identify oxygen coverage, rather than defect density alone, as the key factor controlling CO$_2$-like intermediate formation on defective ZnS and establish defective ZnS as a model platform for studying oxygen-assisted surface chemistry on non-oxide semiconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过NAP-XPS和DFT计算发现，在缺陷ZnS表面，CO氧化生成CO₂类中间体的关键因素是氧覆盖率，而非缺陷密度本身。
AI.motivation: 宽禁带半导体表面的反应活性依赖于活性位点的产生，但仅靠缺陷本身不足以驱动CO氧化反应，因此需要探究在缺陷ZnS上CO氧化的真正控制因素。
AI.method: 结合近常压X射线光电子能谱（NAP-XPS）和密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，研究缺陷ZnS单晶表面的CO氧化过程。
AI.result: 只有在富氧条件下才观察到CO₂类表面中间体；DFT表明CO优先与锌缺陷位附近稳定的吸附氧物种相互作用，形成弱结合的CO₂类结构。
AI.conclusion: 氧覆盖率而非缺陷密度是控制缺陷ZnS表面CO₂类中间体形成的关键因素，缺陷ZnS可作为研究非氧化物半导体上氧辅助表面化学的模型平台。

title: A Visible-Frequency Excitonic Reststrahlen Band in (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$ Slabs
summary: Layered halide perovskites host exceptionally strong excitons, whose optical signatures are usually interpreted as absorptive resonances on a smooth dielectric background. Strong excitons, however, can also reshape the dielectric response itself and drive the real permittivity negative, opening a reflective band: the visible, excitonic analogue of an infrared Reststrahlen band. Whether bare (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$ slabs reach this regime has remained unclear. Here we show that low-temperature transmission of (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$ slabs, driven by the intralayer-exciton manifold, evolves with increasing thickness from an excitonic dip into a broad near-zero-transmission interval with compressed Fabry-Pérot-like fringes. Transfer-matrix analysis with an effective Lorentz-oscillator dielectric response reproduces this crossover, reconstructs a finite negative-Re($\varepsilon$) window, and implies near-ultrastrong exciton-photon coupling. Calculated field maps show suppressed in-plane field penetration within this interval and a driven longitudinal response near the high-energy ($\varepsilon=0$) edge. These results identify (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$ slabs as a cavity-free visible-frequency excitonic Reststrahlen material.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了(PEA)₂PbI₄钙钛矿薄片中的激子Reststrahlen效应，发现强激子可使介电常数实部变负，形成可见光波段的反射带，并通过转移矩阵分析和实验验证了这一现象，表明该材料是无腔的可见光激子Reststrahlen材料。
AI.motivation: 层状卤化物钙钛矿中存在极强的激子，但其光学特性通常被视为平滑介电背景上的吸收共振。然而，强激子也能重塑介电响应，使介电常数实部变负，从而打开一个反射带——即可见光波段的激子Reststrahlen带。此前，(PEA)₂PbI₄薄片是否能达到这一状态尚不清楚，因此本文旨在探究这个问题。
AI.method: 通过低温透射实验测量不同厚度(PEA)₂PbI₄薄片的光学响应；采用有效Lorentz振子介电响应模型进行转移矩阵分析，重构介电常数实部为负的窗口；计算场分布图以分析场穿透和纵向响应。
AI.result: 随着薄片厚度增加，低温透射从激子吸收谷演变为宽的低透射区间，并伴有压缩的Fabry-Pérot条纹；转移矩阵分析重构出有限的负Re(ε)窗口，表明接近超强激子-光子耦合；场分布图显示在该区间内平面内场穿透被抑制，并在高能(ε=0)边缘出现纵向响应。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了(PEA)₂PbI₄薄片是一种无腔的可见光激子Reststrahlen材料，为可见光波段的激子-光子强耦合研究提供了新平台。

title: Diagrammatic Monte Carlo for positron-molecule many-body theory
summary: A diagrammatic Monte Carlo evaluation of the ladder series contributions to the correlation potential (self energy) of a positron in the field of a molecule is presented. The $GW$@TDHF, virtual-positronium ($T$-matrix), and positron-hole Goldstone ladder series contributions are stochastically sampled order-by-order within the Tamm-Dancoff approximation, which is exact for the latter two classes, with Ces{á}ro-Riesz resummation used to extrapolate to infinite order. Gaussian bases are employed and Coulomb matrix elements are represented via density fitting, with the three centre integrals the largest arrays required to be stored in memory. The stochastic approach thus realizes a reduction in memory of the largest arrays required on the order of the number of molecular orbitals in the basis $N\sim$10$^2$--10$^3$ compared to the exact deterministic solution of Bethe-Salpeter equations [J. Hofierka, B. Cunningham, C. M. Rawlins, C. H. Patterson and D. G. Green, Nature {\bf 606}, {688} (2022)]. Benchmark results for lithium hydride show quantitative agreement with exact diagonalisation, notably demonstrating the successful stochastic summation of the virtual-positronium infinite electron-positron ladder series.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种图蒙特卡洛方法，用于随机抽样正电子在分子场中的自能阶梯级数贡献（包括GW@TDHF、虚正电子素T矩阵和正电子-空穴Goldstone阶梯级数），并利用Cesàro-Riesz重求和外推至无穷阶。与精确求解Bethe-Salpeter方程相比，该方法在内存需求上降低了约N~10²–10³倍。在氢化锂上的基准测试与精确对角化结果定量一致，成功实现了虚正电子素无穷级数的随机求和。
AI.motivation: 传统精确求解正电子-分子体系Bethe-Salpeter方程需要存储O(N³)大小的阵列（N为分子轨道数），内存开销巨大，难以处理较大分子。本文旨在开发一种随机蒙特卡洛方法，通过逐阶随机采样阶梯级数并重求和，大幅降低内存需求，同时保持计算精度。
