AI.method: 采用图蒙特卡洛方法逐阶随机采样三类阶梯级数贡献：GW@TDHF、虚正电子素T矩阵和正电子-空穴Goldstone级数。在Tamm-Dancoff近似下（后两类精确），使用Cesàro-Riesz重求和从有限阶外推至无穷阶。计算中使用高斯基组，通过密度拟合表示库仑矩阵元，仅需存储三中心积分这一最大阵列。
AI.result: 与完整Bethe-Salpeter方程精确解相比，该方法将最大阵列的内存需求从O(N³)降至O(N²)量级，降低因子约N~10²–10³。在氢化锂分子上的基准测试显示，随机求和结果与精确对角化定量吻合，特别成功验证了虚正电子素无穷级数的随机求和策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文发展的随机图蒙特卡洛方法为处理正电子-分子体系中电子-正电子关联效应提供了一条高效且可扩展的路径，在保持精度的同时大幅降低内存开销，为未来研究更大分子体系中的正电子行为奠定了基础。

title: Neural Spectral Element Methods for stiff multiphysics PDEs with electrochemical transport benchmarks
summary: The Neural Spectral Element Method (NSEM) evaluates each network only at fixed Legendre-Gauss-Lobatto quadrature nodes and replaces all derivative calls with precomputed spectral differentiation matrices. The resulting deterministic loss enables limited-memory BFGS (L-BFGS) to reach residuals of 10^-9 to 10^-10. A Kosloff-Tal-Ezer coordinate map resolves electrochemical boundary layers, while a mesh-free neural mortar framework couples multi-element domains. On the four-example Poisson-Nernst-Planck (PNP) benchmark of Huang and co-workers, NSEM attains 10^-4 to 10^-7 relative pointwise error with two orders of magnitude fewer collocation points than the adaptive-resampling PINN baseline. Both a tanh multilayer perceptron (MLP) and a basis-aligned Legendre Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) backbone attain spectral accuracy within the same NSEM infrastructure, with the KAN requiring roughly half the Adam steps to enter the L-BFGS basin of attraction on the 1D PNP benchmark.

AI.tldr: NSEM将神经网络评估限制在Legendre-Gauss-Lobatto节点上，用预计算谱微分矩阵替代所有导数调用，通过L-BFGS优化达到10^-9至10^-10残差，在PNP基准上以少两个数量级的配置点实现10^-4至10^-7相对点误差，且KAN相比MLP收敛更快。
AI.motivation: 现有PINN在求解偏微分方程时面临计算效率低、精度有限的问题，特别是在处理多尺度物理现象（如电化学边界层）和多元素耦合域时表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出神经谱元法(NSEM)：在固定LGL正交节点上评估网络；用预计算谱微分矩阵替换导数；采用Kosloff-Tal-Ezer坐标映射处理边界层；提出无网格神经mortar框架耦合多元素域；支持tanh MLP和Legendre KAN两种骨干网络。
AI.result: 在Huang等人的四示例PNP基准上，NSEM达到10^-4至10^-7相对点误差，配置点数量比自适应重采样PINN基线少两个数量级；残差可达10^-9至10^-10；KAN比MLP少需约一半Adam步数即可进入L-BFGS吸引域。
AI.conclusion: NSEM通过谱精度框架显著提升了神经网络求解PDE的精度和效率，KAN在收敛速度上优于传统MLP，为高精度科学计算提供了有效的神经方法。

title: Complexity of tensor network simulation for noisy quantum circuits
summary: We aim to rigorously address how local noise affects classical simulability of quantum dynamics benchmarked by tensor-network methods. Using operator entanglement entropy (OEE), we prove the following: (1) For single-qubit depolarizing noise on arbitrary circuits, tensor networks with $\mathrm{poly}(n)$ bond dimension suffice for fixed absolute Hilbert-Schmidt error after $\order{1}$ depth, while relative error demands $\order{\log n}$ depth; and this bound is optimal. (2) For single-qubit depolarizing noise on 1D local circuits, the existence of whole-trajectory error-bounded matrix product operator (MPO) of $\mathrm{poly}(n)$ bond dimension at all depths. (3) For general single-qubit noise in 1D brickwall circuits, random two-design gates with contraction coefficient $c<1/3$ yield an $\order{1}$ OEE plateau with probability $1-Te^{-Ω(n)}$, while arbitrary gates with $c<1/48$ give $\order{\log n}$ OEE in the worst case. (4) In higher dimensions, these bounds yield uniform-in-depth $\mathrm{poly}(n)$ average boundary-bond dimensions for projected entangled pair operators~(PEPO) across every cut -- under depolarizing noise at either absolute or relative accuracy, and under general noise with strong contraction at absolute accuracy. Our results establish a rigorous connection between certain noise models, circuit types, and their classical simulability.

AI.tldr: 本文严格证明了局部噪声如何影响基于张量网络的量子动力学的经典可模拟性。关键结论包括：单比特去极化噪声下，poly(n)键维张量网络在固定绝对误差下可模拟O(1)深度电路，相对误差下需O(log n)深度；一维局域电路中存在全轨迹误差有界的poly(n)键维MPO；一般噪声下随机双设计门与收缩系数c<1/3时可实现O(1) OEE平台；高维情形下噪声可导致均匀深度poly(n)平均边界键维。
AI.motivation: 严格证明噪声如何影响量子电路的经典可模拟性，建立噪声模型、电路类型与经典可模拟性之间的严格联系。
AI.method: 利用算子纠缠熵(OEE)和张量网络方法，对不同类型的噪声（单比特去极化噪声、一般单比特噪声）、不同电路结构（任意电路、一维局域电路、砖墙电路）及不同维度进行严格理论分析。
AI.result: (1)去极化噪声下poly(n)键维在O(1)深度绝对误差和O(log n)深度相对误差下足够，且下界最优；(2)一维局域电路中存在全深度poly(n)键维MPO；(3)随机门c<1/3时O(1) OEE平台，任意门c<1/48时O(log n) OEE最坏情况；(4)高维PEPO在噪声下均匀深度poly(n)平均边界键维。
AI.conclusion: 建立了噪声驱动的量子电路经典可模拟性的严格理论框架，揭示了噪声强度、电路结构、误差度量与模拟复杂度之间的定量关系。

title: Can the Brownian diffusion coefficient be reconstructed from Lyapunov exponents?
summary: We consider an ac-driven particle moving in a spatially periodic and symmetric potential. In the zero- temperature limit, for the analyzed parameter set, its dynamics is non-chaotic and the particle does not manifest diffusive properties. At non-zero temperatures, the asymptotic long-time motion follows normal (Brownian) diffusion. Recent studies have shown that within tailored parameter regimes, the diffusion coef- ficient is a quasiperiodic function of the external driving amplitude [1]. Although no general relation between Lyapunov exponents and Brownian diffusion exists, we demonstrate that the quasiperiodic diffusion coefficient at non-zero temperature can be accurately reconstructed from the maximal Lyapunov exponent of the corresponding deterministic system (at vanishing temperature). We propose an approximate formula for this purpose, which shows good agreement with numerical simulations, although some discrepancies are detected in the vicinity of the local maxima of the diffusion coefficient. Finally, we examine the robustness of the correlation between diffusion and the Lyapunov exponent under variations of the system parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了零温度下非混沌的周期势场中交流驱动粒子，在非零温度下呈现正常布朗扩散，发现扩散系数与确定性系统的最大李雅普诺夫指数之间存在准周期对应关系，并提出了一个近似公式重建扩散系数。
AI.motivation: 虽然Lyapunov指数与布朗扩散之间通常没有一般性关系，但本文试图在特定参数范围内建立二者之间的关联，利用确定性系统的最大Lyapunov指数来预测非零温度下的准周期扩散系数。
AI.method: 分析了零温度下非混沌的ac驱动粒子在周期对称势中的动力学；在非零温度下研究正常布朗扩散；通过最大Lyapunov指数（零温确定性系统）近似重构扩散系数，并提出近似公式，通过数值模拟验证其有效性。
AI.result: 扩散系数在非零温度下呈准周期函数形式（驱动振幅的函数）；提出的近似公式能较好地重构扩散系数，但在扩散系数局部极大值附近存在偏差；通过参数变化检验了扩散与Lyapunov指数之间相关性的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 非零温度下的准周期扩散系数可以基于零温确定性系统的最大Lyapunov指数进行近似重建，尽管在局部极大值区域存在一些差异，但整体上二者具有良好的相关性，且该相关性对参数变化具有一定鲁棒性。

title: Edge Detection Framework Utilizing SOT-MTJ Bit-Cell Arrays
summary: Traditional edge detection algorithms, foundational to computer vision, face significant challenges in energy efficiency and processing latency on conventional CMOS-based hardware. Existing algorithms, such as Canny, are computationally expensive, posing challenges in resource-constrained hardware where energy efficiency and low latency are critical. This study introduces a novel, hardware-efficient algorithm that leverages the intrinsic characteristics of magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) devices. We present a detailed device-level analysis of an MTJ-based system for edge detection, outlining its operational cycles, including write, read, and reset methods. The algorithm's efficacy is evaluated against the standard Canny edge detection method. We provide a quantitative performance analysis, including metrics such as energy consumption and latency, which demonstrates that our proposed spintronics-based approach offers a promising solution for achieving low-power, high-speed image processing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于磁隧道结(MTJ)器件的硬件高效边缘检测算法，相比传统Canny算法在能效和延迟方面有显著优势。
AI.motivation: 传统边缘检测算法（如Canny）在CMOS硬件上计算开销大、能效低且延迟高，难以满足资源受限场景下的需求。
AI.method: 利用MTJ器件的物理特性设计新型边缘检测算法，详细描述了写、读、复位等操作周期，并在器件级进行系统分析。
AI.result: 与标准Canny算法对比，基于自旋电子学的方法在能量消耗和延迟方面表现出显著优势，实现了低功耗、高速的图像处理。
AI.conclusion: 基于MTJ的硬件高效边缘检测算法是一种有前景的解决方案，适用于低功耗、高速度图像处理任务。

title: Impact of Cu-Mn ratio on Structure and Defects in Layered Multiferroic Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3
summary: Multiferroic materials exhibit the coexistence of magnetic and ferroelectric order, enabling control of magnetism through electric fields and vice versa. These properties make them attractive for spintronic and memory device applications. Recent studies on Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3 (0.04 \leq x \leq 0.26; 0.03 \leq y \leq 0.15) have revealed strong magnetoelectric coupling, with variations in Mn-to-Cu concentration leading to variations in optical, electronic, and magnetic responses. Despite these findings, the influence of nanoscale structure and defects on the observed properties remains poorly understood. In this study, we investigate the structure and nanoscale defects in Cu-deficient Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3 (Cu:Mn ratio <1, i.e., with 0.04 \leq x \leq 0.26 and 0.03 \leq y \leq 0.15) and Cu-rich Cu1+xMn1-ySiTe3 (Cu:Mn ratio >1, i.e., with 0.04 \leq x \leq 0.3 and 0.13 \leq y \leq 0.31) crystals using scanning/transmission electron microscopy and single-crystal X-ray diffraction. Cu-deficient crystals exhibit extensive stacking faults correlated with chemical inhomogeneity between Mn and Cu, along with variations in Te stacking. In contrast, Cu-rich crystals show fewer stacking faults but contain other local structural variations, such as needle-shaped precipitates and loop-like features. These distinct local structural features between Cu-rich and Cu-deficient crystals can be correlated to variations in their observed properties. Complementary density functional theory calculations confirm that the Cu-rich structure is more polar than the Cu-deficient structure. Overall, this study provides a comprehensive understanding of how subtle changes in chemistry influence the nanoscale structure, defect distribution, and functional properties in Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3, offering guidance for designing multiferroic materials with tailored performance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过电子显微镜和X射线衍射研究了Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3晶体中Cu含量变化对纳米尺度结构和缺陷的影响，发现Cu缺乏晶体存在大量堆垛层错，而Cu富余晶体则具有针状析出物等不同缺陷特征，这些差异与材料的多铁性能密切相关。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3具有强磁电耦合效应，但纳米尺度结构与缺陷对其性能的影响机制尚不清楚，因此需要系统研究化学计量比变化引起的微观结构差异。
AI.method: 采用扫描/透射电子显微镜和单晶X射线衍射分析Cu缺乏和Cu富余晶体的结构，并结合密度泛函理论计算进行验证。
AI.result: Cu缺乏晶体：大量堆垛层错，伴随Mn与Cu的化学不均匀性及Te堆叠变化；Cu富余晶体：堆垛层错较少，但出现针状析出物和环状特征等局部结构变化；DFT计算证实Cu富余结构极性更强。
AI.conclusion: 化学组成的微小变化会显著影响纳米尺度结构和缺陷分布，进而决定多铁材料的功能性能，这为设计性能可调的多铁材料提供了指导。

title: Supersymmetric quantum criticality with discrete symmetry
summary: Supersymmetry, originally proposed in high-energy physics, can emerge as a remarkable low-energy structure in condensed matter systems. While emergent supersymmetry at quantum critical points is widely discussed in models with continuous symmetries, real materials are constrained by microscopic discrete symmetries. To address this, we investigate (2+1)-dimensional Gross-Neveu-Yukawa theories coupling Dirac fermions to a complex order parameter with discrete $Z_n$ anisotropy. Using the functional renormalization group, we find that for $n>3$, the anisotropic perturbations are irrelevant at the fixed point, yielding a $\mathcal{N}=2$ Wess-Zumino supersymmetric critical point. In the ordered phase, this dangerously irrelevant anisotropy gives rise to a second characteristic length scale, $ξ'$, alongside the usual correlation length, $ξ$. By tracking mass thresholds along symmetry-broken renormalization group trajectories, we extract the exponents $ν'$ and $ν$ without imposing prior scaling assumptions. For the $Z_4$, $Z_5$, and $Z_6$ models, our results support the scaling relation $ν'/ν= 1+|y_n|/p$ with $p=2$ in the isotropic framework used here.

AI.tldr: 本文利用功能重整化群研究了(2+1)维Gross-Neveu-Yukawa理论中离散Z_n各向异性对涌现超对称性的影响。发现当n>3时，各向异性微扰在不动点处是无关的，从而得到N=2 Wess-Zumino超对称临界点。在有序相中，这种危险无关的各向异性产生第二个特征长度尺度ξ'，并提取了相关指数ν'和ν，支持标度关系ν'/ν=1+|y_n|/p（p=2）。
AI.motivation: 现有关于凝聚态系统中涌现超对称性的研究大多聚焦于连续对称性模型，但实际材料受限于微观离散对称性。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究离散Z_n各向异性如何影响超对称临界点的涌现。
AI.method: 采用功能重整化群（fRG）方法分析(2+1)维Gross-Neveu-Yukawa理论，引入离散Z_n各向异性耦合，考察不同n值下各向异性微扰的重整化群流动行为，并通过对称性破缺轨迹上的质量阈值提取临界指数。
AI.result: (1) 当n>3时，Z_n各向异性微扰在不动点处是无关的，系统呈现N=2 Wess-Zumino超对称临界点。(2) 在有序相中，这种危险无关的各向异性导致第二个长度尺度ξ'的出现。(3) 对Z_4、Z_5、Z_6模型，提取的指数支持标度关系ν'/ν=1+|y_n|/p（p=2）。
AI.conclusion: 离散Z_n各向异性（n>3）不会破坏超对称临界点的涌现，反而在有序相中产生新的标度行为。这为在具有离散对称性的实际材料中寻找超对称性提供了理论依据。

title: Linear optimal protocol for physical constraints in weakly driven processes
summary: The minimization of irreversible work in weakly driven systems within linear response under physical constraints on the protocol derivative is studied. The problem reduces to a shifted eigenvalue equation involving the relaxation function. Owing to its dependence on time differences and its evenness, the relaxation kernel is naturally defined over a symmetric interval, where a periodic representation arises as a consistent closure that restores continuous translational invariance. Also, it shows how the irreversible work is defined in practice. Within this framework, the operator becomes diagonal in a Fourier basis. The global optimal solution is the zero mode, yielding a constant driving speed and a linear protocol. The corresponding optimal work depends only on the integrated relaxation function. Numerical results obtained via genetic programming confirm the robustness of this solution across different kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文在线性响应框架下，研究了弱驱动系统中在协议导数物理约束下不可逆功的最小化问题。问题简化为涉及松弛函数的移位特征值方程。通过对称区间上的周期表示恢复连续平移不变性，发现傅里叶基下算子可对角化，全局最优解为零模，对应恒定驱动速度和线性协议，最优功仅取决于积分松弛函数。遗传编程数值结果验证了该解在不同核下的稳健性。
AI.motivation: 在线性响应框架下，研究弱驱动系统中协议导数受物理约束时不可逆功的最小化问题，旨在找到最优驱动策略以最小化能量耗散。
AI.method: 将问题转化为涉及松弛函数的移位特征值方程；利用松弛核在对称区间上的周期表示恢复连续平移不变性；在傅里叶基下对角化算子，求解零模全局最优解（恒定驱动速度、线性协议）；使用遗传编程进行数值验证。
AI.result: 全局最优解是傅里叶零模，对应恒定驱动速度和线性协议；最优功仅取决于积分松弛函数；遗传编程数值结果验证了该解在不同松弛核下的稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 在线性响应和协议导数约束下，弱驱动系统的最小不可逆功最优策略为恒定速度的线性驱动，该结论对多种松弛核均具有稳健性。

title: Quantum control of spin qubits using SOT-driven nanomagnets
comment: Aniruddha Chakraborty and Kanishk Modi, both authors contribute equally
summary: Spin rotation (SR) is an essential capability for realization of single and two-qubit gates in spin quantum computing (SQC) architectures. To perform SR, resonant AC magnetic fields are either generated by microwave current pulses fed to an antenna, or voltage pulses applied to a gate, in presence of an inhomogeneous Zeeman field. While the former approach is limited by gate-speed and site-selectivity of SR, the latter adds to the decoherence of the spin qubits. Here, we propose an alternative technique for driving high-speed SR without compromising the qubit coherence, by employing spin-orbit-torque (SOT)-driven nanomagnets to produce oscillating magnetic fields, locally at the qubit site. The proposed scheme is highly energy-efficient, scalable, and compatible with the CMOS fabrication technology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自旋轨道矩（SOT）驱动的纳米磁体产生局域振荡磁场，实现高速自旋旋转（SR），在不影响量子比特相干性的前提下，解决了传统方法的速率慢、选择性差和退相干问题，方案具有高能效、可扩展且兼容CMOS工艺的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统自旋旋转方法（微波电流天线或电压门控）存在门速度慢、位点选择性差以及增加量子比特退相干的问题，亟需一种既高速又不牺牲相干性的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用自旋轨道矩（SOT）驱动纳米磁体，在量子比特位点局部产生振荡磁场，从而实现自旋旋转。
AI.result: 提出的方案能够实现高速自旋旋转，同时保持量子比特的相干性，且具有高能效、可扩展性和CMOS兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 该SOT驱动纳米磁体的方案为自旋量子计算提供了一种高性能、实用的自旋旋转实现路径。

title: Microstructure-specific mechanisms define multistage relaxation dynamics in a metallic model-glass
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, Under review since July 2025
summary: Deciphering complex relaxation pathways in disordered solids is a central challenge across polymeric, oxide, and metallic glasses, which traditionally relies on the interpretation of mechanical spectroscopy and resulting damping modes. Here we demonstrate the direct observation of dominant atomic-scale relaxation mechanisms during isothermal annealing of an as-quenched binary model glass towards incipient crystallization. Assessed via simulated x-ray photon correlation spectroscopy, a multi-state structural decorrelation is uncovered via speckle-pattern analysis of the full three-dimensional diffraction sphere across the first peak of the structure factor. Over a simulation time of up to 10 $μ$s, three distinct and subsequent decorrelation stages of thermal vibration, glassy network evolution, and structural and chemical ordering towards crystallization are identified. These findings promote a picture where specific dynamically-separated mechanisms drive the microstructural evolution during glass relaxation and suggest a much richer multi-mode relaxation behavior of metallic glasses than hitherto identified.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟X射线光子相关光谱（XPCS）技术，直接观察了非晶合金在等温退火过程中的原子尺度弛豫机制，揭示了从热振动、玻璃网络演化到结晶结构有序化的三个不同且连续的退相干阶段，表明金属玻璃中存在比传统认知更丰富的多模式弛豫行为。
AI.motivation: 解析无序固体（如聚合物、氧化物和金属玻璃）中复杂的弛豫路径一直是核心挑战，传统上依赖于力学谱学及其阻尼模式的解释，缺乏对原子尺度弛豫机制的直接观察。
AI.method: 采用模拟X射线光子相关光谱（XPCS）技术，通过分析整个三维衍射球在结构因子第一峰处的散斑图案，对快速冷却二元模型玻璃在等温退火至初始结晶过程中的结构退相关进行多状态分析，模拟时间长达10微秒。
AI.result: 识别出三个不同且连续的退相关阶段：热振动、玻璃网络演化以及朝向结晶的结构和化学有序化，揭示了动力学分离的特定机制驱动玻璃弛豫过程中的微观结构演化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出金属玻璃的微结构演化由动力学分离的特定机制驱动，表明其存在比以往认知更丰富的多模式弛豫行为。

title: Thermodynamic origin of medium-entropy stabilization in multicomponent rock-salt oxides
summary: High entropy oxides are commonly associated with high configurational entropy ($ΔS_{conf}\geq$ 1.61R) corresponding to five equimolar cations occupying a crystallographic sublattice. However, recent experimental observations indicate that medium-entropy compositions may also exhibit entropy-stabilized rock-salt phases, raising an important question regarding the minimum entropy required for phase stabilization. In this work, we employ a first-principles thermodynamic framework to investigate the stability of rock-salt oxides containing two to five principal cations components analogous to (Ni$_{0.8}$Cu$_{0.2}$)O, (Ni$_{0.6}$Cu$_{0.2}$Zn$_{0.2}$)O, (Ni$_{0.4}$Cu$_{0.2}$Zn$_{0.2}$Co$_{0.2}$)O, (Ni$_{0.2}$Cu$_{0.2}$Zn$_{0.2}$Co$_{0.2}$Mg$_{0.2}$)O. Density functional theory, MCSQS-based structural modeling, and finite-temperature Gibbs free-energy analysis are combined to quantify the roles of enthalpy mixing ($ΔH_{mix}$), configurational ($ΔS_{conf}$), vibrational ($ΔS_{vib}$), and electronic contributions towards ($ΔS_{elec}$) entropy change in governing phase stability. The results show that $ΔS_{conf}$ alone is not a universal descriptor of phase stability. While the two-cation system is enthalpy-stabilized but three-, four- and five-cation systems become thermodynamically stable at high-temperature due to entropy-driven reduction of the Gibbs free energy. These findings demonstrate that single-phase rock-salt oxides are not restricted to the conventional high-entropy limit and that medium-entropy compositions can also be stabilized under suitable thermodynamic conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理热力学框架研究了含2-5种阳离子的岩盐氧化物稳定性，发现单相岩盐氧化物并非仅限于传统的高熵极限（ΔS_conf≥1.61R），中熵组成在适当热力学条件下也能稳定存在。
AI.motivation: 近期实验观察到中熵成分也可能表现出熵稳定的岩盐相，因此需要探究相稳定所需的最小熵值，回答"传统高熵极限是否必要"这一核心问题。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论（DFT）、MCSQS结构建模和有限温度吉布斯自由能分析，量化混合焓(ΔH_mix)、构型熵(ΔS_conf)、振动熵(ΔS_vib)和电子熵(ΔS_elec)对相稳定性的贡献。
AI.result: ΔS_conf单独不能作为相稳定性的通用描述符；二元体系是焓稳定的，而三元、四元和五元体系在高温下因熵驱动的吉布斯自由能降低而热力学稳定。
AI.conclusion: 单相岩盐氧化物不局限于传统高熵极限，中熵组成在合适热力学条件下也能被稳定，拓展了熵稳定材料的组成空间。

title: Towards Automated Discovery: A Review of Generative Models, Multimodal Learning and Closed-Loop Workflows in Inverse Materials Design
summary: Inverse materials design is shifting materials discovery from forward prediction to targeted proposal of candidates that satisfy objectives under physical constraints. Here, we review recent advances in generative crystal structure modeling, multimodal learning, and closed-loop design pipelines for crystalline solids. We survey how modern generators learn chemical-structural priors from large databases to enable controllable sampling of periodic structures, and compare leading model classes including variational autoencoders, normalizing flows, autoregressive formulations, and diffusion models. Particular attention is given to how feasibility constraints and physical priors are enforced across the workflow, through representation choices, training objectives, sampling-time guidance, and post-generation screening and relaxation. We also discuss how multimodal learning fuses diverse materials modalities, including crystal structures, thermodynamic, electronic information, microscopy, spectroscopy, processing context, and scientific text, to construct a more universal, transferable representation of chemical space. In addition, diverse inverse-design strategies are examined, particularly those that integrate conditional generation with latent optimization, Bayesian optimization, reinforcement learning, and active learning. Finally, we highlight recurring failure modes, such as surrogate exploitation, diversity collapse, distribution shift, and the stability-synthesizability gap, and outline discovery-grade evaluation practices based on staged reporting of validity, novelty, uniqueness, stability, and cost.

AI.tldr: 综述了逆材料设计中生成式晶体结构建模、多模态学习和闭环设计流程的最新进展，重点介绍了各类生成模型、物理约束的嵌入方式、多模态融合策略以及多种逆向设计策略，并总结了常见失败模式和评估实践。
AI.motivation: 将材料发现从正向预测转向目标驱动的候选材料定向生成，综述生成模型、多模态学习和闭环设计在晶体材料逆向设计中的进展。
AI.method: 回顾了VAE、归一化流、自回归模型和扩散模型等生成模型；通过表示选择、训练目标、采样引导和后处理筛选/弛豫来嵌入物理约束；多模态学习融合晶体结构、热力学、电子信息、显微、光谱、加工文本等模态；集成条件生成与潜在优化、贝叶斯优化、强化学习、主动学习等逆向设计策略。
AI.result: 比较了各类生成模型在可控采样周期性结构方面的表现；分析了不同物理约束嵌入方式的优劣；探讨了多模态融合对构建通用化学空间表示的贡献；总结了逆向设计中的失败模式（代理模型利用、多样性崩溃、分布偏移、稳定性-可合成性差距）。
AI.conclusion: 提出了基于有效性、新颖性、独特性、稳定性和成本的分阶段评估实践，以促进发现级的材料设计。

title: Magnon bandstructure and topology in a periodically deformed Kagome lattice with DM interaction
summary: We study the band structure and topology of magnons for a Heisenberg model with DM interaction on a deformed Kagome lattice. For simplicity, we focus on a periodically deformed lattice with hexagonal symmetry and an enlarged unit cell. This enlarged unit cell gives rise to a richer band structure than in the undeformed case. Analyzing band topology, there is a distinction between the topologically trivial case with anti-ferromagnetic coupling and the topologically rich case with ferromagnetic coupling. In the anti-ferromagnetic case, a spin-space symmetry, also present in the classical ground state, enforces these topologically trivial states. In the ferromagnetic case, this symmetry is spontaneously broken by the classical ground state. Consequently, the band structure also hosts rich topological features. Specifically, we observe many topological transitions and bands with Chern numbers ranging from $+2$ to $-2$, which makes the system richer than in the undeformed case. This emergent rich topological structure demonstrates that deformed magnets can host new and exciting physics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究变形Kagome晶格上具有DM相互作用的海森堡模型中的磁子能带结构与拓扑性质。相比未变形情况，变形后晶格的能带结构更丰富，并区分了反铁磁耦合（拓扑平庸）和铁磁耦合（拓扑非平庸）两种情况。铁磁情况下观察到从+2到-2的陈数及多次拓扑相变，表明变形磁体蕴含丰富的新物理。
AI.motivation: 探索变形Kagome晶格中磁子的拓扑性质，揭示晶格变形对磁系统能带结构和拓扑特性的调控作用，寻找超越常规情形的新物理现象。
AI.method: 在具有DM相互作用的海森堡模型基础上，构建周期性变形的六角对称Kagome晶格（扩大原胞），分别研究反铁磁与铁磁耦合情况下的磁子能带结构，并通过陈数分析能带拓扑性质。
AI.result: 反铁磁耦合时自旋空间对称性导致拓扑平庸；铁磁耦合时该对称性自发破缺，出现陈数从+2到-2的丰富拓扑结构，伴随多次拓扑相变，比未变形情形更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 变形磁体可以成为调控磁子拓扑性质的有效手段，为探索新奇拓扑磁子物理提供了新的平台。

title: Electromagnetic Field Equivalence from Moving Manifolds
summary: We apply a geometric formulation of electromagnetic fields on moving manifolds to the problem of field equivalence between dynamically separated domains. Starting from the tensorially invariant equations of motion for moving hypersurfaces, we introduce an electromagnetic specialization by constructing an energy density from the electromagnetic field tensor, yielding a geometric extension of Maxwell electrodynamics. The classical Maxwell equations then emerge as a constrained geometric sector of the broader evolution system. Hence, by comparing internal and external electromagnetic configurations, we show that under isolation conditions with no interfacial current exchange, the field difference satisfies the source-free Maxwell equation. Furthermore, the equilibrium Maxwell sector establishes a direct correspondence between the Lorentz-invariant electromagnetic structure and the geometry of constant-mean-curvature manifolds. The resulting field-difference equations admit equivalence solutions generated by specific velocity sectors of the moving-manifold dynamics. We further demonstrate that the resulting field-equivalence regime is intrinsically dynamical: static curved configurations generically retain nonvanishing electromagnetic contrast through curvatureinduced contributions to the geometric pressure balance, whereas dynamically evolving manifolds admit nontrivial admissible sectors satisfying the equivalence condition. Explicit nonvacuum realizations are obtained within the tangential-flow sector of the moving-manifold system, while bounded static Euclidean configurations are generically excluded.

AI.tldr: 本文利用运动流形上的电磁场几何形式化，推导出动态分离域之间的场等价关系。经典麦克斯韦方程是更广泛几何演化系统的约束扇区。在无界面电流交换的隔离条件下，场差满足无源麦克斯韦方程。平衡麦克斯韦扇区建立了洛伦兹不变电磁结构与常平均曲率流形几何之间的直接对应。静态弯曲构型通过曲率贡献保留非零电磁对比，而动态演化流形允许非平凡可容许扇区。
AI.motivation: 为解决动态分离域之间的场等效性问题，从几何角度统一电磁场在运动流形上的表述，拓展麦克斯韦电动力学。
AI.method: 采用运动超曲面的张量不变运动方程，通过电磁场张量构造能量密度，建立麦克斯韦电动力学的几何扩展；通过比较内外电磁构型，推导场差方程；利用常平均曲率流形建立几何对应关系。
AI.result: 建立了场差方程满足无源麦克斯韦方程的条件；发现了电磁场与常平均曲率流形几何的直接对应；证明了静态弯曲构型存在非零电磁对比，动态流形存在可容许扇区；切向流扇区得到非真空实现，而静态欧几里得构型被排除。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解运动流形上的电磁等效性提供了几何框架，揭示了电磁场与流形曲率之间的深层联系，并指出了动态演化构型在实现场等效中的关键作用。

title: Ultrafast formation of a large dynamic magnetic soliton
summary: Nonlinear magnetization dynamics offers a rich variety of phenomena ranging from bistability to chaos. Here, we report the ultrafast formation of a dynamic magnetic soliton in thin ferrimagnetic garnet films with perpendicular magnetic anisotropy, driven by the microwave magnetic field of a microstrip antenna. Using time-resolved Brillouin light scattering microscopy and scanning transmission X-ray microscopy, we directly track the build-up of the large-angle precession state. The observed soliton is distinct from other nonlinear magnetic excitations in two key aspects: (i) it forms inside the linear spin-wave frequency band, and (ii) it is exceptionally large, reaching tens of microns beyond the antenna. We explain the soliton formation by the self-limiting mechanism upon a positive nonlinear frequency shift and the spatial extent of the near-field of the antenna. At large distances from the drive, the soliton collapses and emits short-wavelength spin waves via almost instantaneous spatial wavenumber conversion. Time-resolved measurements further reveal a small finite delay during soliton formation, while coherent long-range oscillations appear essentially simultaneously over distances up to 40 micrometers. These results establish microwave-driven solitons as a robust nonlinear phenomenon in thin-film garnets and suggest opportunities for fast, nonlocal manipulation of magnetic states and for applications in novel computational schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在垂直磁各向异性的铁磁性石榴石薄膜中，由微波磁场驱动形成的超大动态磁孤子。该孤子在线性自旋波频带内形成，尺寸达数十微米，通过自限幅机制和非线性频移解释其形成机理，并观察到孤子塌缩时发生瞬态波数转换发射短波长自旋波。
AI.motivation: 探索非线性磁化动力学中的新现象，特别是研究在铁磁性薄膜中由微波驱动形成的大尺度、快速动态磁孤子的可能性及其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨布里渊光散射显微镜和扫描透射X射线显微镜，直接追踪大角度进动状态的建立过程；结合微带天线的微波磁场驱动和近场空间特性的理论分析。
AI.result: 发现孤子在两个关键方面区别于其他非线性磁激发：(i) 在线性自旋波频带内形成；(ii) 尺寸异常大，达数十微米。孤子塌缩时通过瞬态波数转换发射短波长自旋波，且形成过程存在有限延迟，而长程相干振荡在40微米范围内几乎同时出现。
AI.conclusion: 微波驱动孤子是薄膜石榴石中一种稳健的非线性现象，为快速、非局域操控磁状态及新型计算方案提供了可能性。

title: Autonomous scanning electrochemical cell microscopy enables rapid exploration of large compositionally complex material spaces
summary: Alloying is a central strategy in electrocatalysis, enabling fine-tuning of electronic structure. In particular, compositionally complex solid solutions (CCSS) often called high-entropy alloys are of high interest as they allow active site design. However, the "combinatorial explosion" in the number of possible compositions poses a critical bottleneck for the discovery of active CCSS electrocatalysts. We present an autonomous scanning electrochemical cell microscopy (SECCM) system for ultrahigh-throughput and large-scale CCSS activity screening. The platform rapidly establishes composition-electrocatalytic activity relationships for large compositional spaces across multiple thin-film CCSS materials libraries via active learning and automated library exchange. Embedding analytical expressions of voltammetry in the algorithm enables the learning of whole voltammograms rather than a single selected metric. As a demonstration, we investigated hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) activities of Au-Ir-Rh, where Ir and Rh exhibit strong metal-hydrogen binding and Au exhibits relatively weak binding as derived from the HER volcano plot. The composition-activity trend was accurately predicted after measuring only 15% of all 966 measurement areas. Au30Ir20Rh50 and Au10Ir35Rh55 exhibit highest activities with standard rate constants of about 0.012 cm/s, demonstrating positive synergistic contributions from elemental mixing. The autonomous robotic SECCM platform is broadly applicable to a wide range of electrocatalytic reactions, providing a general pathway for accelerating CCSS electrocatalyst discovery and optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自主扫描电化学细胞显微镜（SECCM）的超高通量平台，用于快速筛选复杂固溶体（CCSS）电催化剂。通过主动学习和自动化库交换，仅测量15%的区域即可准确预测Au-Ir-Rh体系的析氢反应活性，发现Au30Ir20Rh50和Au10Ir35Rh55具有最优活性，为正协同效应提供了实验证据。
AI.motivation: 复杂固溶体（高熵合金）在电催化中具有巨大潜力，但可能的成分组合呈"组合爆炸"式增长，传统试错法效率极低，亟需高通量筛选方法以加速活性催化剂发现。
AI.method: 开发了自主SECCM系统，结合主动学习算法与自动化库交换，通过嵌入伏安法解析表达式学习完整伏安图（而非单一指标），实现超高通量成分-活性关系映射。
AI.result: 在Au-Ir-Rh三元体系中，仅测量966个测量点中的15%即可准确预测全成分空间的活性趋势。最佳成分Au30Ir20Rh50和Au10Ir35Rh55的标准速率常数约0.012 cm/s。
AI.conclusion: 该自主SECCM平台可广泛应用于多种电催化反应，为加速高熵合金电催化剂发现与优化提供了一条通用途径，证实了元素混合的正协同效应。

title: Low-Temperature Suppression of Intertwined Orders in La$_{1/3}$Sr$_{2/3}$FeO$_{3}$ Thin Films
summary: The strong coupling between spin, charge, and lattice degrees of freedom in perovskite oxides leads to an array of exotic phenomena, giving these materials rich phase diagrams that can include coupled orders. This is exemplified by the A-site doped ferrite La$_{1/3}$Sr$_{2/3}$FeO$_{3}$ (LSFO), which exhibits a coupled paramagnetic-antiferromagnetic and charge ordering phase transition at $\sim$190 K that has been well studied in thin films, bulk, and polycrystalline samples. However, the low temperature behavior of LSFO thin films below $\sim$100 K has not been thoroughly explored. This work uses several X-ray scattering and spectroscopy techniques to directly probe LSFO's magnetic and charge order down to low temperature. Using resonant X-ray scattering, we observe a complete suppression of LSFO's known antiferromagnetic and charge order below $\sim$25 K. Further spectroscopy and coherent scattering measurements provide insight into LSFO's electronic structure and domain dynamics in this new low temperature phase, and we propose possible explanations for the observed order suppression based on reduced dimensionality of domains in our thin films. Our findings provide insight into the effects of competing interactions in strongly correlated materials, particularly those with coupled orders.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过X射线散射和光谱技术，发现La₁/₃Sr₂/₃FeO₃薄膜在~25 K以下其反铁磁和电荷有序态被完全抑制，并探讨了低维畴结构等可能机制。
AI.motivation: LSFO薄膜在~100 K以下的低温行为尚未被充分探索，而该材料中自旋、电荷和晶格自由度耦合产生的丰富相图值得深入研究。
AI.method: 使用共振X射线散射、X射线光谱和相干散射测量技术，直接探测LSFO薄膜在低温下的磁有序和电荷有序变化。
AI.result: 在~25 K以下，LSFO薄膜的已知反铁磁和电荷有序被完全抑制；光谱和相干散射测量揭示了低温相中电子结构和畴动力学的变化。
AI.conclusion: 基于薄膜中畴的降维效应，提出了有序抑制的可能解释；该发现揭示了强关联材料中竞争相互作用（尤其是耦合有序体系）的复杂行为。

title: Electronic Hall viscosity: hidden indicator for antiferromagnets
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Comments are welcome
summary: The antiferromagnets with negligible stray fields and ultrafast spin dynamics play a crucial role in the fields of energy-efficient spintronics and topological electronics. However, the detection and control of the underlying nontrivial Berry curvature become extremely limited by the vanishing magnetization and anomalous Hall conductivity. Here, we show the electronic Hall viscosity is closely related to the quadruple Berry curvature of Bloch bands and is bounded by the $d$-orbit factor modulated second moment of the quantum volume. Moreover, we derive the symmetry requirement for nonzero electronic Hall viscosity that could characterize antiferromagnetic ordering even when the linear anomalous Hall response gets forbidden. We further examine our key findings in two archetypal antiferromagnets: $d$-wave altermagnet $\mathrm{RuO}_{2}$, and noncollinear $\mathrm{Mn_{3}Sn}$ through direct first-principle calculations. Thus, our work reveals a new and fundamental quantum geometry quantity of generic antiferromagnets and offers a broadly applicable way to design antiferromagnetic spintronics devices via unconventional Hall viscosity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出电子霍尔粘滞度作为表征反铁磁体中量子几何性质的新物理量，揭示了其与四极贝里曲率和量子体积二阶矩的关系，并通过RuO₂和Mn₃Sn两种典型反铁磁体的第一性原理计算验证，为反铁磁自旋电子学器件的设计提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体具有零杂散场和超快自旋动力学，在节能自旋电子学和拓扑电子学中至关重要，但因其消失的磁化和反常霍尔电导，导致对非平庸贝里曲率的探测和调控极为困难。
AI.method: 理论上推导了电子霍尔粘滞度与布洛赫带四极贝里曲率的定量关系，并建立了其与d轨道因子调制的量子体积二阶矩之间的界限；从对称性角度推导了非零电子霍尔粘滞度的必要条件；通过第一性原理计算在d波交变磁体RuO₂和非共线Mn₃Sn中进行了验证。
AI.result: 发现电子霍尔粘滞度能够表征反铁磁有序，即使在线性反常霍尔响应被禁止的情况下仍然有效；在两种典型反铁磁体中的计算结果支持了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了反铁磁体中一种新的基本量子几何量，并为通过非常规霍尔粘滞度设计反铁磁自旋电子学器件提供了广泛适用的方法。

title: Compressibility and High-Pressure Structure of CaMg$_2$Bi$_2$ and YbMg$_2$Bi$_2$
comment: 18 pages, 11 figures total (including SI). Includes supplementary information
summary: Compounds with the formula $AM_2X_2$ in the CaAl$_2$Si$_2$ structure type have garnered increasing interest across various solid-state research domains, such as quantum topological and thermoelectric materials. Prior studies have identified high-pressure phase transitions in several compounds, including Mg$_3$Sb$_2$, Mg$_3$Bi$_2$, CaMn$_2$Bi$_2$, and SrAl$_2$Si$_2$. In this study, we investigate the structural behavior of CaMg$_2$Bi$_2$ and YbMg$_2$Bi$_2$ under varying pressure conditions. We synthesized crystals using the molten metal flux method and examined them through single-crystal synchrotron X-ray diffraction, employing diamond anvil cells to exert pressures up to 20 GPa. Our analysis reveals insights into the anisotropic compressibility of these materials, highlighting the more compressible and flexible octahedral $A$-Bi bonds as the primary contributors to this anisotropy. Moreover, we observed a phase transition in both CaMg$_2$Bi$_2$ and YbMg$_2$Bi$_2$ at pressures above 9.6 GPa and 8.7 GPa, respectively. The newly identified high-pressure phase exhibits a distortion of the original CaAl$_2$Si$_2$ structure with space group $C2/m$. This high-pressure structure is distinct from that of related compounds (e.g., CaMn$_2$Bi$_2$, MgMg$_2$Bi$_2$), the latter exhibiting a square pyramidal coordination for the $M$ site.

AI.tldr: 本研究合成了CaMg₂Bi₂和YbMg₂Bi₂单晶，在高压下（最高20 GPa）用同步辐射X射线衍射分析其结构变化。发现这两种材料表现出各向异性压缩性，主要由八面体A-Bi键贡献。在9.6 GPa和8.7 GPa以上分别发生相变，新高压相为C2/m空间群的畸变CaAl₂Si₂结构，与同类化合物（如CaMn₂Bi₂）的高压相不同。
AI.motivation: AM₂X₂型CaAl₂Si₂结构化合物在量子拓扑和热电材料领域备受关注，已有研究报道了多种此类化合物的高压相变，但CaMg₂Bi₂和YbMg₂Bi₂的高压结构行为尚不清楚，亟需探究其高压下的结构演化与相变行为。
AI.method: 采用熔融金属助熔剂法合成CaMg₂Bi₂和YbMg₂Bi₂单晶，利用金刚石对顶砧施加最高20 GPa压力，通过单晶同步辐射X射线衍射进行结构表征与分析。
AI.result: 揭示了材料各向异性压缩性，八面体A-Bi键是各向异性的主要来源；CaMg₂Bi₂和YbMg₂Bi₂分别在9.6 GPa和8.7 GPa以上发生相变，新高压相为C2/m空间群的畸变CaAl₂Si₂结构。
AI.conclusion: CaMg₂Bi₂和YbMg₂Bi₂的高压相变行为与相关化合物（如CaMn₂Bi₂）不同，后者的M位呈现四方锥配位，表明尽管同属CaAl₂Si₂结构家族，不同化合物的高压结构响应存在显著差异。

title: Locality-Induced Hierarchical Backflow Wavefunctions for Correlated Fermions
summary: We show that locality provides a natural principle to hierarchically organize backflow wavefunctions. This leads us to propose a family of variational fermionic states, termed hierarchical backflow (HB) wavefunctions. The expressive power of HB is systematically improvable, controlled by a path depth $K$ which reflects the range of backflow correlations. At half-filling, the HB with $K=1$ already achieves high energy precision, with an accuracy around $0.5\%$ for system sizes from $4\times 4$ to $10\times 10$. At hole doping $n_h=0.125$, the method scales efficiently to $12\times16$ and $16\times16$ systems, and the energy systematically achieves higher accuracy with $K$ increasing, yielding a clear stripe phase. The HB further enables a local-nonlocal decomposition, naturally bridging to neural quantum states, while featuring compact representations and efficient optimization. Our work reveals locality as a natural organizing principle of backflow wavefunctions, opening a new framework with systematic improvability and interpretability for large-scale simulations of correlated fermion systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出层次反流（HB）波函数，利用局域性原理层级化组织反流波函数，通过路径深度K系统提升表达能力，在半填充和空穴掺杂下均实现高精度能量计算，并在大尺度系统中观察到清晰的条纹相，同时支持局域-非局域分解，连接至神经量子态，为关联费米子系统的大规模模拟提供了可系统改进且可解释的新框架。
AI.motivation: 现有反流波函数在描述强关联费米子体系时存在表达能力有限、可扩展性不足的问题，缺乏系统性的改进路径。作者希望利用局域性这一自然原理来层级化组织反流波函数，实现表达能力的系统可控提升，以更好地模拟大尺度关联费米子系统。
AI.method: 提出层次反流（HB）波函数族，引入路径深度K作为控制反流关联范围的核心超参数，通过层级化结构系统提升波函数的表达能力。该方法支持局域-非局域分解，可自然衔接神经量子态，同时保持紧凑的表示形式和高效的优化过程。
AI.result: 在半填充条件下（从4×4到10×10系统），K=1的HB波函数已实现约0.5%的高精度能量误差。在空穴掺杂n_h=0.125时，方法可高效扩展至12×16和16×16系统，随着K增大能量精度系统性地提升，并清晰观察到条纹相。
AI.conclusion: 局域性是反流波函数的一种自然组织原理，HB波函数为大规模关联费米子模拟提供了兼具系统性改进能力和可解释性的新框架。

title: Wilson Holonomy and Spectral Monodromy in Spin-Orbit Rings: Effective Gauge Connections and Loop Observables
comment: 40 pages, 8 figures. Submission to SciPost Physics
summary: A spin-orbit Hamiltonian with an effective gauge structure carries two distinct loop objects that are routinely conflated: an energy-independent Wilson holonomy, which organizes interference and internal spin transport, and an energy-dependent monodromy, which quantizes the spectrum. We show that cleanly separating these objects supplies a precise, computable bridge between the loop/holonomy representation of gauge theories and condensed-matter spin-orbit transport. The construction maps a spin-orbit Hamiltonian to an effective $U(1)$ plus internal non-Abelian connection, reduces it to a first-order transport problem, and reads physical predictions from holonomy, monodromy, curvature, and eigenphase data. Two rings make the separation explicit. For a Dirac (graphene) ring with Rashba coupling and Aharonov-Bohm flux, the total holonomy factorizes exactly into a commuting $U(1)$ flux phase times an internal spin/pseudospin holonomy, and the spectrum follows from a holonomy-eigenvalue condition. For a Rashba-Dresselhaus ring, the internal $SU(2)$ transport is genuinely non-Abelian away from the $α=\pmβ$ pure-gauge locus, where curvature controls path ordering; spectral quantization then requires an explicit first-order reduction obtained by phase-space doubling of the second-order Schrödinger problem. A non-Abelian Stokes formulation and Magnus expansion serve as ordering diagnostics rather than spectral tools. Spin-network ideas enter only as historical geometric motivation, not as a dynamical import into spintronics.

AI.tldr: 本文严格区分了自旋-轨道哈密顿量中的Wilson holonomy（能量无关）与monodromy（能量相关），并构建了从规范理论到凝聚态自旋-轨道输运的可计算桥梁，通过Dirac环和Rashba-Dresselhaus环两个实例展示了分离的有效性。
AI.motivation: 自旋-轨道哈密顿量中存在两种不同的环状对象（Wilson holonomy与monodromy）常被混淆，作者旨在清晰分离它们，建立规范理论环/和乐表示与凝聚态自旋-轨道输运之间的精确、可计算桥梁。
AI.method: 将自旋-轨道哈密顿量映射为有效U(1)加内部非阿贝尔联络，约化为一阶输运问题，从holonomy、monodromy、曲率和本征相位数据中读取物理预言。利用Dirac（石墨烯）环和Rashba-Dresselhaus环两个实例进行具体分离和验证。
AI.result: Dirac环中总holonomy可精确分解为对易的U(1)通量相位乘内部自旋/赝自旋holonomy，谱由holonomy本征值条件给出。Rashba-Dresselhaus环中，除α=±β纯规范点外内部SU(2)输运真正非阿贝尔，曲率控制路径排序，谱量化需通过相空间加倍的一阶约化。
AI.conclusion: 非阿贝尔Stokes公式和Magnus展开仅作为排序诊断工具而非谱工具；自旋网络概念仅作为几何动机的历史背景，而非向自旋电子学的动力学引入。

title: Robust control over polar skyrmion bubble density with a combined optical and electrical approach
summary: Polar skyrmion bubbles are nanoscale ferroelectric domain configurations with swirling polarization textures, and often emerge in ferroelectric oxide systems. Owing to their inhomogeneous polarization patterns, which endow them with distinct topologies and electrical responses from homogeneous monodomains, polar skyrmion bubbles are envisaged to be promising candidates for non-volatile memory devices. In such device, the recorded information density is directly proportional to the density of bubbles, underscoring the need for precise control over bubble nucleation. Here, using first-principles-based calculations, we demonstrate that when assisted with a DC electric field, twisted light, which has a spatially inhomogeneous field pattern, can robustly tune the density of polar skyrmion bubbles in ferroelectric ultrathin films between $10^2\sim 10^4 \rm{bit}/μm^2$. Moreover, by modulating DC and optical field strengths together with the beam radius, the nucleation rate, which characterizes the creation and annihilation speed of polar skyrmion bubbles, can also be well controlled. These findings highlight the unique response of ferroelectric nanofilms to optical and electric fields, which is crucial for employing polar skyrmion bubbles in the next-generation of ultrahigh-density memory technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算发现，在直流电场辅助下，扭曲光（具有空间不均匀场模式）能够稳健地调控铁电超薄膜中极性斯格明子气泡的密度（10²~10⁴ bit/μm²），并通过调节直流和光场强度及光束半径，有效控制气泡的成核速率，为下一代超高密度存储器技术提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 极性斯格明子气泡因其不均匀极化模式带来的独特拓扑结构和电学响应，被认为是非易失性存储器件的理想候选材料。然而，存储信息密度直接取决于气泡密度，因此精确控制气泡成核至关重要。当前缺乏有效调控气泡密度和成核速率的手段，亟需探索新的控制方法。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理的计算方法，研究在直流电场辅助下，扭曲光（具有空间不均匀光场模式）对铁电超薄膜中极性斯格明子气泡密度和成核速率的影响。通过调节直流电场强度、光场强度以及光束半径等参数，系统分析了这些因素对气泡行为的调控效果。
AI.result: 研究表明，扭曲光结合直流电场可以稳健地将极性斯格明子气泡的密度调控在10²~10⁴ bit/μm²范围内；同时，通过调制直流和光场强度及光束半径，气泡的成核速率（表征气泡产生和湮灭速度）也可以得到有效控制。
AI.conclusion: 该发现揭示了铁电纳米薄膜对光场和电场的独特响应机制，为将极性斯格明子气泡应用于下一代超高密度存储器技术提供了关键理论依据和调控策略。

title: Catalytic precursor dissociation in Hot-Wire CVD and comparing a-Si:H growth under continuous and pulsed silane flow conditions
comment: Precursor reaction modelling and comparison with experiments
summary: Hot-wire Chemical vapor deposition (HWCVD) of hydrogenated amorphous silicon (a-Si:H) thin films utilizes the dissociation of silane (SiH4) precursor over heated tungsten or tantalum filaments (\geq 1600 °C). In this work, assuming catalytic dissociation mechanism, we present kinetic model for SiH4 dissociation and the resulting a-Si:H film growth. Our model calculations showed that for an identical dose of the introduced SiH4 precursor, a-Si:H thickness was considerably higher for the pulsed SiH4 flow as compared to the continuous SiH4 flow. The pulsed SiH4 flow is represented by time intervals t_ON and t_OFF, where the SiH4 flow rate (F_(SiH_4)) is at the set-point and zero, respectively. In agreement with our model calculations for an introduced 75 cm^3 (STP) SiH4 dose, the resulting a-Si:H film thickness was 175 \pm 5 nm under continuous precursor flow, whereas it considerably increased to 425 \pm 8 nm when this SiH4 dose was split into 15 shorter pulses (t_ON =15s ; t_OFF = 60s). Moreover, these a-Si:H films deposited using pulsed SiH4 flow exhibited improved electrical properties, with a dark conductivity ({σ_d}) of 1.1 \times 10^-11 S/cm and a photoconductivity ({σ_ph}) of \sim 5.8 \times 10^-5 S/cm, compared to films deposited under continuous SiH4 flow (σ_d \sim 2.5 \times 10^-10 S/cm and σ_ph \sim 3.5 \times 10^-6 S/cm).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了热丝化学气相沉积(HWCVD)制备氢化非晶硅(a-Si:H)薄膜时，采用脉冲式硅烷(SiH4)气流相比连续气流能显著提高薄膜厚度（从175nm增至425nm）并改善电学性能（暗电导率降低，光电导率升高）。
AI.motivation: 探索通过脉冲SiH4气流方式替代传统连续气流，提高a-Si:H薄膜的沉积效率和电学性能。
AI.method: 建立基于催化解离机制的动力学模型，比较连续SiH4气流与脉冲SiH4气流（t_ON=15s, t_OFF=60s）下相同SiH4剂量（75 cm³ STP）的a-Si:H薄膜沉积过程。
AI.result: 脉冲气流下薄膜厚度425±8nm，远高于连续气流的175±5nm；脉冲气流的暗电导率1.1×10⁻¹¹ S/cm，光电导率~5.8×10⁻⁵ S/cm，均优于连续气流（σ_d~2.5×10⁻¹⁰ S/cm, σ_ph~3.5×10⁻⁶ S/cm）。
AI.conclusion: 脉冲SiH4气流可显著提升a-Si:H薄膜的沉积速率和光电性能，是一种优于连续气流的薄膜制备策略。

title: Doping- and temperature-dependent electronic structure and spin dynamics in the Hubbard model on a square lattice within cluster perturbation theory
summary: The doping and temperature dependencies of the electronic structure and the dynamic spin susceptibility of the Hubbard model on a square lattice are studied within cluster perturbation theory (CPT). The most general features of both electronic and spin spectra qualitatively agree with the experimental data on cuprates. Generalized mean-field calculations of the electronic structure using static short-range magnetic correlations from CPT are also implemented and compared with the results of CPT, allowing us to discuss the role of short-range antiferromagnetism in the formation of the pseudogap.

AI.tldr: 本文利用团簇微扰理论(CPT)研究了正方晶格Hubbard模型的电子结构和动态自旋磁化率随掺杂和温度的变化，发现电子和自旋谱的总体特征与铜氧化物实验数据定性一致，并通过与广义平均场计算的比较，探讨了短程反铁磁性在赝能隙形成中的作用。
AI.motivation: 理解铜氧化物高温超导体的电子结构和磁性质，特别是赝能隙现象的起源及其与短程反铁磁关联的关系。
AI.method: 采用团簇微扰理论(CPT)计算正方晶格Hubbard模型的电子结构和动态自旋磁化率，同时进行基于CPT静态短程磁关联的广义平均场计算，两者进行比较分析。
AI.result: 电子和自旋谱的总体特征与铜氧化物实验数据定性一致，CPT与平均场计算对比揭示了短程反铁磁对赝能隙形成的作用。
AI.conclusion: 短程反铁磁关联在赝能隙的形成中起关键作用，CPT方法能有效描述铜氧化物高温超导体的电子和磁性质。

title: Hot carrier diffusion-assisted ideal carrier multiplication in monolayer MoSe2
summary: Carrier multiplication (CM), the process of generating multiple charge carriers from a single photon, offers an opportunity to exceed the Shockley-Queisser limit in photovoltaic applications. Despite extensive research, no material has yet achieved ideal CM efficiency, primarily owing to significant energy losses from carrier-lattice scattering. In this study, we demonstrate that monolayer MoSe2 can attain the theoretical maximum CM efficiency permitted by energy-momentum conservation principle, using ultrafast transient absorption spectroscopy. By resolving the scatter-free ballistic transport of hot carriers and validating our findings with first-principles calculations, we identify the cornerstone of optimal CM in monolayer MoSe2: superior hot-carrier dynamics characterized by suppressed energy dissipation via minimized carrier-lattice scattering, and the availability of abundant CM pathways facilitated by 2Eg band nesting. Comparative analysis with bulk MoSe2 further emphasizes the enhanced CM efficiency in the monolayer, attributed by superior hot-carrier diffusion and access to additional CM pathways. These results position monolayer MoSe2 as a promising candidate for high-performance optoelectronic applications, providing a robust platform for next-generation energy conversion technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文证明单层MoSe₂能够实现理论最大载流子倍增效率，主要归因于其优异的热载流子动力学特性（抑制载流子-晶格散射）以及由2Eg能带嵌套提供的丰富CM路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管载流子倍增（CM）有望突破Shockley-Queisser极限，但以往材料因载流子-晶格散射导致的能量损失而无法达到理想CM效率。本文旨在寻找能实现理论最大CM效率的材料体系。
AI.method: 采用超快瞬态吸收光谱技术，结合无散射弹道输运解析与第一性原理计算验证，对比分析单层MoSe₂与体相MoSe₂的CM性能差异。
AI.result: 单层MoSe₂达到了能量-动量守恒原理允许的理论最大CM效率；相比体相MoSe₂，单层具有更高的CM效率，归因于更好的热载流子扩散和更多CM路径。
AI.conclusion: 单层MoSe₂是实现高性能光电子应用和下一代能量转换技术的有力候选材料。

title: Benchmark Dataset for Catalysis on 2D MXenes
summary: Merging first-principles calculations with machine learning (ML), we aim to accelerate the exploration of catalytic behaviour in novel materials. We focus on two-dimensional (2D) Ti$_2$CT$_y$ MXenes, whose versatile surface chemistry makes them particularly compelling candidates for catalysis. Resolving their composition and structure under realistic conditions exceeds the reach of standard density functional theory (DFT) due to computational cost. To address this challenge, we generate a comprehensive dataset of 50,000 DFT calculations for training and 10,000 for testing, encompassing both Ti$_2$CT$_y$ MXene configurations and molecular systems, along with an additional test dataset with 1000 genuinely new, larger systems to investigate how well models generalise. We train and validate widely used and competitive machine learning interatomic potential (MLIP) models, including EquiformerV2, MACE, MatRIS, and UPET, that accurately predict atomic forces and formation energies -- quantities that DFT must repeatedly compute for structural and catalytic investigations -- for these 2D materials. This combined DFT-ML framework achieves computational acceleration on the order of approximately $1-4 \cdot 10^3$ (on a CPU) while maintaining desired-level accuracy (approximately +/- $10$ meV/A for forces and approximately +/- $1$ meV for per-atom energies), paving the way for more efficient investigations of MXene catalytic behaviour. Moreover, we perform an extensive qualitative evaluation of the trained models, showcasing the importance of comprehensive simulation-based comparison beyond benchmark metrics. The dataset and the trained models with the code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/CatalystAnonymous/catalyst_mxenes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合第一性原理计算与机器学习，构建了包含50,000个DFT计算数据的MXene催化剂数据集，训练了EquiformerV2、MACE、MatRIS、UPET等机器学习原子间势模型，实现了约三个数量级的计算加速，同时保持高精度（力误差约±10 meV/Å，能量误差约±1 meV/原子），为高效探索二维Ti₂CT_y MXene催化行为提供了新框架。
AI.motivation: 标准密度泛函理论(DFT)在解析二维Ti₂CT_y MXene在实际条件下的组成和结构时计算成本过高，难以满足催化行为探索的需求，因此需要引入机器学习加速计算。
AI.method: 生成50,000个DFT计算数据用于训练，10,000个用于测试，外加1,000个全新更大系统测试泛化能力；训练EquiformerV2、MACE、MatRIS、UPET四种MLIP模型，预测原子力和形成能。
AI.result: MLIP模型在CPU上实现约1-4×10³倍计算加速，力精度约±10 meV/Å，每原子能量精度约±1 meV；同时进行了全面的定性评估，展示了超越基准指标的模拟比较的重要性。
AI.conclusion: DFT-ML联合框架能高效加速MXene催化行为的研究，数据集和模型已开源发布。

title: Microscopic Theory of the Phonon Thermal Hall Effect in Chiral Mott Insulators
summary: The thermal Hall effect (THE) probes charge-neutral excitations in insulators, where the charge gap blocks electronic transport. Recently, phonons have been shown to induce a THE comparable in magnitude to the spin contribution, underscoring their critical role in thermal transport. Here, we develop a microscopic theory of the phonon thermal Hall effect (PTHE) in chiral Mott insulators. First, we derive the exact analytic form of the effective Raman interaction in half-filled Mott insulators, showing that its strength is directly proportional to the scalar spin chirality. Next, we demonstrate the intrinsic PTHE explicitly on the kagome lattice. Crucially, our formulation reveals a temperature-dependent crossover in the transport behavior under isotopic substitution. Using this result, we establish a scaling law that quantitatively separates the phonon contribution to the THE from other background signals. Our results not only provide the first fully microscopic derivation of the PTHE, but also establish a definitive experimental standard for isolating microscopic heat carriers in chiral Mott insulators.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了手性Mott绝缘体中声子热霍尔效应的微观理论，推导了有效Raman相互作用的精确解析形式，证明了其强度正比于标量自旋手性，并在kagome晶格上展示了内禀声子热霍尔效应，建立了定量分离声子贡献的标度律。
AI.motivation: 热霍尔效应可探测绝缘体中的中性激发，但声子贡献与自旋贡献量级相当，需澄清其机制。现有理论缺乏对声子热霍尔效应的微观描述，无法定量分离不同热载流子的贡献。
AI.method: 首先推导半满Mott绝缘体中有效Raman相互作用的精确解析形式；然后在kagome晶格上展示内禀声子热霍尔效应；通过同位素替代研究输运行为的温度依赖交叉，建立定量分离声子贡献的标度律。
AI.result: 得到了有效Raman相互作用强度正比于标量自旋手性的精确形式；揭示了同位素替代下输运行为的温度依赖交叉；建立了定量分离声子与背景信号贡献的标度律。
AI.conclusion: 首次提供了声子热霍尔效应的完全微观理论推导，为在手性Mott绝缘体中隔离微观热载流子建立了明确的实验标准。

title: Signatures of Rashba-Cavity-Induced Berry-curvature redistribution in the Spin-Hall Conductivity of Semiconductor Artificial Graphene
summary: We investigate the combined effect of a far-infrared cavity field and Rashba spin-orbit interac- tion on the band structure and transport properties of artificial graphene composed of quazi-2D InAs/GaAs quantum dots. The coupling to cavity photons is modeled by constructing a complete basis as the tensor product of the electronic Hilbert space and the Fock space. Our calculations for the system embedded in a linear cavity predict the existence of both type-I and type-II Dirac points which can be distinguished by their response to Rashba interaction. Namely, Rashba coupling opens a gap at type-II Dirac points, while type-I Dirac points remain gapless. For both cylindrical and linear cavities, we demonstrate the formation of electron-photon hybrid states and Rabi oscillations between energy minibands. Multiple splittings, crossings, and anticrossings between Dirac-band replicas produce pronounced modifications of the spin-Hall conductivity, including strong anisotropy and oscillatory behavior controlled by cavity geometry and polarization. Our results show that the interplay between Rashba and cavity couplings governs Dirac-point physics and provides a route toward tunable polaritonic transport and topological phases in engineered nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了远红外腔场和Rashba自旋轨道相互作用对人工石墨烯（InAs/GaAs量子点）能带结构和输运性质的影响，发现了两类Dirac点对Rashba耦合的不同响应，以及电子-光子混合态和Rabi振荡，并展示了自旋霍尔电导率的各向异性和振荡行为。
AI.motivation: 探究远红外腔场与Rashba自旋轨道相互作用在人工石墨烯中的联合效应，理解二者协同如何调控Dirac点物理和拓扑输运性质。
AI.method: 将电子Hilbert空间与Fock空间的张量积作为完备基，构建电子-光子耦合模型；分别对柱状和线性腔体进行计算分析。
AI.result: 发现了类型-I和类型-II两类Dirac点：类型-II被Rashba耦合打开能隙，类型-I保持无隙；观察到电子-光子混合态和Rabi振荡；Dirac带副本间的分裂、交叉和反交叉导致自旋霍尔电导率出现强各向异性和振荡行为。
AI.conclusion: Rashba与腔耦合的协同作用主导了Dirac点物理，为在人工纳米结构中实现可调谐的极化激元输运和拓扑相提供了新途径。

title: Data-Driven Discovery of Unconventional Antiferromagnets
summary: Unconventional antiferromagnets combine zero net magnetization with spin-split electronic bands, offering a distinct, important platform for spintronics. Their discovery, however, has so far depended largely on case-by-case studies and on a limited number of compounds with experimentally resolved magnetic structures. Here, we overcome these bottlenecks by resolving magnetic ground states across a broad materials database. We narrow down 37163 magnets from the Materials Project to 189 collinear antiferromagnets by combining physics-informed prescreening, high-throughput exchange calculations and Luttinger-Tisza analysis. Among these, symmetry analysis identifies 36 altermagnets and 11 Luttinger-compensated ferrimagnets (LCFs), including 22 altermagnets and 9 LCFs that have not been reported previously. The identified unconventional antiferromagnets can support nonrelativistic spin Hall effects and doping-tunable spin transport with switchable polarization and giant anisotropy. Our framework converts broad structural databases into a curated, symmetry-classified set of experimentally testable compensated spin-split magnets, establishing a scalable route for the efficient discovery of functional antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高通量计算和对称性分析，从37163种磁性材料中筛选出189种共线反铁磁体，并识别出36种交变磁体和11种Luttinger补偿铁磁体，其中包含22种和9种此前未报道过的材料，为功能反铁磁体的高效发现提供了可扩展的框架。
AI.motivation: 传统上非常规反铁磁体的发现依赖于个例研究和有限的已知化合物，缺乏系统性的筛选方法，效率低下。
AI.method: 结合物理学先验筛选、高通量交换计算和Luttinger-Tisza分析，从Materials Project数据库中37163种磁性材料中系统筛选，再通过对称性分析识别交变磁体和Luttinger补偿铁磁体。
AI.result: 识别出189种共线反铁磁体，其中36种交变磁体和11种Luttinger补偿铁磁体，包括22种和9种首次报道的材料；这些材料展现出非相对论性自旋霍尔效应、可掺杂调控的自旋输运、可切换极化和巨大各向异性等特性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将广泛的结构数据库转化为经过筛选和对称性分类的、实验可测试的补偿自旋分裂磁体集合，为高效发现功能性反铁磁体提供了可扩展的路线。

title: Topological Surface States and Anisotropic Magnetotransport in SnSb$_6$Te$_{10}$
summary: We have investigated the electronic structure and magnetotransport properties of SnSb$_6$Te$_{10}$ single crystals using density functional theory (DFT), synchrotron-based angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), and quantum transport measurements. Our DFT calculations reveal a clear spin-orbit coupling driven band inversion between the Sb-$p$ and Te-$p$ states together with a non-trivial $\mathbb{Z}_2$ topological invariant. The calculated surface-state dispersion and hexagonally warped Fermi surface contours agree well with the ARPES measurements. Temperature-dependent transport measurements indicate dominant electron-phonon scattering, while Hall measurements confirm hole-type carriers with carrier density of the order of $10^{21}$ cm$^{-3}$. Both transverse and longitudinal magnetotransport exhibit weak antilocalization behavior, while Shubnikov-de Haas oscillations observed for $H \parallel c$ yield a Berry phase close to $π$, consistent with Dirac-like surface states. Furthermore, angle-dependent magnetotransport measurements reveal pronounced anisotropy associated with an anisotropic Fermi surface topology and mixed bulk-surface transport behavior. Our combined theoretical and experimental results establish SnSb$_6$Te$_{10}$ as a strong topological insulator and a promising platform for investigating topological transport phenomena in layered telluride systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算、ARPES和量子输运测量，证明了SnSb₆Te₁₀单晶是一种强拓扑绝缘体，具有自旋-轨道耦合驱动的能带反转、非平庸的Z₂拓扑不变量，以及狄拉克锥表面态，并观察到了弱反局域化行为和接近π的Berry相位。
AI.motivation: 为了在层状碲化物体系中寻找和研究新的强拓扑绝缘体材料，探索其拓扑输运现象。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论(DFT)计算、同步辐射角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和量子输运测量（包括变温电阻、霍尔效应、弱反局域化分析以及Shubnikov-de Haas振荡）进行综合研究。
AI.result: 1) DFT显示Sb-p和Te-p态之间存在自旋-轨道耦合驱动的能带反转及非平庸Z₂拓扑不变量；2) ARPES观测与计算的表面态色散和六角形扭曲费米面一致；3) 载流子为空穴型，密度约10²¹ cm⁻³；4) 输运显示弱反局域化行为；5) Shubnikov-de Haas振荡给出接近π的Berry相位，证实狄拉克表面态；6) 角度依赖输运显示各向异性和体-面混合输运行为。
AI.conclusion: SnSb₆Te₁₀是一种强拓扑绝缘体，是研究层状碲化物体系中拓扑输运现象的有前景的平台。

title: Spin Dynamics from Niu-Kleinman Adiabatic Approach and Slave Boson Mean Field Theory
summary: Spin-wave excitations provide a central probe of magnetic order and electronic correlations in strongly correlated materials. In this work, we develop an adiabatic theory of spin dynamics by combining the Niu-Kleinman formalism with Kotliar-Ruckenstein slave-boson theory (NK+KRSB). For each frozen spin configuration, the constrained slave-boson saddle point is solved self-consistently, allowing the Berry-curvature matrix and energy Hessian entering the linearized adiabatic equations of motion to be extracted directly. Applied to the half-filled single-orbital Hubbard model, the resulting spin-wave dispersion shows substantially improved agreement with determinant quantum Monte Carlo benchmarks compared with the random phase approximation and closely approaches results from the time-dependent Gutzwiller approximation. We further extend the method to a two-orbital model of $\mathrm{La}_2\mathrm{NiO}_4$, demonstrating its applicability to realistic multi-orbital correlated systems. Because the approach only requires saddle-point solutions near the magnetic ground state, it remains computationally efficient while incorporating strong-correlation effects beyond conventional weak-coupling descriptions, providing a practical framework for studying low-energy spin excitations in correlated quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Niu-Kleinman形式与Kotliar-Ruckenstein奴隶玻色子理论（NK+KRSB）的自旋动力学绝热理论，用于从强关联材料中计算自旋波激发。该方法在半填充单轨道Hubbard模型中的自旋波色散相比随机相位近似有显著改进，并接近时间依赖Gutzwiller近似的结果。同时，该方法被扩展至La₂NiO₄的双轨道模型，展示了其在真实多轨道关联系统中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有自旋波激发计算方法在强关联体系中存在局限：弱耦合方法（如随机相位近似）无法充分描述强关联效应，而更精确的方法计算成本高昂。因此，需要一种既能捕捉强关联效应、又在计算上高效的自旋动力学理论。
AI.method: 将Niu-Kleinman绝热几何形式与Kotliar-Ruckenstein奴隶玻色子理论相结合。对于每个冻结的自旋构型，自洽求解约束的奴隶玻色子鞍点，进而提取Berry曲率矩阵和能量Hessian，代入线性化绝热运动方程以获得自旋波色散。
AI.result: 在半填充单轨道Hubbard模型中，该方法得到的自旋波色散相比RPA有显著改进，与行列式量子蒙特卡洛基准结果高度一致，并接近时间依赖Gutzwiller近似的结果。在La₂NiO₄双轨道模型中同样成功应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法仅需磁基态附近的鞍点解，计算高效，同时能够引入超越传统弱耦合描述的强关联效应，为研究关联量子材料中的低能自旋激发提供了一种实用框架。

title: Quantized orbital and spin Hall transport: interplay between $sp$-hybridization, altermagnetism and spin-orbit coupling
comment: Main text: 7 pages and 5 figures, SM: 4 pages and 3 figures
summary: We here explore the emergence of orbital and spin Hall effects, originating beyond the $L$-$S$ coupling, and investigate the interplay between inter-orbit hybridization, relativistic Rashba spin-orbit coupling (SOC), and non-relativistic SOC, namely altermagnetic (AM) order, in a two-dimensional model Hamiltonian. The orbital (spin) Hall responses are remarkably found to be quantized within a window of Fermi energy when the strength of AM order (Rashba SOC) exceeds (falls below) the scale set by $sp$-hybridization. Importantly, orbital and spin Hall quantizations are independent of Rashba SOC and AM order, respectively, while the uniform profiles of finite orbital and vanishingly small spin moments of bands around the Fermi energy. The microscopic origin of such quantization comes from the Fermi surface-activated orbital and spin Berry curvatures. The extent of the quantized regime is strongly controlled by the intra-orbital coupling strength. As the temperature increases, the quantization is significantly compromised in the spin Hall case. We extend our analysis to the orbital and spin Nernst coefficients where the pronounced dip-peak structures signal the existence of the quantization leading to experimental relevance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究二维模型哈密顿量中，超越L-S耦合的轨道和自旋霍尔效应的出现，发现当交变磁（AM）序强度（Rashba SOC）超过（低于）sp杂化标度时，轨道（自旋）霍尔响应在费米能窗口内呈现量子化。这种量子化分别独立于Rashba SOC和AM序，其微观起源来自费米面激活的轨道和自旋贝里曲率，并受温度影响。
AI.motivation: 探索超越传统L-S耦合框架下轨道和自旋霍尔效应的涌现机制，特别是理解轨道间杂化、相对论性Rashba自旋轨道耦合与非相对论性交变磁序之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 构建二维模型哈密顿量，通过分析轨道和自旋贝里曲率，计算轨道霍尔效应、自旋霍尔效应以及轨道和自旋能斯特系数，研究不同参数（AM序强度、Rashba SOC强度、sp杂化强度、温度）对量子化行为的影响。
AI.result: 发现轨道和自旋霍尔响应在特定参数窗内呈现量子化，量子化行为分别独立于Rashba SOC和AM序；轨道矩均匀有限而自旋矩可忽略；量子化范围受轨道内耦合强度控制；温度升高会破坏自旋霍尔量子化。
AI.conclusion: 轨道和自旋霍尔效应的量子化源于费米面激活的贝里曲率，不同的调控机制（AM序vs.Rashba SOC）分别主导轨道和自旋霍尔量子化，且轨道/自旋能斯特系数的尖峰-谷结构可作为量子化存在的实验可观测信号。

title: A literature-grounded scientific reasoning framework for defect-engineered TiO$_{2}$ photocatalysts
summary: Defect-engineered TiO$_2$ photocatalysts are extensively investigated for photocatalytic hydrogen evolution; however, the highly heterogeneous nature of the literature, including inconsistent descriptors, diverse synthesis protocols, non-uniform activity metrics, and incomplete mechanistic reporting, limits the applicability of conventional machine-learning approaches based solely on statistical regression. Here, we present a literature-grounded large language model (LLM)-assisted scientific reasoning framework for defect-engineered TiO$_2$ photocatalysts integrating curated literature data, mechanistic rule extraction, and retrieval-augmented reasoning. A harmonized database was constructed from experimentally relevant publications specifically selected for hydrogen-evolution-related defect engineering in TiO$_2$, covering polymorph-dependent behavior, hydrogenation conditions, Ti$^{3+}$ defect states, oxygen vacancies, illumination conditions, and photocatalytic activity descriptors. In parallel, mechanistic evidence sentences and publications-defined scientific rules were encoded into a structured reasoning layer enabling explainable inference beyond black-box prediction. The resulting framework combines structured experimental descriptors, semantic literature retrieval, and mechanistic interpretation to generate confidence-aware recommendations for optimal defect-engineering conditions. For example, the AI agent identified a consistent optimal anatase hydrogenation window centered at ~500 $°$C under H$_2$-containing atmospheres for approximately 1 h, supported by mechanistic evidence linking balanced Ti$^{3+}$/oxygen-vacancy populations with enhanced photocatalytic hydrogen evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的科学推理框架，用于分析缺陷工程TiO₂光催化剂文献。该框架整合了结构化实验数据、机制规则提取与检索增强推理，能够提供可解释的、置信度感知的缺陷工程条件推荐，例如识别出最佳锐钛矿氢化窗口约500°C、H₂气氛下处理1小时。
AI.motivation: 缺陷工程TiO₂光催化剂文献高度异质，存在描述符不一致、合成方案多样、活性指标不统一、机理报告不完整等问题，传统基于统计回归的机器学习方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含多态依赖性、氢化条件、Ti³⁺缺陷态、氧空位、光照条件和光催化活性描述符的协调数据库；同时将机制证据句和文献定义的科学规则编码为结构化推理层，结合结构化实验描述符、语义文献检索和机制解释，生成置信度感知的推荐。
AI.result: AI代理识别出最佳锐钛矿氢化窗口约为500°C、H₂气氛下处理1小时，机制证据表明该条件能平衡Ti³⁺/氧空位种群，从而增强光催化析氢。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LLM辅助科学推理框架能够克服文献异质性挑战，实现超越黑盒预测的可解释推理，为缺陷工程光催化剂的设计提供可靠指导。

title: Anisotropic Moiré Fractional Chern Insulators and Their Phase Transitions
summary: Recently, moiré heterostructures have been observed to host fractional Chern insulator (FCI) phases at zero magnetic field. In this work, we show that the FCI phases are robust against moderate lattice anisotropy, while sufficiently strong anisotropy drives quantum phase transitions from incompressible topological phases to competing charge-density-wave (CDW) and Fermi-liquid (FL) phases. Specifically, in the case of twisted transition metal dichalcogenides (such as MoTe$_2$), the anisotropy arises from an interlayer momentum shift induced by heterostrain. We find that increasing anisotropy suppresses the many-body topological gap, eventually destabilizing the fractional topological phase. Beyond a critical anisotropy value, the system gradually transitions to a symmetry-broken state characterized by stripe-like CDW order. It has a Landau Level counterpart, where effective mass anisotropy provides an additional tuning knob for the fractional quantum Hall state; sufficiently strong anisotropy drives a transition to a charge-ordered phase. Moreover, in the anisotropic ideal Chern band model with lattice stretching, a Fermi liquid phase emerges as anisotropy increases. Our results establish that anisotropy provides a direct route for engineering and exploring competing correlated phases in FCI states based on moiré materials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了moire异质结构中的分数量子陈绝缘体(FCI)相在晶格各向异性下的稳定性，发现中等各向异性下FCI相仍然稳健，但强各向异性会驱动量子相变，使其转变为电荷密度波(CDW)或费米液体(FL)相。
AI.motivation: 探索moire超晶格中FCI相在晶格各向异性下的稳定性，以及各向异性如何调控竞争性关联相，为在moire材料中工程化FCI态提供新路径。
AI.method: 采用理论模型分析，分别研究(a)扭曲过渡金属二硫化物(TMD)中由异质应变引起的层间动量偏移导致的各向异性；(b)理想Chern能带模型中的晶格拉伸各向异性。
AI.result: (1) 中等各向异性下FCI相仍稳健；(2) 强各向异性抑制多体拓扑能隙，导致FCI失稳；(3) TMD中超过临界各向异性值后过渡到条纹状CDW有序态；(4) 理想Chern带模型中各向异性增大时出现费米液相。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性是工程化和探索moire材料中FCI竞争关联相的直接调控手段，类似于分数量子霍尔效应中的有效质量各向异性调控。

title: Quantum Statistics and Structural Topology Govern Thermal Transport in Two-Dimensional Monolayer Amorphous Carbon
summary: We investigate the quantum thermal conductivity (TC) of two-dimensional monolayer amorphous carbon (MAC). We employ three distinct amorphization algorithms to generate various possible MAC configurations, ranging from Zachariasen-type continuous random networks to nanocrystallites embedded in random networks. The local bond order parameter, q3, is used to quantify the amorphousness of the structures, and TC is computed as functions of q3 and temperature. This framework enables us to assess how structural topology, degree of amorphization, and quantum statistics contribute to heat conduction in a two-dimensional amorphous solid. At room temperature, TC values are predicted to range between 3.5 to 10 W/m/K, in agreement with recent experiments. Analysis of vibrational modes reveals that, while the modes of these 2D amorphous structures fall into the usual categories, namely, propagons, diffusons, and locons, their polarization characteristics display distinct behavior. Owing to the fully quantum mechanical framework, we examine both low- and high-temperature characteristics of this 2D amorphous system. By examining the classical limit, we show that classical treatments substantially overestimate the TC of MAC; namely, the quantum TC is less than half of the classical value at room temperature and up to nearly an order of magnitude lower at low temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文利用三种非晶化算法生成二维单层非晶碳（MAC）的不同构型，通过局部键序参数q₃量化非晶度，计算了量子热导率（TC）与q₃和温度的关系，发现室温下TC在3.5-10 W/m/K之间，且量子TC在室温和低温下分别低于经典值的一半和近一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 探索二维非晶固体的结构拓扑、非晶化程度和量子统计如何共同影响热传导，填补对二维非晶碳热输运机制理解的空白。
AI.method: 采用三种非晶化算法生成不同MAC构型（从Zachariasen型连续随机网络到嵌入随机网络的纳米晶），利用q₃量化非晶度，在完整量子力学框架下计算TC并分析振动模式（propagons、diffusons、locons）的极化特性。
AI.result: 室温下TC预测值为3.5-10 W/m/K，与实验吻合；量子TC在室温下小于经典值的一半，低温下低近一个数量级；振动模式极化特性呈现独特行为。
AI.conclusion: 经典处理会显著高估二维非晶碳的热导率，必须采用量子力学框架才能准确描述其热输运性质，尤其在低温条件下。

title: Enhanced Spin-to-Charge Conversion in Bi2Se3/NiFe via Interface Engineering with a Ti Spacer Layer
summary: Topological insulators have attracted significant attention in spintronics due to their topological surface states and spin-momentum-locking-driven spin-to-charge conversion. Among these, Bi2Se3 has been extensively investigated because of its large bulk bandgap and single Dirac cone band structure. However, spin-to-charge conversion strongly depends on the quality of the topological insulator/ferromagnet interface. Here, we investigate spin-to-charge conversion in a sputter-deposited heterostructure comprising a topological insulator (Bi2Se3) and a ferromagnetic NiFe thin film separated by a titanium spacer layer. The Bi2Se3 layer is deposited on a silicon substrate for industrial compatibility. Pure spin current is injected into the Bi2Se3 layer through the titanium spacer via spin pumping induced by spin precession during microwave-driven ferromagnetic resonance of the ferromagnetic film. Spin pumping studies are performed by varying the Bi2Se3 thickness. The Gilbert damping parameter exhibits a significant 55% increase at a Bi2Se3 thickness of 4 nm, indicating a pure surface-state contribution. The spin Hall angle, which quantifies the spin-to-charge conversion efficiency, increases by an order of magnitude upon insertion of the titanium spacer layer. This enhancement is attributed to the suppression of interdiffusion between the Bi2Se3 and NiFe layers by titanium, thereby preserving the topological surface states. These findings highlight the important role of titanium spacer layers in spintronic devices based on topological materials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在工业兼容的硅基底上，通过磁控溅射制备Bi2Se3/NiFe异质结构并插入钛间隔层，实现了自旋-电荷转换效率的显著提升（自旋霍尔角提高一个数量级），归因于钛层抑制了界面互扩散，保护了拓扑表面态。
AI.motivation: 拓扑绝缘体/铁磁体界面质量严重影响自旋-电荷转换效率，而传统制备方法存在界面互扩散问题，亟需在工业兼容的衬底上寻找有效的界面优化方案。
AI.method: 在硅基底上通过磁控溅射制备Bi2Se3/Ti/NiFe异质结构，利用微波驱动铁磁共振的自旋泵浦注入纯自旋流，通过改变Bi2Se3厚度研究吉尔伯特阻尼参数的变化，并对比有无钛间隔层的自旋霍尔角。
AI.result: Bi2Se3厚度为4 nm时吉尔伯特阻尼参数显著增加55%，表明纯表面态贡献；插入钛间隔层后自旋霍尔角提高一个数量级，证明钛层有效抑制了Bi2Se3与NiFe之间的互扩散。
AI.conclusion: 钛间隔层在基于拓扑材料的自旋电子器件中起着关键作用，通过保护拓扑表面态大幅增强自旋-电荷转换效率，为工业兼容的硅基拓扑自旋电子器件提供了可行的界面工程策略。

title: Quenching of Nonrelativistic p-Wave Spin Splitting by c-f Decoupling in CeNiAsO
summary: The extending of spin-space group symmetries to coplanar antiferromagnets has predicted the emergence of odd-parity nonrelativistic spin splittings, making the identification of a practical $p$-wave magnet a central pursuit in spintronics. The layered heavy-fermion oxypnictide CeNiAsO has been widely regarded as the prototypical platform to verify this paradigm, as its commensurate coplanar magnetic configuration is theoretically expected to induce a robust $p$-wave band splitting. Here, we investigate the electronic structure of single-crystal CeNiAsO using ultra-low-temperature, high-resolution, and resonant angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES). Across the consecutive magnetic transitions into the ordered phases, our spectroscopic data reveal neither the expected band folding associated with a spin density wave nor any observable $p$-wave band splitting, demonstrating that the conduction bands retain full Kramers degeneracy. By tracking the temperature dependence of the Ce 4$f$ spectral weight via resonant ARPES, we find no evidence of coherent $c-f$ hybridization near the Fermi level within the magnetically ordered states, confirming that the Ce 4$f$ electrons operate in the localized limit. Our findings establish a clear many-body constraint on projecting real-space magnetic symmetries onto momentum-space electronic bands, demonstrating that geometric symmetry classifications constitute a necessary framework but are not a sufficient condition for nonrelativistic spin splittings in the presence of strong electronic correlations.

AI.tldr: 实验表明，尽管CeNiAsO的共面反铁磁构型理论上应产生p波自旋劈裂，但超高分辨ARPES未观察到任何能带折叠或自旋劈裂，证明强关联效应破坏了磁对称性向动量空间的投影。
AI.motivation: 自旋空间群对称性在共面反铁磁体中预言了奇宇称非相对论自旋劈裂，寻找p波磁体成为自旋电子学的核心目标。CeNiAsO被理论认为是验证该范式的理想平台。
AI.method: 使用超低温、高分辨、共振角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）对CeNiAsO单晶进行电子结构测量，并追踪Ce 4f谱权重的温度依赖关系。
AI.result: 在磁有序相中未观察到预期的自旋密度波能带折叠或p波能带劈裂，导带保持完全的Kramers简并；共振ARPES显示费米能级附近无c-f杂化信号，Ce 4f电子处于局域极限。
AI.conclusion: 几何对称性分类是产生非相对论自旋劈裂的必要框架，但在强关联电子体系中并非充分条件。真实空间磁对称性到动量空间能带的投影受多体效应约束。

title: Universal Right-Hand Chirality of Evanescent Vector Fields
summary: A locking between propagation direction $\hat{\bf q}$, spin $\hat{\bf S}$, and surface or interface normal $\hat{\bf n}$ -- a phenomenon broadly termed \textit{chirality} -- pervades evanescent or surface waves in optics, magnetism, plasmonics, and acoustics. Yet, it is not known whether the phenomenon is universal or bound to conditions. Here, we unveil that any \textit{source-free} vector field that propagates along $\hat{\bf q}$ and is evanescent along $\hat{\bf n}$, the existence of a spin automatically enforces a rigid, right-handed locking among $\hat{\bf q}$, $\hat{\bf S}$, and $\hat{\bf n}$, that is characterized by a chirality index $C_{\bf q}\equiv \hat{\bf n}\cdot(\hat{\bf S}\times \hat{\bf q})>0$. For an arbitrary propagation direction defined by $\hat{\bf q}\cdot \hat{\bf S}\equiv η\in [-1,1]$, i.e., not necessarily transverse spin, we derive a fundamental upper bound $C_{\bf q}\le \sqrt{1-η^2}$. The universal absence of left-handed evanescent (source-less) vector fields underscores the fundamental physical non-equivalence of mirror-image configurations -- a principle echoed by parity violation, the natural excess of enantiomers in chiral molecules, and the fixed chirality of DNA.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了任何无源矢量场在传播方向、自旋和界面法线之间必然存在右手定则的锁定关系（手性指数C_q > 0），并导出了自旋-传播方向夹角任意时的基本上界，证明左手性消逝波在物理上不可能存在。
AI.motivation: 探讨消逝波/表面波中传播方向、自旋与界面法线之间的手性锁定是普遍现象还是受限于特定条件，澄清这一基础物理问题。
AI.method: 从无源矢量场的基本物理约束出发，通过理论推导证明自旋-传播方向-界面法线三者之间的右手定则锁定关系，并导出任意自旋-传播方向夹角下的手性指数上界。
AI.result: 任何无源消逝矢量场必然存在右手性锁定（C_q > 0），左手性情形被普遍排除；导出了C_q ≤ √(1-η²)的基本上界。
AI.conclusion: 左手性消逝（无源）矢量场的普遍缺失揭示了镜像对称结构在物理上的非等价性，与宇称不守恒、手性分子中对映体的天然过剩以及DNA固定手性等原理相通。

title: Stationarity-constrained representative volume elements for image-based homogenization of granular microstructures
summary: We present an image-based workflow for Representative Elementary Volume (REV) sizing in chemically mapped granular microstructures. The REV is treated as a finite-window convergence scale within approximately stationary material domains, rather than as a global length assigned to a non-stationary image. Full-resolution backscattered-electron (BSE) gray-level maps are screened by local mean and standard-deviation compatibility to identify stationary domains. Candidate windows are sampled only inside these domains, and the representative support is selected using a persistent mean--spectral criterion requiring both the apparent-mean residual and the low-wavenumber covariance-spectrum residual to remain within tolerance over the non-reference tail. Ensemble reproducibility is used as an auxiliary check. Applied to seven full-resolution BSE images of dune-sand microstructures, the strict stationary-domain criterion gives $(L_{\rm REV}=1536~\mathrm{pixels})$, corresponding to $(\ell_{\rm REV}\approx2.01~\mathrm{mm})$ for a BSE pixel size of $(1.31~μ\mathrm{m})$. Property-level homogenization on QEMSCAN-derived numerical maps independently supports this millimetre-scale estimate: the converted support is $(L_{\rm REV}^{\rm prop}=201.2)$ pixels and is snapped to the nearest tested size, $(L_{\rm REV}^{\rm prop}=204)$ pixels $(\ell_{\rm REV}^{\rm prop}=2.04~\mathrm{mm})$. This length lies in the large-window regime of the apparent conductivity, stiffness, and directional Young-modulus curves. The workflow provides a reproducible route for REV sizing while making explicit its dependence on stationarity, image field, window sequence, and target observable.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于图像的化学映射颗粒微观结构代表性基本单元（REV）尺寸确定工作流，通过平稳性域筛选和均值-谱双重收敛准则，在砂土微观结构图像上得到了约2.01 mm的REV尺寸。
AI.motivation: 传统REV尺寸确定方法通常假设全局平稳性，但实际微观结构图像往往非平稳，需要一种能够考虑局部平稳性、系统化确定REV尺寸的方法。
AI.method: 先通过局部均值与标准差兼容性筛选出平稳域；仅在平稳域内采样候选窗口；采用持久均值-谱准则（同时要求表观均值残差和低波数协方差谱残差在非参考尾部保持容差内）选择代表性支撑；并以系综可重复性作为辅助检查。
AI.result: 对七幅全分辨率BSE图像分析得到REV为1536像素（约2.01 mm）；基于QEMSCAN数值图的属性级均匀化独立支持该结果（204像素，约2.04 mm），该尺度位于表观电导率、刚度和方向性杨氏模量曲线的大窗口区域。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流提供了一条可重复的REV尺寸确定路径，明确揭示了REV对平稳性、图像视场、窗口序列和目标可观测量的依赖性。

title: Suppression of p-Wave Altermagnetism by Localized 4f Electrons in CeNiAsO
summary: Altermagnetism, characterized by momentum-dependent spin splitting and zero net magnetization, has so far been explored mainly in weakly or moderately correlated d-electron systems. How such symmetry-allowed band splitting manifests in heavy-fermion materials, where magnetic exchange competes with Kondo correlations, remains unclear. Here we use high-resolution angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy to investigate CeNiAsO, a heavy-fermion candidate for p-wave altermagnetism. Despite macroscopic signatures consistent with the proposed p-wave magnetic order, we find no resolvable near-Fermi-level p-wave exchange splitting on the Ni 3d-derived conduction bands across the Neel transitions. Fermi-surface mapping, orbital-resolved ARPES identify that the low-energy electronic structure is dominated by Ni 3d bands, while resonant photoemission reveals that the Ce 4f states remain predominantly localized with residual c-f hybridization. First-principles calculations further show that an uncorrected itinerant-4f description produces dispersive Ce 4f bands and additional Fermi-surface pockets that are absent in experiment, thereby overestimating both the low-energy c-f hybridization and the exchange splitting transferred to the Ni 3d bands. When the localized Ce 4f character is incorporated through DFT+U , the experimental Fermi-surface topology is recovered and the residual p-wave splitting on the Ni 3d-derived bands is reduced to only a few meV, below the effective experimental resolution. These results identify CeNiAsO as a strongly correlated f-electron limit of p-wave magnetism, in which localized 4f electrons suppress the observable single-particle band-splitting signature expected from a weak-correlation picture.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用高分辨角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和理论计算，系统研究了重费米子材料CeNiAsO中的p波交变磁序。实验发现尽管有宏观磁序特征，但近费米能级的p波交换劈裂极小（仅几meV），且低能电子结构主要由局域化的Ce 4f电子和Ni 3d带主导。结果表明在强关联f电子体系中，局域化4f电子会抑制弱关联图像预期的单粒子能带劈裂信号。
AI.motivation: 交变磁(Altermagnetism)此前主要研究集中于弱到中等关联的d电子体系，其在重费米子材料（强关联f电子体系）中的表现尚不清楚。本文旨在探索p波交变磁序在重费米子候选材料CeNiAsO中的具体表现机制。
AI.method: 采用高分辨角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)进行费米面映射和轨道分辨分析，结合共振光电子能谱探测Ce 4f态特性，并通过第一性原理计算（包括DFT+U方法）进行对比验证。
AI.result: (1) 实验未观测到可分辨的近费米能级p波交换劈裂；(2) 低能电子结构以Ni 3d带为主导，Ce 4f态保持高度局域化；(3) 理论计算表明，未校正的巡游4f描述会高估c-f杂化和交换劈裂；(4) 采用DFT+U描述局域化Ce 4f后，实验费米面拓扑得以恢复，残余p波劈裂仅约几meV，低于实验分辨率。
AI.conclusion: CeNiAsO被确定为强关联f电子体系中的p波磁性极限案例，其中局域化的4f电子显著抑制了弱关联图像预期的单粒子能带劈裂信号，揭示了强关联效应对交变磁现象的重要影响。

title: Integer quantum Hall effect
summary: Integer quantum Hall effect, which is the Hall effect quantized into integer times $e^2/h$ ($e$: elementary charge, $h$: Planck's constant) observed first in two-dimensional electron gases in strong magnetic fields, is reviewed from both theoretical and experimental standpoints. Basic physics underlying the phenomenon is explained. Specifically in this new edition we have a fresh look at how the quantum Hall effect is captured in a perspective of topological systems, since, while the quantum Hall effect is historically the first realization of the topological systems, the field has been delved into a much wider realm of physics of topological systems. We also mention diverse advances such as the quantum Hall effect (QHE) in various materials and contexts that include graphene, oxides and narrow-gap semiconductors, a relation with the fractional quantum Hall effect, and the quantum Hall effect as the resistance standard and further roles in the new SI system. We also expound the Floquet topological insulator (a light-matter coupled system) as a new paradigm in nonequilibrium topological systems, where an anomalous quantum Hall effect in zero magnetic field is realized as theoretically predicted to occur in graphene illuminated by a circularly-polarized laser and experimentally verified recently.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了整数量子霍尔效应（IQHE）的理论与实验进展，特别从拓扑系统视角重新审视该现象，并涵盖了石墨烯、氧化物、窄带隙半导体等材料中的QHE、与分数量子霍尔效应的关联、电阻标准应用，以及Floquet拓扑绝缘体（零磁场下的反常量子霍尔效应）等最新发展。
AI.motivation: 量子霍尔效应是拓扑系统的首个实验实现，而拓扑物理学已扩展到更广阔的领域，因此有必要从拓扑视角重新审视这一经典现象，同时整合近年来新材料、新体系（如光-物质耦合系统）中的突破性进展。
AI.method: 采用综述性方法，从理论和实验两个角度阐述整数量子霍尔效应的基本物理原理，结合拓扑系统的视角进行重新分析，并回顾了石墨烯、氧化物、窄带隙半导体等多种材料体系中的QHE现象，以及Floquet拓扑绝缘体（圆偏振激光照射石墨烯实现零磁场反常QHE）的理论预言与实验验证。
AI.result: 量子霍尔效应已在多种材料体系（石墨烯、氧化物、窄带隙半导体）中得到实现；Floquet拓扑绝缘体中零磁场反常量子霍尔效应的理论预测已被实验验证；QHE在电阻标准和新SI单位制中继续发挥重要作用。
AI.conclusion: 量子霍尔效应不仅是拓扑物理学的历史起点，而且在非平衡拓扑系统（如Floquet拓扑绝缘体）等新范式中持续拓展，展现出从基础物理到计量标准的深远影响力。

title: How Can Machine Learning Accelerate CALPHAD Free Energy Modeling?
summary: The CALPHAD framework provides a rigorous basis for thermodynamic modeling, yet its ability to predict new chemistries is restricted by limited data and by functional forms that rely heavily on composition alone. Here, we show that machine learning (ML) can address these challenges through a hybrid strategy that learns Redlich-Kister (RK) interaction coefficients directly from physically informed elemental descriptors. Using formation energies of 14-element FCC alloys generated by a universal machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP), we benchmark three classes of models: (1) composition-based RK and ML models, (2) descriptor-based ML models, and (3) a combined ML-augmented RK approach (ML4RK). Leave-one-element-out tests highlight complementary strengths. RK models, class (1), remain the most data-efficient when binary information is available, while descriptor-based ML models, class (2), enable genuine zero-shot extrapolation to elements absent from the training set.
