By embedding elemental descriptors into the RK framework, the hybrid approach unifies these regimes and enables prediction of interaction parameters for otherwise unknown or data-scarce binaries, class (3). This work demonstrates a physically grounded and data-efficient route to extend CALPHAD models by combining the transferability of ML with the physical grounding, interpretability, data efficiency, and robustness of thermodynamic formalisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合策略（ML4RK），将机器学习与CALPHAD框架中的Redlich-Kister模型结合，通过物理启发的元素描述符学习相互作用系数，在14元素FCC合金数据集上验证了该方法兼具数据效率、零样本外推能力和物理可解释性。
AI.motivation: CALPHAD框架受限于数据稀缺和仅依赖成分的函数形式，难以预测新化学体系。传统RK模型需要已知二元信息，而纯ML模型缺乏物理基础。作者希望结合两者的优势，实现物理可解释且数据高效的合金热力学建模。
AI.method: 使用通用机器学习原子间势（MLIP）生成14种元素FCC合金的形成能数据，对比三类模型：(1)基于成分的RK和ML模型；(2)基于元素描述符的ML模型；(3)ML增强的RK混合方法（ML4RK），将元素描述符嵌入RK框架以学习相互作用系数。
AI.result: RK模型在具备二元信息时数据效率最高；描述符ML模型可实现真正的零样本外推（预测训练集中未出现的元素）；混合ML4RK方法统一了两者的优势，能够预测未知或数据稀缺的二元体系相互作用参数。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了通过结合ML的可迁移性与热力学形式化的物理基础、可解释性、数据效率和鲁棒性，可以物理上合理且数据高效地扩展CALPHAD模型的能力。

title: Electrical observation via spin Seebeck effect of fractionalized excitations in a magnetic insulator
comment: This version supersedes the previous version, arXiv:2509.18422, with one additional figure in the main text, corrected errors, an expanded author list, the inclusion of a theoretical model, and other minor revisions. 39 pages, 4+5 figures
summary: Fractionalized excitations are among the most striking signatures of emergence in quantum matter. While widely sought in frustrated magnets, their detection and characterization remain challenging, motivating the exploration of new probes. Meanwhile, Spintronics offers versatile tools for probing spin-related phenomena. In particular, the spin Seebeck effect (SSE) converts thermally driven magnetic excitations into a voltage in an adjacent metal, providing electrical access to the underlying dynamics and transport properties. Here we employ the SSE to probe emergent magnetic monopoles in the non-collinear Ising magnet Dy$_2$Ti$_2$O$_7$, a rare instance of a three-dimensional fractionalized magnet. We observe an SSE signal featuring a pronounced peak at monopole proliferation, accompanied by characteristic frequency and angular dependence. Our results broaden the scope of spintronic methods for detecting exotic excitations, provide new insights into magnetic insulators generally and monopole physics specifically, and suggest the potential of quantum materials as functional interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文利用自旋塞贝克效应（SSE）探测非共线Ising磁体Dy₂Ti₂O₇中的涌现磁单极子，观察到单极子增殖时的特征信号，拓展了自旋电子学方法在检测奇异激发中的应用。
AI.motivation: 分数量子激发（如磁单极子）在阻挫磁体中难以检测，亟需新的探测手段；自旋塞贝克效应可作为电学探针，但尚未用于检测磁单极子。
AI.method: 在非共线Ising磁体Dy₂Ti₂O₇中测量自旋塞贝克效应信号，分析其随温度、频率和角度的变化特征，并与磁单极子增殖相关联。
AI.result: 观察到SSE信号在单极子增殖温度附近出现显著峰值，且该信号具有特征性的频率和角度依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 自旋塞贝克效应可有效探测磁单极子这类分数量子激发，拓展了自旋电子学方法的适用范围，并为量子材料在功能界面中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Voltage-driven transition from steady-state fluctuations to phase-transition noise in nanoscale VO$_2$ devices
summary: We investigate the electrically driven metal-to-insulator transition (MIT) in nanoscale vanadium dioxide (VO$_2$) Mott memristor through noise spectroscopy and two-dimensional resistor network simulations. Our experiments focus on both the insulating phase as the applied voltage approaches the threshold voltage (set transition) and the metallic phase as the voltage is reduced toward the reset voltage (reset transition). In both regimes, we observe an order of magnitude increase in relative current noise near the transition points. To analyze the origin of this noise enhancement, we use simulations that capture the stochastic dynamics of the phase transition. The simulations indicate that the increased noise stems from amplified phase fluctuations near the percolation threshold, where competing metallic and insulating domains lead to dynamic reconfiguration of the conduction paths. In addition, we show that the precursor current fluctuations observed near the switching threshold are consistent with the threshold voltage variability measured in repeated switching cycles, indicating that the noise sets a lower bound on the achievable variance. These findings offer key insights into the non-equilibrium processes governing phase transitions in nanoscale VO$_2$ devices under electrical stimuli.

AI.tldr: 本文通过噪声谱分析和二维电阻网络模拟，研究了纳米级VO₂莫特忆阻器中电驱动金属-绝缘体相变（MIT）的噪声增强现象，发现相变点附近相对电流噪声提升一个数量级，并证实该噪声源于渗流阈值附近金属与绝缘体畴的竞争导致的导电通路动态重构。
AI.motivation: 探究纳米级VO₂器件在电驱动下金属-绝缘体相变过程中噪声增强的物理起源，理解非平衡相变动力学机制。
AI.method: 实验上采用噪声谱分析测量相变点附近的电流噪声；理论上构建二维电阻网络模型，引入随机动力学模拟相变过程中金属与绝缘体畴的竞争行为。
AI.result: 在置位和复位转变点附近，相对电流噪声均提升一个数量级；模拟表明噪声增强源于渗流阈值附近的相涨落放大；开关阈值附近的电流涨落与阈值电压循环变异性一致。
AI.conclusion: 噪声机制揭示了VO₂相变中非平衡过程的普适特征，且噪声为器件开关电压的变异性设定了理论下限。

title: Orbital Hall effect-driven spin-orbit torque enhancement in Ti-based systems via rare-earth interface engineering
summary: Orbital currents in light metals offer large orbital Hall conductivities, yet translating this into practical spin-orbit torque efficiency is hindered by fundamental limitations. In this work, we introduce a Gd interlayer between a Ti orbital source and a Co ferromagnet to enhance the orbital torque efficiency. Ferromagnetic resonance-based spin (orbital) pumping measurements identify an optimal Gd thickness of around 4 nm, where the orbital-to-spin conversion efficiency reaches its maximum. The Ti-thickness dependence of the inverse orbital Hall effect signal confirms a bulk orbital Hall origin in Ti and yields a qualitative orbital diffusion length exceeding 20 nm. Spin-torque ferromagnetic resonance measurements demonstrate a fivefold enhancement of the SOT efficiency in Ti(20 nm)/Co compared to a Gd(4 nm)/Co reference. Interestingly, the trilayer Ti/Gd/Co architecture exhibits a spin (orbital) torque efficiency greater than 1, which is higher than that of the bilayer Ti/Co and Gd/Co structures, irrespective of Ti thickness. These results establish rare-earth interlayer engineering as a viable route to enhanced orbital torque efficiency for next-generation spin-orbitronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在Ti轨道源和Co铁磁体之间插入Gd中间层，实现了轨道转矩效率的五倍提升，并证明稀土中间层工程是增强自旋-轨道转矩效率的有效途径。
AI.motivation: 轻金属中的轨道电流虽能产生大的轨道霍尔电导率，但将其转化为实际的自旋轨道转矩效率受到根本性限制，亟需新的方法来突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 在Ti轨道源与Co铁磁体之间引入Gd中间层构建Ti/Gd/Co三层结构，利用铁磁共振自旋（轨道）泵浦测量、逆轨道霍尔效应信号分析以及自旋转矩铁磁共振测量等手段进行表征。
AI.result: 最优Gd厚度约为4 nm时轨道-自旋转换效率达到最大；Ti中轨道扩散长度超过20 nm；相比Gd/Co参考结构，Ti/Gd/Co体系的自旋轨道转矩效率提升五倍，且三层结构的效率超过1，高于双层结构。
AI.conclusion: 稀土中间层工程是实现增强轨道转矩效率的可行途径，为下一代自旋轨道器件的发展提供了新思路。

title: Reduce dimensional quantum criticality for Non-Fermi liquids
summary: We present a reduced dimension theoretical framework for studying quantum field theories at finite density, providing a tractable model for investigating non-Fermi liquid (NFL) behavior near quantum phase transitions. Our approach departs from the standard paradigm by placing bosons and fermions in different spatial dimensions: bosonic fields reside in a $(d+1)$-dimensional bulk, while fermionic fields are confined on a $d$-dimensional boundary. This dimensional separation significantly simplifies the renormalization group (RG) analysis of gapless boson-fermion coupling. We demonstrate that the tree-level boson exchange contributions, which typically exhibit logarithmic divergences, become finite in our reduced-dimension scheme. Furthermore, the $\log^2$ and $\log^3$ divergences that characterize 1-loop four-fermion interactions in conventional treatments are reduced to logarithmic divergences within this framework, substantially improving the convergence properties of the perturbative expansion and allowing controlled theoretical analysis of NFL physics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种降维理论框架，通过将玻色子和费米子置于不同空间维度（玻色子在(d+1)维体内部，费米子在d维边界上），显著简化了有限密度下量子场论的重整化群分析，有效抑制了树图和单圈图的对数发散，为非费米液体行为的研究提供了可控的微扰理论框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的标准范式在研究有限密度量子场论时，玻色子-费米子耦合的RG分析复杂，树图贡献存在对数发散，单圈四费米子相互作用出现log²和log³发散，导致微扰展开收敛性差，难以对非费米液体行为进行可控的理论分析。
AI.method: 将玻色子和费米子置于不同空间维度：玻色子场在(d+1)维体内部，费米子场在d维边界上。通过这种维度分离来简化无能隙玻色子-费米子耦合的RG分析。
AI.result: 1) 树图级别的玻色子交换贡献由对数发散变为有限；2) 单圈四费米子相互作用的log²和log³发散降为对数发散；3) 微扰展开的收敛性大幅改善。
AI.conclusion: 该降维框架为非费米液体行为在量子相变附近的研究提供了一个可控的理论分析工具。

title: Magnetic control of electron scattering in silicene quantum dots
summary: The Klein tunnel effect phenomenon makes it impossible to permanently confine charge carriers in massless nanostructures. However, applying a constant magnetic field allows these electrons to be temporarily localized, thus forming quasi-bound states. In this study, we analyze the mechanism of electron diffusion through a silicene quantum dot (SQD) subjected to a perpendicular magnetic field. To enhance spatial localization, we exploit the spin-orbit coupling (SOC) specific to silicene, which generates a natural energy gap by acting as an effective mass. We first derive the solutions to the Dirac equation at low energy. Subsequently, by imposing the continuity conditions at the SQD interfaces, we obtain exact expressions for the diffusion coefficients. These results are then used to map the scattering efficiency together with the spatial distributions of probability and current densities. Our simulations demonstrate that the presence of this intrinsic gap significantly enhances electron trapping at the center of the SQD. Finally, we prove that the interplay between the external field and SOC breaks spin symmetry, thereby enabling robust and spin-selective confinement.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了垂直磁场下硅烯量子点（SQD）中的电子扩散机制，利用硅烯特有的自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）产生有效质量，增强电子空间局域化。通过求解狄拉克方程和连续性条件，得到了扩散系数的精确表达式。模拟证明，本征能隙显著增强了SQD中心的电子俘获，且外场与SOC的协同作用打破了自旋对称性，实现了鲁棒的自旋选择性约束。
AI.motivation: Klein隧穿效应使得无质量纳米结构中载流子无法被永久约束，而施加恒定磁场只能实现临时局域化。本文旨在通过利用硅烯特有的自旋-轨道耦合产生的本征能隙，增强电子在量子点中的空间局域化，并实现自旋选择性约束。
AI.method: 首先推导低能狄拉克方程的解，然后在硅烯量子点界面施加连续性条件，得到扩散系数的精确表达式。基于此，绘制散射效率以及概率密度和电流密度的空间分布图进行模拟分析。
AI.result: 模拟表明，硅烯的本征能隙显著增强了电子在量子点中心的俘获；外磁场与自旋-轨道耦合的协同作用打破了自旋对称性，实现了鲁棒的自旋选择性约束。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入硅烯的自旋-轨道耦合，可以有效克服Klein隧穿效应带来的约束难题，实现电子的强局域化与自旋选择性控制，为自旋电子学器件设计提供了新思路。

title: High-quality Nano-patterning of Oxide Interfaces Using Transferred Gold Mask
summary: Complex oxide interfaces, such as \mathrm{SrTiO_3} and \mathrm{KTaO_3} based heterostructures, host rich correlated phenomena with strong potential for advanced device applications. However, these interfaces are extremely susceptible to contamination and defect formation during nanofabrication, which often compromises device performance. Here, we present a solvent-free method for patterning oxide interfaces by employing high-resolution transferable thin metal masks in conjunction with oxygen-enriched Ar+ milling, which enables a clean and well-controlled nanofabrication process. Transport measurements demonstrate that the fabricated devices preserve their intrinsic properties, including high carrier mobilities, with negligible degradation compared to the pristine interfaces. This technique offers a convenient and robust route for engineering high-performance oxide electronic devices with precisely tailored transport characteristics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无溶剂图案化氧化物界面的方法，使用可转移金属掩膜和富氧Ar+铣削，实现清洁纳米加工，保持器件本征输运特性。
AI.motivation: 氧化物界面在纳米加工中极易受污染和形成缺陷，导致器件性能下降，需要一种清洁可控的图案化方法。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率可转移金属掩膜结合富氧Ar+铣削的无溶剂图案化工艺。
AI.result: 制备的器件保持了本征特性，包括高载流子迁移率，性能退化可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为工程化高性能氧化物电子器件提供了一种便捷且稳健的途径，可实现精确调控的输运特性。

title: Moire-Engineered Excitonic Landscape and Phonon-Mediated Recombination in Twisted WSe2 Bilayers
summary: We report light emission from the moire superlattice of a twisted bilayer of tungsten diselenide (WSe2/WSe2) encapsulated in insulating hexagonal boron nitride (hBN). The low-temperature photoluminescence (PL) spectroscopy reveals signatures of moire-potential induced strong interlayer excitonic emission and phonon-assisted recombination, while the twisting significantly suppresses the emission from localized defect-bound excitons. The moire potential redistributes carriers into indirect valleys, thereby enhancing recombination efficiency and stabilizing the interlayer excitons. Our findings establish that precise control of twist angle and dielectric environment provides a new route for engineering excitonic systems for exploring exciton-phonon interactions and associated quantum phenomena in transition metal dichalcogenides.

AI.tldr: 在WSe2/WSe2扭曲双层异质结的莫尔超晶格中观测到强层间激子发光，扭曲角度有效抑制缺陷束缚激子，莫尔势增强间接谷载流子复合效率，为调控激子-声子相互作用和量子现象提供新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索扭曲双层过渡金属硫族化合物中莫尔超晶格对层间激子发光的调控机制，特别是扭曲角度和介电环境如何影响激子行为，为量子光电器件提供新思路。
AI.method: 制备hBN封装的WSe2/WSe2扭曲双层异质结，通过低温光致发光(PL)光谱表征莫尔超晶格的光学特性，分析莫尔势对激子发射和缺陷发光的影响。
AI.result: 1) 观察到莫尔势诱导的强层间激子发射及声子辅助复合；2) 扭曲显著抑制了缺陷束缚激子的发射；3) 莫尔势将载流子重新分布到间接谷，提高了复合效率并稳定了层间激子。
AI.conclusion: 精确控制扭曲角度和介电环境为工程化激子系统提供了新途径，可用于探索过渡金属硫族化合物中的激子-声子相互作用及相关量子现象。

title: Non-equilibrium glassy arrest and discontinuous transitions at avoided quantum critical points
summary: The non-equilibrium dynamics of an order parameter confined by an external constraint field are investigated within a spatially extended Belitz-Kirkpatrick-Vojta framework. A generic non-monotonic dissipation peak arises at avoided criticality due to the interplay between macroscopic free-energy flattening and microscopic disorder-induced trapping. Near this regime, suppressed deterministic forces enhance activated trapping, leading to an effective violation of the fluctuation-dissipation theorem and ultimate glassy arrest. At higher fields, the system undergoes a discontinuous phase transition that bypasses this flat free-energy region. These explicit analytical scalings establish a generic mechanism for non-equilibrium arrest in disordered condensed matter systems.

AI.tldr: 本文在Belitz-Kirkpatrick-Vojta扩展框架下研究外约束场中序参量的非平衡动力学，发现因宏观自由能平坦化与微观无序诱导陷阱的相互作用，在回避临界点处出现非单调耗散峰，并导致有效违背涨落-耗散定理和玻璃态停滞。
AI.motivation: 理解无序凝聚态系统中非平衡停滞（glass arrest）的通用机制，尤其是在外约束场下序参量的动力学行为。
AI.method: 基于扩展的Belitz-Kirkpatrick-Vojta理论框架，进行空间扩展的非平衡动力学分析，结合宏观自由能平坦化与微观无序陷阱效应。
AI.result: 1) 在回避临界点处出现非单调耗散峰；2) 确定力被抑制增强了激活陷阱效应，导致有效违反涨落-耗散定理；3) 高场下系统经历不连续相变，绕过平坦自由能区域。
AI.conclusion: 建立了无序凝聚态系统中非平衡停滞的通用解析标度机制，阐明了glass arrest的动力学起源。

title: Resonant Raman scattering in bilayer 3R-MoS$_{2}$
summary: Raman scattering is a powerful spectroscopic technique widely employed to investigate light-matter interactions and lattice dynamics in two-dimensional materials. Here, we investigate the temperature-dependent resonant Raman response of bilayer 3R-MoS$_2$. The study combines multi-wavelength Raman spectroscopy, photoluminescence measurements, and density functional theory calculations to track the evolution of excitonic transitions and resonance conditions. We observe contributions from both zone-centre and finite-momentum phonons, a pronounced quenching of the Stokes intensity at low temperatures followed by saturation, the emergence of anti-Stokes scattering above 130~K, and a strong deviation of the effective phonon temperature from the lattice temperature induced by resonance effects. These results demonstrate that the Raman response is governed by the interplay between incoming and outgoing resonance processes, providing deeper insight into exciton-phonon coupling in van der Waals materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多波长拉曼光谱、光致发光测量和DFT计算，研究了双层3R-MoS₂的温度依赖共振拉曼响应，揭示了激子-声子耦合中入射和出射共振过程的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 理解二维材料中温度依赖的共振拉曼散射行为，特别是激子跃迁和共振条件如何影响拉曼响应。
AI.method: 结合多波长拉曼光谱、光致发光测量和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，系统追踪了激子跃迁和共振条件的演化。
AI.result: 观察到区中心和有限动量声子的贡献；低温下斯托克斯强度显著猝灭后趋于饱和；130K以上出现反斯托克斯散射；共振效应导致有效声子温度与晶格温度强烈偏离。
AI.conclusion: 拉曼响应由入射和出射共振过程的相互作用主导，为理解范德华材料中的激子-声子耦合提供了更深层次的见解。

title: Quantized Conductance through Surface States in High Quality Three-Dimensional Dirac Semimetal Cd$_3$As$_2$ Nanowire/Nanoribbon p-n Junctions
summary: We report the observation of quantized conductance in high-mobility three-dimensional Dirac semimetal Cd$_3$As$_2$ nanowire and nanoribbon p-n junctions. By employing suspended device geometries with dual local gates, we form tunable p-n junctions and realize ballistic transport across sub-micron channel lengths. In a wide nanoribbon device with a channel width of $\sim 330$ nm, conductance plateaus appear at integer multiples of $2e^2/h$ in the n-n regime under high magnetic fields. Numerical simulations suggest that these features represent unresolved spin-split subbands due to the smaller subband spacing in wider channels, and support the interpretation that the observed quantization may originate from surface-state-dominated conduction. In contrast, narrower nanoribbons and nanowires exhibit conductance steps of $1e^2/h$, demonstrating spin-resolved subbands likely due to enhanced confinement effects. From spin-resolved subband spectroscopy, we extract an effective Landé $g$-factor of $\sim 43$ for the first subband in the bulk gap, establishing these nanostructures as a prospective platform for fault-tolerant quantum electronics.

AI.tldr: 在三维狄拉克半金属Cd₃As₂纳米线和纳米带p-n结中观测到量子化电导，并通过自旋分辨子带光谱提取到了约43的有效Landé g因子。
AI.motivation: 探索三维狄拉克半金属纳米结构中量子化电导的观测及其自旋分辨特性，为容错量子电子学提供新平台。
AI.method: 采用悬浮器件结构配合双局域栅极构建可调p-n结，在高迁移率Cd₃As₂纳米线/纳米带中实现弹道输运，并结合数值模拟分析电导量子化行为。
AI.result: 宽纳米带（~330 nm）在n-n区高磁场下出现整数倍2e²/h的电导平台；窄纳米带/纳米线呈现1e²/h的电导台阶，揭示自旋分辨子带；提取到第一个子带的有效g因子约43。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证实了Cd₃As₂纳米结构是实现自旋分辨量子化电导和容错量子电子学的有前景平台。

title: Flat interface between amorphous ices and the role of MDA-like intermediate states in the LDA-HDA transformation
summary: The pressure-induced transformation between low-density amorphous ice (LDA) and high-density amorphous ice (HDA) is a prototypical polyamorphic transition, yet its microscopic mechanism - and in particular the nature of intermediate amorphous (IA) states - has long remained unresolved. We present the first characterisation of a flat LDA||HDA interface, determining its equilibrium thickness and showing its link to medium-density amorphous ice (MDA). Interestingly, the thickness of the interfacial layer remains constant under compression, while its position shifts reversibly into the LDA region - an elastic response that exhibits kinetic hysteresis upon decompression, reminiscent of memory effects. For high-precision discrimination of amorphous ices, we use a neural network classifier based on SOAP (Smooth Overlap of Atomic Positions) descriptors. The systematic description of the local structure emphasizes the importance of orientational information from the hydrogen bond network. Furthermore, this approach enables molecular dynamics analysis of the LDA-to-HDA transformation, directly mapping the spatial distribution of intermediate structures relative to growing HDA domains and the surrounding LDA matrix, and revealing that MDA-like IA configurations are not a distinct bulk phase but rather localise at the LDA-HDA interface.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次表征了低密度非晶冰(LDA)与高密度非晶冰(HDA)之间的平坦界面，发现其平衡厚度与中密度非晶冰(MDA)相关，界面厚度在压缩下保持恒定而位置可逆移动，并利用基于SOAP描述符的神经网络分类器揭示了MDA-like中间态并非独立体相，而是局域于LDA-HDA界面的界面结构。
AI.motivation: LDA与HDA之间的压力诱导转变是典型的多态非晶转变，但其微观机制——特别是中间非晶态(IA)的性质——长期以来未能解决。
AI.method: 1. 首次表征平坦LDA||HDA界面，测定其平衡厚度并建立与MDA的联系；2. 使用基于SOAP描述符的神经网络分类器进行高精度非晶冰判别；3. 进行LDA到HDA转变的分子动力学分析，直接映射中间结构相对于HDA生长域和LDA基质的空间分布。
AI.result: 界面厚度在压缩下保持恒定，位置可逆移入LDA区域；这种弹性响应在减压时表现出动力学滞后，类似记忆效应。MDA-like的IA构型并非独立体相，而是局域于LDA-HDA界面上。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过界面表征和神经网络分类方法，澄清了LDA-HDA转变中中间非晶态的本质，证明了MDA-like结构是界面局域态而非独立体相，为理解多态非晶转变的微观机制提供了关键见解。

title: Ferroelectric hysteresis in singly aligned graphene-hBN moiré superlattices
comment: This is the preprint version. Visit publisher's website for the peer reviewed version of record
summary: Ferroelectric materials have the unique ability to maintain an electric polarization which can be reversed under an external applied electric field. This property makes them valuable for applications such as non-volatile random-access memories, transducers, actuators and electro optic modulators. Recently, emergent unconventional ferroelectricity has been demonstrated in moiré superlattices of bilayer graphene and hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) hosting non centrosymmetric stacking order. Whether this phenomenon is also present in noncentrosymmetric single layer graphene (SLG)-hBN moiré superlattices is still under debate. Here we demonstrate a ferroelectric response in an SLG-hBN moiré superlattice. Through Hall measurements, we pinpoint the origin of the hysteretic behavior to abnormal charge screening due to the moiré superlattice band and estimate the spontaneous polarization magnitude in the moiré superlattice structure. Temperature dependent measurements confirm that the hysteretic behavior persists from 2K up to room temperature, opening opportunities for high-mobility, ultrathin non-volatile devices

AI.tldr: 本文展示了单层石墨烯-六方氮化硼莫尔超晶格中的铁电响应，并通过霍尔测量和变温实验证实其自发极化行为可在2K至室温范围内持续存在。
AI.motivation: 探索非中心对称的单层石墨烯-六方氮化硼莫尔超晶格是否也存在非常规铁电性，解决当前学界的争议。
AI.method: 利用霍尔测量定位磁滞行为的起源（莫尔超晶格能带导致的异常电荷屏蔽），并通过变温测量（2K到室温）验证铁电响应的稳定性。
AI.result: 成功在单层石墨烯-六方氮化硼莫尔超晶格中观察到铁电响应，估算出自发极化强度，并证实该效应在宽温度范围内（2K至室温）持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 该发现为开发高迁移率、超薄非易失性存储器件提供了新的材料平台和物理机制。

title: Altermagnetism in MnF$_2$: Band Splitting and Its Physical Consequences
summary: MnF$_2$ is widely regarded as a candidate altermagnet, but the magnitude and implications of its altermagnetic band splitting remain debated. Using electronic-structure calculations, we construct minimal models that capture the magnetic and electronic properties of MnF$_2$. These models show that the parameters governing the chiral magnon splitting and the spin splitting of the electronic bands are relatively small. Moreover, the electronic system lies in the strong-coupling regime, where most magnetic properties are controlled by the ratio $t/U$ between the characteristic hopping amplitude $t$ and the large on-site Coulomb repulsion $U$. Consequently, all exchange interactions scale as $1/U$, so a small altermagnetic hopping $δt$ produces only a proportionally small exchange term. Upon doping, the altermagnetic contribution to the anomalous Hall effect is likewise suppressed, being smaller than the conventional (non-altermagnetic) contribution by a factor of order $δt/U$. In contrast, the behavior of the conductivity tensor $\hatσ(ω)$ at $\hbar ω\sim U$ differs qualitatively, because $δt$ enters the energies of interband optical transitions \emph{directly} rather than through the reduced ratio $δt/U$. This contribution strongly reshapes $\hatσ(ω)$, leading to a dramatic enhancement of the magneto-optical response.

AI.tldr: 本文通过电子结构计算构建MnF₂的最小模型，发现其交变磁自旋分裂参数较小，电子系统处于强耦合区，交换相互作用和反常霍尔效应受δt/U抑制，但光学电导率在ℏω~U时因δt直接参与而出现强磁光响应增强。
AI.motivation: MnF₂被广泛认为是候选的交变磁体（altermagnet），但其交变磁能带分裂的大小和物理含义仍存在争议，需要澄清。
AI.method: 使用电子结构计算构建描述MnF₂磁性和电子性质的最小模型，分析其强耦合区（t/U）行为，分别考察交换相互作用、反常霍尔效应和光学电导率张量。
AI.result: 交变磁分裂参数较小；交换作用比例于δt/U；反常霍尔效应中交变磁贡献比常规贡献小约δt/U；而光学电导率在ℏω~U时对δt敏感，磁光响应显著增强。
AI.conclusion: MnF₂中交变磁效应对静态磁性和输运性质影响微弱，但在高频光学响应中可直接显现，为探测交变磁分裂提供了新途径。

title: Nonequilibrium transport in epitaxial CsPbBr3 single crystals
summary: Transport of optically excited carriers in semiconductors is typically described within a quasi-equilibrium picture, where energy is carried by a single thermalized quasiparticle population characterized by well-defined transport coefficients. Here, we demonstrate that in epitaxial CsPbBr3 perovskite single crystals, this picture holds near room temperature - but breaks down dramatically at low temperature. Using transient microscopy, we show that optically measured carrier mobilities match device-scale Hall-effect and field-effect transistor measurements across a broad temperature range, resolving reported discrepancies and validating the equilibrium framework in the free-carrier regime. Below ~60 K, however, when excitonic effects become significant, equilibrium models begin to fail. We observe two coupled populations: a transient (<100 ps) hot-exciton gas with a diffusivity ~25-30 cm<sup>2</sup>/s - greatly exceeding the diffusivity expected for thermalized excitons - and a quasi-localized state that is fed by the cooling of the hot-exciton gas. These results reveal that in CsPbBr3, transport and thermalization are not separable processes: carriers move while still redistributing among internal degrees of freedom, breaking the timescale separation that underpins equilibrium transport theory in conventional semiconductors. By resolving transport at the population level, we can directly access the competing kinetics of exciton formation, interconversion, and cooling, offering a new space for controlling energy flow in perovskite materials and their photonic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在CsPbBr3钙钛矿单晶中，室温下载流子输运符合准平衡图像，但在低温（<60 K）下平衡模型失效，观察到热激子气体（扩散率25-30 cm²/s）和准局域态耦合的双群体行为，揭示输运与热化过程不可分离。
AI.motivation: 解决半导体中光激发载流子输运的传统准平衡描述与实验观测之间存在的歧义，特别是针对CsPbBr3钙钛矿材料中载流子迁移率的测量差异问题。
AI.method: 采用瞬态显微术（transient microscopy）测量载流子扩散率，并结合霍尔效应和场效应晶体管测量，覆盖宽温度范围（室温至低温），系统比较光学测量与电学测量结果。
AI.result: 1) 室温时光学测量的载流子迁移率与霍尔效应和FET测量一致，验证了平衡框架的有效性；2) 低于~60 K时平衡模型失效，出现双群体：热激子气体（扩散率25-30 cm²/s，远超热化激子预期值）和准局域态；3) 输运与热化不可分离，载流子在内部自由度间重新分布的同时发生移动。
AI.conclusion: 传统平衡输运理论的时间尺度分离假设在低温激子效应显著的CsPbBr3中不成立，为理解钙钛矿材料中的能量流动提供了新视角，有望用于控制光电器件中的能量输运。

title: Hydrogen trapping and interfacial decohesion at the α-Al2O3(0001)/Fe(110) interface
summary: Hydrogen embrittlement and tritium leakage pose critical challenges for fusion reactor structural components, rendering α-Al2O3/Fe interfaces vital as tritium permeation barriers. Here, the thermodynamic stability, trapping energetics, and hydrogen-induced decohesion at the α-Al2O3 (0001)/Fe(110) interface were systematically investigated using density functional theory. Single-hydrogen incorporation reveals that the Fe-hollow site is the most stable trapping region, owing to local free volume and heterogeneous interfacial bonding. Multi-hydrogen analysis demonstrates that trapping behavior is concentration-dependent; increasing hydrogen concentration progressively reduces the available free volume and increases local lattice distortion. As a result, simulated cleavage processes show a monotonic decrease in cleavage energy with accumulation. At high hydrogen concentrations, cleavage energy turns negative, indicating spontaneous interfacial exfoliation. These quantitative insights clarify the atomistic degradation mechanisms of protective oxide scales, offering a theoretical framework for optimizing high-performance permeation barriers in fusion-relevant steels.

AI.tldr: 本文利用密度泛函理论系统研究了α-Al2O3(0001)/Fe(110)界面的氢脆和氢捕获行为，发现氢在Fe-hollow位点最稳定，且随氢浓度增加，自由体积减少、晶格畸变加剧， cleavage能单调下降，高浓度下出现负值表明界面自发剥离。
AI.motivation: 聚变反应堆结构组件面临氢脆和氚泄漏的严峻挑战，α-Al2O3/Fe界面作为氚渗透屏障至关重要，但对其原子尺度的退化机制缺乏定量理解。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）对α-Al2O3(0001)/Fe(110)界面进行系统计算，分析单氢和多氢条件下的热力学稳定性、捕获能量学及氢致解理过程。
AI.result: 单氢最稳定捕获位点为Fe-hollow位点；多氢捕获行为呈现浓度依赖性，随浓度升高自由体积减少、局部晶格畸变增大；cleavage能随氢积累单调下降，高浓度下转为负值。
AI.conclusion: 定量阐明了保护性氧化皮在原子尺度上的氢致降解机制，为优化聚变相关钢中高性能渗透屏障提供了理论框架。

title: Leveraging structural disorder to enhance topological phases
summary: On-site disorder can be leveraged to induce a transition from a trivial to a topological insulator. However it is unclear if structural disorder in the absence of on-site disorder can aid a similar transition and, if so, which kind of structural disorder is more favourable. We numerically show that structural disorder can enhance and sustain a topological phase up to strong disorder in two dimensions provided that one penalises atomic sites from being close to one another. However, we find this effect is absent in three dimensions, where structural disorder appears generically detrimental to the phase. In our calculations we include disorder that can scramble the global spin-reference frame, an overlooked type of disorder expected to exist in strongly disordered solids. This disorder fatally scrambles the information necessary for the spin-Bott and the spin-Chern marker to correctly diagnose a topological phase. By using the spectral localizer, a local marker directly defined using the time-reversal symmetry operator rather than a spin-projection, we show how one can circumvent this limitation, providing a basis-indifferent theory for calculating Z2 invariants. Our work showcases that not all structural disorders are equally beneficial to topology, and highlights guiding principles to enhance and detect topological phases in both solid-state and metamaterial realisations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究了结构无序（而非传统点无序）对拓扑绝缘体相变的影响。发现二维中排斥原子靠近的结构无序可以增强拓扑相，但在三维中结构无序普遍有害。此外，引入了一种被忽视的自旋参考系全局混淆的无序类型，并展示了光谱局域化器（spectral localizer）可绕开传统自旋标记方法的局限，提供了一种不依赖基底的Z2不变量计算方法。
AI.motivation: 传统研究关注点无序（on-site disorder）诱导拓扑相变，但结构无序（structural disorder）的作用尚不明确。本文旨在探索不同维度和类型的结构无序对拓扑相的影响，并解决自旋参考系混淆这一被忽视的无序类型对拓扑诊断带来的挑战。
AI.method: 通过数值模拟，在二维和三维体系中引入结构无序，并区分原子间排斥与不排斥两种情形。同时引入自旋参考系全局混淆的无序，采用光谱局域化器（基于时间反演对称算子）替代传统的自旋-Bott和自旋-Chern标记来计算Z2不变量。
AI.result: 二维中，排斥原子靠近的结构无序可增强并维持拓扑相至强无序；三维中结构无序普遍破坏拓扑相。自旋参考系混淆会导致传统自旋标记失效，而光谱局域化器能正确诊断拓扑相。
AI.conclusion: 并非所有结构无序对拓扑都有利，二维中特定类型（原子间排斥）的结构无序可促进拓扑相，三维则不行。光谱局域化器为无序体系中的拓扑诊断提供了更鲁棒的方案。

title: Polaron Transport in TiO$_{2}$ from Machine Learning Molecular Dynamics
summary: Transition metal oxides have attracted much attention as photo(electrochemical)-catalysts but practical applications are typically hampered by their low and anisotropic charge mobility. A deep understanding of excess charge carrier transport in these materials requires a dynamical treatment of nuclear motion that goes well beyond standard approaches. Here we introduce DeepPolaron, a machine learning framework boosting the accessible time scale of first principles molecular dynamics of adiabatic polaron transport by three orders of magnitude at a virtually negligible loss in accuracy. We apply our method to excess electron and hole transport in titanium dioxide rutile and anatase. We find that the excess electron in rutile relaxes to a polaron predominantly localized on a single Ti atom with hopping occurring only along the [001] direction, associated with an activation energy of 39 meV and a room temperature mobility of $4.4 \times 10^{-2}$ cm$^2$/Vs in good agreement with experiment. In contrast the hole polaron in anatase is localized on a single O atom, and due to poor O 2p orbital overlap with first nearest neighbors charge transport occurs primarily to second nearest neighbors, with a large activation energy of 139 meV resulting in a small room temperature mobility of $1.4 \times 10^{-3}$ cm$^2$/Vs. This work provides a finite temperature first-principles characterization of small polaron transport in rutile and anatase, with a methodology that is directly transferable to other small polaron forming materials and interfacial charge-transfer processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DeepPolaron，一个机器学习框架，将第一性原理分子动力学模拟绝热极化子输运的可访问时间尺度提升了三个数量级，并应用于金红石和锐钛矿TiO₂中电子和空穴极化子的输运研究，揭示了不同的局域化行为和迁移率特性。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属氧化物作为光电催化剂具有低且各向异性的电荷迁移率，传统方法难以动态处理核运动以实现对过剩电荷载流子输运的深入理解。
AI.method: 提出DeepPolaron机器学习框架，将第一性原理分子动力学模拟绝热极化子输运的可访问时间尺度提升三个数量级，同时保持几乎可忽略的精度损失。
AI.result: 金红石中过剩电子极化子主要局域在单个Ti原子上，仅沿[001]方向跳跃，活化能39 meV，室温迁移率4.4×10⁻² cm²/Vs；锐钛矿中空穴极化子局域在单个O原子上，因O 2p轨道重叠差主要向次近邻输运，活化能139 meV，室温迁移率仅1.4×10⁻³ cm²/Vs。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了金红石和锐钛矿小极化子输运的有限温度第一性原理表征，方法论可直接迁移至其他小极化子形成材料和界面电荷转移过程。

title: Iterative Thermodynamic Augmentation of Spatially Resolved Analytic Microscopy for Fast-Diffusing Solutes
summary: The spatially resolved quantification of fast-diffusing solutes presents several challenges in analytic microscopy. Given the critical role of interstitially alloyed elements in physical metallurgy, we propose a computational framework that addresses this limitation by augmenting spatially resolved composition maps of substitutional elements with computationally derived interstitial distributions. The underlying methodology is an iterative thermodynamic model: exploiting the stark differences in solid-state diffusion kinetics, the model assumes a state of partial chemical equilibrium exclusively for the mobile interstitial species. An optimization scheme iteratively adjusts an uniform interstitial chemical potential across the mapped microstructure until the integrated local concentration converges with an independently measured bulk value. Ultimately, this approach extracts thermodynamically consistent interstitial concentration maps from robust, low-noise microscopy data, yielding quantitative spatial arrays that are otherwise time- and resource-intensive to obtain at best.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种计算框架，通过热力学迭代模型，利用低噪声的置换型溶质微观图谱，定量重建间隙型溶质的空间分布图，克服了传统方法中快速扩散溶质难以空间解析的问题。
AI.motivation: 快速扩散的间隙型溶质（如间隙合金元素）在物理冶金中至关重要，但现有分析显微技术难以实现其空间分辨定量表征。
AI.method: 基于间隙物种快速扩散达到局部化学平衡的假设，构建迭代热力学模型；通过优化均匀的间隙化学势，使积分局部浓度与独立测量的体浓度匹配，最终从低噪声的置换元素图谱推导出间隙分布。
AI.result: 该方法能从稳健的低噪声显微数据中提取热力学自洽的间隙浓度空间图，获得定量空间阵列。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种高效、资源节约的手段来获取间隙溶质分布，解决了传统方法耗时耗力的难题。

title: Interface Symmetry and Electrostatic Stabilization of Strain-Resilient Janus Heterobilayers for Flexible Piezotronics
summary: The electronic structure of conventional two-dimensional transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) is highly sensitive to lattice deformation, often leading to indirect-to-direct band-gap transitions that compromise performance in flexible nanoelectronic applications. Janus TMDs, with their broken mirror symmetry and intrinsic out-of-plane dipoles, offer a promising alternative platform for electrostatic tuning. However, their electronic stability under strain and the role of the chalcogen stacking sequence in their heterostructures remains poorly understood. Here, we study from first principles the strain tolerance and piezoelectric properties of MoSSe/WSSe heterobilayers. By examining different configurations, we demonstrate that the interface chemistry strongly modulates interlayer coupling, dynamic charge redistribution, and dipole interactions. Importantly, the combined effects of intrinsic electric fields and interface electrostatics effectively suppress the strain-induced band-gap transitions typical of conventional TMDs. Moreover, while the in-plane piezoelectric response remains nearly insensitive to the stacking order, the shear piezoelectric coefficient depends heavily on the interfacial symmetry and can be effectively tuned by strain modulation. Our results highlight interfacial engineering as a powerful route to design strain-resilient Janus heterostructures for next-generation flexible optoelectronic, valleytronic, and piezotronic devices.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过第一性原理计算研究了MoSSe/WSSe Janus异质双层在应变下的电子稳定性和压电性能，发现界面工程可以有效抑制传统TMD材料中常见的应变诱导带隙转变，并且剪切压电系数对堆叠顺序和应变敏感。
AI.motivation: 传统二维TMD材料在应变下容易发生间接-直接带隙转变，影响柔性纳米电子器件的性能。Janus TMD因其破缺镜像对称性和面外偶极子，有望通过静电调控克服这一问题，但其应变稳定性和异质结构中硫族元素堆叠顺序的作用尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，研究MoSSe/WSSe异质双层的不同构型，分析界面化学对层间耦合、动态电荷重分布和偶极相互作用的影响。
AI.result: Janus异质结构能有效抑制传统TMD的应变诱导带隙转变；面内压电响应几乎不受堆叠顺序影响，但剪切压电系数强烈依赖于界面对称性且可通过应变调控。
AI.conclusion: 界面工程是设计抗应变Janus异质结构的有效策略，可用于下一代柔性光电器件、谷电子学和压电电子学器件。

title: Giant dielectric permittivity in Nb-doped rutile crystals
summary: Dielectric properties of Nb-doped (~1.5 at%) rutile single crystals were studied in the 10-300 K temperature range (at frequencies below the MHz range down to 0.3 K) in a broad frequency range, up to terahertz and infrared range, to understand the origin of its giant permittivity. The results were fitted, modelled and compared with those of the undoped rutile crystal measured in the terahertz and infrared ranges. The primary effect originates from the near-electrode depletion layer of lower conductivity compared to the bulk (surface barrier-layer capacitor effect), which causes a strong thermally activated relaxation in the MHz dielectric spectra. In the higher frequency range, the main difference between doped and undoped crystals is the presence of an overdamped microwave excitation (central mode) in the doped crystal for both polarizations, persisting down to 10 K and not thermally activated. This accounts for the previously reported permittivity increase, even at 2 K - where all lower-frequency relaxations are frozen - compared to undoped crystals. It also explains why our low-frequency permittivity at 0.3K exceeds the THz value. The origin of this excitation remains unclear and requires further investigations. Doping affects polar phonons only by slightly increasing their damping.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了掺铌金红石单晶（~1.5 at%）在10-300 K温度范围及宽频（至太赫兹和红外）下的介电特性，以解释其巨介电常数。主要发现来自近电极耗尽层的表面势垒层电容效应（产生MHz弛豫），以及一个非热激活的过阻尼微波激发（中心模）导致介电常数增大，即使在0.3K极低温下也如此。掺杂对极化声子影响较小。
AI.motivation: 理解掺铌金红石单晶巨介电常数的物理起源，特别是极低温下（如0.3K）仍呈现高介电常数的异常现象。
AI.method: 测量掺铌金红石单晶在宽频（MHz至太赫兹、红外）和宽温（10-300K，部分下至0.3K）范围的介电谱，结合拟合、建模，并与未掺杂金红石晶体进行对比分析。
AI.result: 1) 低频段（MHz）存在强热激活弛豫，源于近电极耗尽层的表面势垒层电容效应；2) 高频段中，掺铌晶体出现非热激活、过阻尼的微波激发（中心模），持续至10K以下；3) 该中心模解释了掺铌晶体在极低温下（如0.3K）介电常数仍高于未掺杂晶体的现象；4) 掺杂对极化声子影响有限，仅轻微增加阻尼。
AI.conclusion: 掺铌金红石的巨介电常数主要来自表面势垒层电容效应（低温冻结）和非热激活的中心模（极低温仍起作用）。但中心模的物理起源尚不明确，需要进一步研究。

title: Wasserstein-2 gradient flows and the geometry of entropy production in classical and quantum stochastic thermodynamics
summary: The second law does more than set the direction of thermodynamic evolution: it endows nonequilibrium transformations with an underlying geometry. In this work, we provide a unified geometric description of entropy production in classical and quantum thermodynamics based on Wasserstein-2 structures arising from gradient flows of free energy. We review how relaxation to equilibrium, in overdamped diffusions, discrete detailed-balanced Markov chains, and dissipative Lindblad dynamics, can be formulated as a gradient flow on the space of states. The associated Wasserstein-2 distance bounds entropy production, yielding a finite-time refinement of the second law. We extend this framework beyond purely dissipative dynamics by introducing generalized Wasserstein-2 metrics that incorporate conservative (Hamiltonian) dynamics in both classical inertial systems and open quantum systems, yielding intrinsic distances that exactly characterize minimal entropy production under fixed dissipative mobilities. We establish equivalence bounds between purely dissipative and Hamiltonian-dissipative geometries, explicitly quantifying how inertial or coherent dynamics can reduce dissipation. Finally, when restricted to equilibrium distributions, we recover the thermodynamic length of linear response-including the quantum thermodynamic length-thereby linking optimal transport, thermodynamic length, and counterdiabatic protocols within a single geometric framework. All in all, our results extend the Riemannian program of thermodynamics further from equilibrium and provide a geometric foundation for optimal protocols beyond the overdamped setting.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Wasserstein-2度量，为经典和量子热力学中的熵产生建立了统一的几何描述，将耗散动力学与保守动力学纳入同一框架，并建立了与热力学长度、最优输运和反绝热协议的联系。
AI.motivation: 热力学第二定律不仅指明了演化方向，还赋予了非平衡变换内在的几何结构。作者希望为经典和量子热力学中的熵产生提供一个统一的几何描述框架。
AI.method: 基于Wasserstein-2距离和自由能梯度流，将过阻尼扩散、详细平衡马尔可夫链、耗散Lindblad动力学等弛豫过程统一描述为状态空间上的梯度流。进一步引入广义Wasserstein-2度量，将保守（哈密顿）动力学纳入框架，并建立了纯耗散与哈密顿-耗散几何之间的等价关系。
AI.result: Wasserstein-2距离约束熵产生，提供了第二定律的有限时间精细化表述；建立了惯性/相干动力学可减少耗散的定量刻画；在平衡分布限制下恢复线性响应的热力学长度（包括量子热力学长度）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将热力学的Riemann纲领向更远的非平衡区域拓展，为超越过阻尼设置的最优协议提供了几何基础。

title: Charge dynamics in the Weyl semimetals NbIrTe$_4$ and TaIrTe$_4$ under pressure: Signatures of an electronic phase transition
summary: A high-pressure investigation of the Weyl semimetals NbIrTe$_4$ and TaIrTe$_4$ is presented, using infrared spectroscopy supplemented by density functional theory calculations. The experimental optical conductivity spectra as a function of pressure suggest the occurrence of a pressure-induced phase transition at a critical pressure $P_\text{c}=7\text{--}8$ GPa. This transition is most likely electronic in nature, as Raman scattering measurements provide no evidence of a significant structural phase transition. Above $P_\text{c}$ a significant redistribution of spectral weight occurs in the optical conductivity spectrum for both materials. A Drude-Lorentz analysis of the optical data indicates a sharp reduction in the free carrier concentration at $P_\text{c}$, concomitant with the appearance of a low-energy phonon, which was initially screened by free charge carriers. A predominantly electronic origin of the phase transition is supported by the calculated electronic band structure, Fermi surface, and interband optical conductivity as a function of pressure. Our findings provide collective evidence for a pressure-induced, most likely electronic phase transition in both van der Waals materials at $P_\text{c}=7\text{--}8$ GPa, highlighting the tunability of their electronic band structure by hydrostatic pressure.

AI.tldr: 本文利用红外光谱和DFT计算研究了Weyl半金属NbIrTe₄和TaIrTe₄在高压下的行为，发现约7-8 GPa处存在压力诱导的电子相变，伴随自由载流子浓度骤降和低能声子出现，且无显著结构变化。
AI.motivation: 探究Weyl半金属NbIrTe₄和TaIrTe₄在高压下的电子结构和相变行为，验证其能带结构是否可通过静水压力进行有效调控。
AI.method: 采用红外光谱测量辅以密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，结合Drude-Lorentz分析和拉曼散射测量，系统研究压力对光学电导率、载流子浓度和电子能带结构的影响。
AI.result: 两种材料在临界压力P_c=7-8 GPa处发生电子相变：光学电导率谱发生显著光谱权重重新分布，自由载流子浓度急剧减少，同时出现被自由电荷载流子屏蔽的低能声子；拉曼散射未发现显著结构相变；DFT计算的能带结构、费米面和带间光学电导率均支持电子相变的起源。
AI.conclusion: NbIrTe₄和TaIrTe₄在7-8 GPa处发生压力诱导的电子相变（很可能非结构相变），表明这两种范德华材料的电子能带结构可通过静水压力有效调控。

title: Stacking-Engineered Switchable Altermagnetism in Topological FeSe bilayer systems
summary: Altermagnetism and topological insulators represent two of the most transformative frontiers in modern condensed matter physics, spintronics, and quantum information science. Bringing these two paradigms together opens a largely unexplored route toward fundamentally new quantum phenomena. Here, we predict a topological altermagnetic phase in bilayer tetragonal Fe-based superconductors and reveal it as a highly tunable platform for valley-polarized anomalous Hall physics. Based on first-principles calculations, we show that the characteristic spin-splitting and valley polarization can be effectively tuned via applied strain. Moreover, the resulting valley-polarized anomalous Hall conductivity can be manipulated by shifting the Fermi level. These findings reveal a powerful route for controlling altermagnetism in topological materials and identify a realistic material platform for its experimental realization and technological exploitation.

AI.tldr: 本文预测了双层四方铁基超导体中存在拓扑交变磁相，并展示了其作为一种高度可调的谷极化反常霍尔物理平台。基于第一性原理计算，自旋劈裂和谷极化可通过应变有效调控，谷极化反常霍尔电导率可通过费米能级移动操控。
AI.motivation: 将交变磁性与拓扑绝缘体这两个前沿范式相结合，探索尚未被充分研究的新型量子现象。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算，研究双层四方铁基超导体中的交变磁性和拓扑性质。
AI.result: 发现特征自旋劈裂和谷极化可通过外加应变有效调控；谷极化反常霍尔电导率可通过费米能级移动进行操控。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了在拓扑材料中调控交变磁性的有效途径，并确定了可用于实验实现和技术开发的现实材料平台。

title: Universal theory of domain-wall width in multi-sublattice Heisenberg magnets
summary: We propose a universal expression for the domain-wall width in generic multi-sublattice Heisenberg magnets, applicable to ferro-, antiferro-, and ferrimagnetic orders. The result follows from an exact connection between the domain-wall profile and the long-wavelength spin-wave dispersion, yielding a unified framework for describing magnetic textures across distinct ordering types. The predictions show excellent quantitative agreement with large-scale atomistic spin dynamics simulations over a broad range of exchange and anisotropy values and spin multi-sublattice structures, including three-dimensional rock-salt-type magnets and two-dimensional honeycomb and kagome ferromagnets. Moreover, we establish a general microscopic foundation for the temperature dependence of the domain-wall width. Our approach offers a powerful tool for understanding domain-wall profiles in complex spin systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了适用于多子晶格海森堡磁体（包括铁磁、反铁磁和亚铁磁序）的畴壁宽度通用表达式，通过畴壁轮廓与长波自旋波色散之间的精确联系，建立了统一框架，并得到了原子尺度自旋动力学模拟的验证。
AI.motivation: 现有的畴壁宽度公式通常局限于简单的铁磁或反铁磁系统，缺乏适用于多子晶格（如铁氧体、蜂窝和kagome结构）的通用理论框架。
AI.method: 建立了畴壁轮廓与长波自旋波色散之间的精确解析联系，从而推导出畴壁宽度的通用表达式。
AI.result: 在广泛的交换作用、各向异性参数及多种子晶格结构（如岩盐、蜂窝和kagome铁磁体）中，理论预测与大规模原子尺度自旋动力学模拟结果高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为复杂自旋系统中的畴壁轮廓提供了统一的微观理论基础，并为温度依赖的畴壁宽度建立了通用微观框架。

title: Moiré Strain Skyrmions in Sliding Twisted Bilayers
summary: Strain defect is crucial to the physical properties of solid materials. Among them, strain glass induced by defect engineering provides an important paradigm for nanoscale domain manipulation. Here, we propose purely mechanical moiré strain Skyrmions, a topologically protected elastic textures whose motion can be controlled by interlayer sliding and the chirality of the moiré bilayer. Using an empirical continuum elastic model combined with symmetry analysis, we demonstrate the Skyrmion lattice structure as the elastic ground state. Under interlayer sliding, these moiré strain Skyrmions exhibit the Skyrmion Hall effect of transverse motion, with a Hall angle determined by bilayer chirality and inversely proportional to the moiré twist angle. Our work establishes interlayer sliding as an efficient, low-energy control knob for topological excitations, offering a new paradigm for designing chiral-material-based information transport devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种纯机械的莫尔应变斯格明子（Skyrmion），这是一种拓扑保护的弹性纹理，其运动可通过层间滑动和莫尔双层的手性来控制。研究发现其具有斯格明子霍尔效应，霍尔角由双层手性和莫尔扭转角决定，为设计手性材料信息传输器件提供了新范式。
AI.motivation: 应变缺陷对固体材料物理性质至关重要，而应变玻璃通过缺陷工程为纳米尺度畴操控提供了重要范式。作者希望探索一种纯机械的、无需外加场的拓扑弹性纹理及其可控运动。
AI.method: 采用经验连续弹性模型结合对称性分析，研究了莫尔双层中的应变斯格明子晶格结构及其在层间滑动下的动力学行为。
AI.result: 发现莫尔应变斯格明子可形成晶格结构作为弹性基态；在层间滑动下表现出横向运动的斯格明子霍尔效应，霍尔角由双层手性决定且与莫尔扭转角成反比。
AI.conclusion: 层间滑动是一种高效、低能耗的拓扑激发控制手段，为基于手性材料的信息传输器件设计提供了新范式。

title: Sub-cycle field-driven dynamical Berry phase in solids
summary: In quantum mechanics, a wavepacket acquires a geometric phase, known as the Berry phase, as it evolves along a closed trajectory in parameter space. In condensed matter systems, the Berry phase underlies a broad range of phenomena, including the anomalous Hall effect, orbital magnetism, and electric polarization. However, in centrosymmetric materials possessing time-reversal (TR) symmetry, its manifestation is suppressed and effectively vanishes. When a system is driven by a strong terahertz (THz) field, it can be coherently driven far from equilibrium, transiently reshaping its symmetry on sub-picosecond timescales. This capability opens new avenues for quantum control with potential applications in information processing and sensing. Here, we experimentally demonstrate that a strong THz field can transiently break inversion symmetry in MgO, inducing a dynamical complex Berry phase, thereby manipulating the topological properties of the material. Applying high-harmonic generation (HHG) spectroscopy, we directly resolve the Berry phase, accessing both its real and imaginary components. The first is associated with coherent intraband dynamics while the second with quantum tunneling through a potential barrier. This observation enables the reconstruction of the time-dependent evolution of the Berry phase within the cycle of the THz field. The coherent manipulation of solids with strong fields, combined with attosecond-resolved HHG spectroscopy, represents a fundamental step toward unveiling and controlling geometric quantum phenomena in condensed matter systems.

AI.tldr: 本文实验证明，通过强太赫兹场可以瞬态打破MgO中的反演对称性，诱导出动态复贝里相位，并利用高次谐波光谱技术直接解析其实部和虚部，实现了对材料拓扑性质的超快调控。
AI.motivation: 贝里相位在中心对称且具有时间反演对称性的材料中被抑制而无法显现。作者希望利用强太赫兹场瞬态打破对称性，从而诱导并观测动态贝里相位，实现量子控制。
AI.method: 采用强太赫兹场驱动MgO材料，使其瞬态打破反演对称性；利用高次谐波产生光谱技术，直接解析动态复贝里相位的实部（与带内相干动力学相关）和虚部（与量子隧穿相关）。
AI.result: 成功在MgO中诱导出动态复贝里相位，并解析了其实部和虚部；重建了太赫兹场周期内贝里相位的时间演化过程。
AI.conclusion: 强场相干调控结合阿秒分辨的HHG光谱，为揭示和控制凝聚态系统中的几何量子现象迈出了关键一步，在信息处理和传感领域具有潜在应用。

title: Room-Temperature Electric-Field Control of Anomalous Hall Effect in Py/BTO/LSMO Heterostructures
comment: Submitted to Advanced Functional Materials. This manuscript is a preprint and has not yet undergone peer review. Sayantika Bhowal (2) and Devajyoti Mukherjee (1) are corresponding authors
summary: We demonstrate room temperature electric field control of the anomalous Hall effect in epitaxial Ni80Fe20 (Py) BaTiO3 (BTO) La0.7Sr0.3MnO3 (LSMO) thin film heterostructures grown on MgO and LaAlO3 substrates. Substrate induced strain states generate distinct magnetic anisotropies, enabling voltage driven tuning between anomalous and topological Hall contributions. Robust ferroelectric polarization in BTO, confirmed by piezoresponse force microscopy, couples strongly to interfacial orbital reconstruction and carrier redistribution. As a result, Hall resistivity exhibits giant low voltage tunability, with up to nearly 93 percent modulation at operating voltages of only 0.5 tand 2 V. Density functional theory calculations further reveal polarization controlled Rashba spin splitting, establishing a direct link between ferroelectric order and emergent quantum transport. These findings establish Py/BTO/LSMO heterostructures as promising candidates for low-power multifunctional spintronic devices, where substrate engineering enables control over emergent quantum transport phenomena.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了在Ni80Fe20/BaTiO3/La0.7Sr0.3MnO3异质结构中，通过电场在室温下调控反常霍尔效应，实现高达93%的调制幅度，并揭示了铁电极化与Rashba自旋劈裂之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 实现低功耗、多功能的自旋电子学器件，探索电场对量子输运现象的有效调控机制。
AI.method: 在MgO和LaAlO3衬底上外延生长Py/BTO/LSMO异质结构，利用衬底诱导应变调控磁各向异性，结合压电响应力显微镜和密度泛函理论计算等手段。
AI.result: 在0.5V和2V的低工作电压下，霍尔电阻率实现了近93%的调制；证实了铁电极化与Rashba自旋劈裂的直接关联。
AI.conclusion: Py/BTO/LSMO异质结构是低功耗多功能自旋电子学器件的候选材料，衬底工程可实现对涌现量子输运现象的控制。

title: Surface Modification for III-V Selective Area Molecular Beam Epitaxy of Non-Selective Mask Materials
summary: Selective-area embedded regrowth of III-V semiconductors by molecular beam epitaxy enables the seamless integration of metals and dielectrics into crystalline material for novel design of optoelectronic devices. However, traditional masks like $SiO_2$ and $Si_{3}N_{4}$ limit the design of high-contrast photonics in the infrared due to their high extinction coefficients at technologically relevant wavelengths. Consequently, there is a need to explore alternative mask materials to expand the selective area molecular beam epitaxy capabilities beyond those traditionally used. This study evaluates the deposition selectivity of the alternative materials $Al_{2}O_{3}$, $TiO_2$, and $HfO_2$, films with preferable spectral responses but higher surface reactivity. It was found that $Al_{2}O_{3}$ exhibits promising selective growth characteristics within typical GaAs growth temperatures, $HfO_2$ demonstrated a high non-selectivity dominated by Ga adsorption on the mask at temperatures up to 650 $^\circ$C, and $TiO_2$ proved reactive during deposition. To achieve selective growth of highly non-selective and even reactive mask materials, a surface modification technique was employed to improve the selective growth characteristics of any given film. Selective growth of $Si_{3}N_{4}$ and $TiO_2$ films was achieved with the application of a thin $SiO_2$ capping layer utilizing growth conditions typical of the GaAs/$SiO_2$ system. The relationship between the thickness of $SiO_2$ caps and growth selectivity was examined, revealing that sub-1 nm capping layers can significantly influence the mask surface chemistry, indicating that by depositing a thin layer of $SiO_2$, $SiO_2$-like selectivity for any mask material can be realized without degrading its optical response.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了Al₂O₃、TiO₂和HfO₂等替代掩膜材料在III-V族半导体选区分子束外延中的沉积选择性，发现Al₂O₃在GaAs生长温度下表现良好，而HfO₂和TiO₂存在非选择性和反应性问题。通过沉积亚纳米级SiO₂覆盖层，可显著改善掩膜材料的表面化学性质，实现类似SiO₂的选择性生长而不牺牲光学性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SiO₂和Si₃N₄掩膜在红外波段具有高消光系数，限制了高对比度光子学器件的设计。因此需要探索具有更好光谱响应但表面反应性更高的替代掩膜材料，以扩展选区分子束外延的能力。
AI.method: 系统评估Al₂O₃、TiO₂和HfO₂三种替代材料的沉积选择性；对非选择性和反应性掩膜材料采用表面修饰技术（薄层SiO₂覆盖）改善其选择性生长特性；研究SiO₂覆盖层厚度与生长选择性之间的关系。
AI.result: Al₂O₃在典型GaAs生长温度下表现出良好的选择性生长特性；HfO₂在650°C以下显示高度非选择性（Ga吸附主导）；TiO₂在沉积过程中具有反应性。通过施加亚纳米级SiO₂覆盖层，成功实现了Si₃N₄和TiO₂的选择性生长。
AI.conclusion: 沉积薄层SiO₂可实现任何掩膜材料获得类似SiO₂的选择性，且不影响其光学响应，为红外波段高对比度光子学器件设计提供了新途径。

title: Layer-Resolved Nonlinear Optics in Finite-Thickness Two-Dimensional Systems
summary: Nonlinear optical (NLO) responses in two-dimensional quantum-confined systems are typically described within bulk-based frameworks as macroscopic spatial averages. In finite-thickness van der Waals multilayers directly relevant to nanoscale devices, this picture substantially breaks down. Here, we establish a general symmetry-based framework for classifying second-order NLO responses in multilayers. We reveal a layer-resolved organization into skin, weak-skin, and hidden effects governed by local symmetry and stacking order. First-principles calculations for both nonmagnetic and spin-polarized systems confirm our predictions, demonstrating that stacking alone suffices to dramatically reshape both the spatial pattern and magnitude of the NLO response, a phenomenon not explainable within standard bulk theory. Our results establish stacking geometry as an effective knob for engineering surface-selective NLO responses in layered materials.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了基于对称性的框架，用于分类有限厚度范德瓦尔斯多层材料中的二阶非线性光学响应，揭示了层分辨的皮肤、弱皮肤和隐藏效应，并通过第一性原理计算验证了堆叠顺序对非线性光学响应的显著调控作用。
AI.motivation: 传统基于块体框架的描述在有限厚度二维多层体系中失效，无法解释纳米尺度器件中真实的非线性光学响应行为。
AI.method: 建立了基于对称性的理论框架，将多层中的二阶非线性光学响应分类为皮肤、弱皮肤和隐藏效应；通过第一性原理计算对非磁性和自旋极化系统进行验证。
AI.result: 揭示了堆叠顺序本身足以显著改变非线性光学响应的空间分布和强度，这是标准块体理论无法解释的现象。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠几何可作为有效调控手段，用于工程化层状材料中表面选择性非线性光学响应。

title: Hydrothermally-Assisted Sintering of Calcium Hydroxide Sputtering Targets: A Route to Quantum-Grade CaO Thin Films
summary: In this report we demonstrate dense polycrystalline calcium hydroxide ceramics fabricated by hydrothermally-assisted sintering - often referred to as cold-sintering - to produce high-purity calcium hydroxide targets for calcium oxide thin film deposition. Calcium hydroxide ceramics exhibit up to 98% theoretical density without thermal dehydration, when sintered at temperatures between 100 °C - 300° C with 400 MPa applied uniaxial pressure for 1 hour. The brucite phase is preserved in calcium hydroxide targets at all temperatures. Small equivalent fractions of calcium carbonate are present in both the calcium hydroxide precursor powder and final targets suggesting minimal additional production during formation and densification. Microstructure evolution during densification is documented by scanning electron microscopy, indicating both mass transport and plastic deformation densification mechanisms. The hydrothermal-assisted sintering process is scaled up to produce 2-inch diameter calcium hydroxide targets suitable for sputter deposition. We also report epitaxial calcium oxide film deposition from these targets on r-plane sapphire substrates. (002) oriented epitaxial films are achieved with a time-stable 1.2 nm per minute deposition rate. We note that energetic bombardment during growth can be substantial at these rates even when 1 mol% oxygen is added to the sputtering process necessitating the low deposition rate conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了通过水热辅助烧结（冷烧结）制备致密多晶氢氧化钙陶瓷，用于氧化钙薄膜沉积。在100-300°C、400 MPa条件下烧结1小时，可获得高达98%理论密度的氢氧化钙靶材，且保留水镁石相。成功制备了2英寸靶材，并在r面蓝宝石衬底上实现了外延氧化钙薄膜沉积，沉积速率为1.2 nm/min。
AI.motivation: 开发高纯度、致密的氢氧化钙靶材，用于氧化钙薄膜的沉积，解决传统烧结工艺中热脱水的问题。
AI.method: 采用水热辅助烧结（冷烧结）技术，在100-300°C、400 MPa单轴压力下烧结1小时制备氢氧化钙陶瓷靶材，并通过溅射沉积在r面蓝宝石衬底上生长氧化钙外延薄膜。
AI.result: 氢氧化钙陶瓷密度可达98%理论密度，无热脱水现象；成功制备2英寸靶材；在r面蓝宝石上获得(002)取向外延氧化钙薄膜，沉积速率稳定在1.2 nm/min。
AI.conclusion: 水热辅助烧结是一种有效制备高致密氢氧化钙靶材的方法，可用于高质量氧化钙薄膜的外延生长，但需注意低沉积速率以避免生长过程中的高能轰击问题。

title: Symmetry-Protected Weyl Nodal Loops in a Triangular Altermagnet
summary: Weyl semimetals and altermagnets represent two distinct classes of quantum materials exhibiting nontrivial topological and magnetic order, respectively. Here we report the realization of a Weyl nodal-loop altermagnet in Cr$_7$Se$_8$, combining neutron diffraction and first-principles calculations. The hexagonal system hosts a coplanar $120^\circ$ compensated magnetic order on a triangular lattice, which breaks inversion-time-reversal and translation-time-reversal symmetries simultaneously while preserving a crystalline mirror plane. The resulting electronic structure features linearly dispersing nodal loops close to the Fermi level ($E_F$) confined to the mirror-invariant $k_z=0$ plane. Along high-symmetry directions, the crossings near $E_F$ form Dirac-like fourfold degeneracies in the absence of spin-orbit coupling; at generic momenta, these crossings split into twofold and form continuous Weyl-like nodal loops protected by mirror symmetry. The momentum-dependent spin polarization exhibits an $f$-wave-like pattern characteristic of odd-parity altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过中子衍射和第一性原理计算，在Cr₇Se₈中实现了外尔节线环交变磁体，该体系兼具外尔半金属的拓扑特性和交变磁体的磁性有序，展示了镜面对称保护的节线环和f波自旋极化模式。
AI.motivation: 将外尔半金属（拓扑非平庸电子结构）与交变磁体（非常规磁序）两大量子材料类别的特性结合，探索能否在单一材料中同时实现拓扑节线环和交变磁序。
AI.method: 使用中子衍射确定磁结构，结合第一性原理计算分析电子能带结构；研究六方晶系中Cr₇Se₈的共面120°补偿磁序，分析其对称性破缺（同时破缺时间反演-空间反演和翻译-时间反演对称性）及镜面对称保护机制。
AI.result: 在镜面对称保护的k_z=0平面内发现了费米能级附近的线性色散节线环；沿高对称方向形成狄拉克型四重简并，在一般动量点劈裂为两重简并的连续外尔节线环；自旋极化呈现奇宇称交变磁体特征的f波模式。
AI.conclusion: 在Cr₇Se₈中成功实现了外尔节线环交变磁体，为拓扑磁性与非常规磁序的交叉研究提供了新平台，扩展了量子材料设计的可能性。

title: Structure, Composition, and High-Field Superconductivity in Metal-Rich $\mathrmη$-Carbide-Type Compounds
summary: $\mathrmη$-Carbide-type compounds have recently emerged as a diverse class of materials in the study of superconductivity. These phases contribute to a growing family of metal-rich quantum materials that exhibit unusual superconducting properties emerging from complex metallic bonding. Several members of the $\mathrmη$-carbide-type phases have been found to be bulk superconductors -- such as Nb$_4$Rh$_2$C$_{1-δ}$, Ta$_4$Rh$_2$C$_{1-δ}$, Ti$_4$Ir$_2$O$_{1-δ}$, and Ti$_4$Co$_2$O$_{1-δ}$ -- with transition temperatures up to $T_{\rm c} \approx$ 10 K and upper critical fields as high as $μ_0 H_{\rm c2}(0) \approx$ 30 T. Whereas the transition temperatures may fall within the range typical for intermetallic superconductors, the pronounced violation of the weak-coupling Pauli limit in many of these crystallographically high-symmetry materials is noteworthy. Here, we review recent progress on superconducting $\mathrmη$-carbide-type phases, emphasizing how crystal symmetry, synthetic challenges, transition-metal composition, and electronic structure govern their superconducting properties. Furthermore, we outline open questions and future directions, including the possible discovery of new $\mathrmη$-carbide-type materials.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了η-碳化物型超导相的最新进展，这类材料具有高达10K的超导转变温度和30T的上临界场，且显著违背弱耦合泡利极限。文章强调了晶体对称性、合成挑战、过渡金属组成和电子结构对超导性能的影响，并展望了未来方向。
AI.motivation: η-碳化物型化合物作为一类新兴的超导材料家族，展现出源自复杂金属键的异常超导性质，尤其是对弱耦合泡利极限的显著违背，这挑战了传统超导理论，值得深入研究。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，系统梳理了η-碳化物型超导相的研究进展，重点分析了晶体对称性、合成条件、过渡金属组分和电子结构等关键因素如何调控其超导性能。
AI.result: 已发现多种η-碳化物型体超导体（如Nb₄Rh₂C、Ta₄Rh₂C、Ti₄Ir₂O、Ti₄Co₂O等），T_c最高约10K，上临界场可达30T，并普遍观察到对弱耦合Pauli极限的显著违背。
AI.conclusion: η-碳化物型相是探索非常规超导的重要平台，其高对称性晶体结构中的强耦合效应值得进一步挖掘，未来有望发现更多新型η-碳化物型超导材料。

title: Interplay between Quantum Metric and Hybridized Collective Modes in Flat-Band Superfluids
summary: We investigate collective excitations in flat-band superfluids by incorporating the coupled dynamics of pairing (phase and amplitude) and density fluctuations. We demonstrate that for any time-reversal symmetric superfluid system with an isolated flat band, only a single low-energy collective mode emerges in the long-wavelength limit. In contrast to the linearly dispersive Goldstone mode in conventional superfluids, this hybridized mode is gapless at zero momentum but exhibits a quadratic dispersion ($ω\propto q^2$) at small momenta. Analytically, we reveal that the dispersion coefficient of this collective mode is governed by the normal-state quantum metric of the flat band. These analytical predictions are in excellent agreement with numerical calculations. Our results are universally applicable to any generic $s$-wave flat-band superfluid, provided the flat band is energetically well separated from other dispersive bands.

AI.tldr: 本文研究平带超流体中的集体激发，发现时间反演对称的孤立平带超流体在长波极限下仅存在一个低能集体模式，该模式在零动量处无能隙但具有二次色散关系（ω∝q²），其色散系数由平带的正常态量子度量决定。
AI.motivation: 探索平带超流体中配对（相位和振幅）与密度涨落耦合动力学，揭示平带系统中集体激发的独特行为。
AI.method: 通过耦合配对（相位和振幅）与密度涨落的动力学分析，结合解析推导与数值计算进行验证。
AI.result: 1）时间反演对称孤立平带超流体在长波极限下仅存在一个低能集体模式；2）该模式具有二次色散（ω∝q²），而非传统超流体的线性Goldstone模；3）色散系数由平带的正常态量子度量决定；4）解析结果与数值计算高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该结果对任意s波平带超流体（只要平带与其他色散带能量分离良好）具有普适性。
